Around it, arrange 6 smaller rectangular vignette panels: 1 upper-left cramped bedroom scene, 1 upper-right convenience-store cashier scene, 1 middle-left tabletop budgeting scene, 1 middle-right laundromat waiting scene, 1 lower-left rooftop city-view scene with pigeons, and 1 lower-right nighttime bedroom scene.

Typography: Put the large brush-calligraphy title across the very top, bold black ink strokes with splatter and rough dry-brush texture. Place the smaller episode label below the left side of the title. Keep the typography integrated like a manga chapter opener.

content:
Goal: Create a monochrome anime action storyboard sheet for an animation fight sequence, full of rough sakuga energy: gestural, dynamic, and readable, like a choreography bible for animators. The subject is {argument name="character name" default="a long-haired robed spear warrior"} performing a spear-and-water combat ritual across exactly 12 panels.

Canvas: Wide horizontal storyboard board, 16:9 ratio, divided into an exact 3x4 grid with thick black panel borders. Each panel has a black number badge in the upper-left corner, numbered 01 through 12, with hand-lettered uppercase titles and small color-coded annotation notes.

Visual style: Grayscale ink-and-pencil concept art with loose sketch lines, dramatic motion blur, wind-torn cloth, flying hair, splashing water, ruined coastal towers, hanging lanterns, birds in the sky, and cinematic camera angles. Keep the art mostly black, white, and gray, but overlay clear colored animator annotations: red for camera movement, blue for body mechanics, green for weapon arc, orange for impact or lantern reaction, and purple for timing or hold beats. Annotation arrows should be hand-drawn, bright, and readable.

Layout and panel content: Include exactly 12 storyboard panels:

01 — SPEAR PLANT REVEAL: The warrior stands upright on flooded stone, spear planted vertically into the water. Distant towers and seabirds behind. Red arrows show a low front wide camera move, blue notes show still stance, green arrow shows spear vertical, purple rings at the feet show stillness.

02 — TIDE BREATH: Medium side shot. The warrior extends the spear horizontally while cloth and hair flow in the wind. Red note: medium side. Blue arrows: arms rise, inhale. Green arrow: spear lifts parallel. Purple timing mark: breath hold.

03 — FIRST SWEEP CUT: Dynamic tracking-wide shot of the warrior lunging into a wide sweeping spear cut, water exploding at the feet. Red annotation: tracking wide. Blue arrows: hip rotation, low sweep. Green arc sweeps left to right across the panel. Purple note: release.

04 — SPIRAL ENTRY: Overhead or high-angle spin view. The warrior rotates in a 360-degree spiral, robes forming circular motion. Red note: orbit follow. Blue: spin 360. Green: spear orbital loop. Purple: snap at top.

05 — SALTWATER STEP: Ground-tracking shot. The warrior steps forward through shallow seawater, spear trailing outward, ripples spreading. Red: ground tracking. Blue: cross step forward. Green: water ripples outward. Purple: weight shift.

06 — PILLAR VAULT: High-angle follow shot as the warrior vaults or leaps near a tall broken pillar. Red: high angle follow. Blue: upward vault, body extend. Green: spear trails below. Purple: airborne beat.

07 — DOWNWARD PLUNGE: Front low push-in. The warrior drives the spear downward into the ground or water, creating a violent burst. Red: front low push-in. Blue: two-hand strike descend. Green: spear vertical down. Orange: impact burst. Purple: hit snap.

08 — BLADE SPIN RECOVER: Wide side view recovery stance. The warrior pivots low while the spear loops tightly around the body. Red: wide side view. Blue: behind-back loop, recover stance. Green: tight spear loop. Purple: reset breath.

09 — LANTERN PASS: Rear three-quarter composition with the warrior passing under hanging lanterns, spear extended across the frame. Red: rear 3/4. Blue: tip graze precise line. Green: spear tip path. Orange: lanterns sway, chain reaction. Purple: soft snap.

10 — TIDE SILHOUETTE: Extreme low wide shot. The warrior poses dramatically on a broken stone platform against a towering wave. Red: extreme low wide. Blue: full body pose. Green: spear overhead arc. Purple: hero pause.

11 — ROBES-TO-WATER CUT: Tracking front shot. The warrior slashes downward through water, robes whipping into the motion. Red: tracking front. Blue: slide descend steps. Green: robes trail through water. Purple: controlled flow decay.

12 — RITE UNFINISHED: Wide hero shot at sunset or pale dawn. The warrior stands facing the horizon, spear leveled forward, ocean ruins and a glowing sun in the distance. Red: wide hero shot. Blue: stand and level forward. Green: spear leveled at horizon. Purple: forward intent.

Text content: Use hand-lettered English titles exactly as listed for all 12 panels. Add small colored notes inside each panel, matching the listed red, blue, green, orange, and purple annotations. Optional main design emphasis: {argument name="motion emphasis" default="water-spear choreography with readable animation planning arrows"}.

Constraints: Exactly 12 panels in a 3x4 grid, no extra panels. Preserve the locked annotation color key: red camera, blue body, green weapon arc, orange impact, purple timing. Keep the image mostly monochrome with only the annotation colors vivid. Avoid polished clean lineart; keep it rough, energetic, cinematic, and storyboard-like.
title: 12-Panel Spear Sakuga Storyboard
description: Generates a detailed 3x4 anime action storyboard sheet with color-coded animation choreography notes for a spear-wielding warrior sequence.

content:

She wears a pale translucent salt-white halter wrap dress with a high slit, a seafoam waist sash, wrapped forearm bandages, anklets, and a flowing tattered deep blue-black cloak that looks like wet tide fabric. She holds a tall ornate ceremonial glaive upright beside her; the blade is jagged, elegant, dark metal with glowing blue edges and carved wave-like ornament. Add subtle water-splash stains and ink textures around her hem.

Left title column: Add four large vertical Chinese characters down the far left with small English translations beside them: tide, silence, blade, body, return. Include a small red seal stamp beneath. content:
Goal: Create a polished commercial storyboard presentation for a 15-second ultra-realistic cinematic vertical football campaign featuring the same female footballer in every frame, titled {argument name="headline text" default="UNSTOPPABLE STARTS NOW"}.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 black presentation board with thin white divider lines, a premium sports-agency layout, high contrast, realistic stadium photography in each panel, and a small top metadata bar. Use a black background, white condensed uppercase typography, and blue accent blocks for panel numbers and the word “STARTS.”

Header: Place a white Adidas-style three-stripe logo at top left, followed by the main headline “UNSTOPPABLE STARTS NOW,” with “UNSTOPPABLE” in white and “STARTS NOW” in electric blue. Under it, add small text: “COMMERCIAL STORYBOARD   CINEMATIC FOOTBALL CAMPAIGN.” On the top right add small production labels: “DIRECTOR / SPORTS COMMERCIAL UNIT,” “BRAND / ADIDAS FOOTBALL,” a small “16:9” badge, and “CINEMATIC STORYBOARD.”

Layout: Use exactly 6 storyboard panels arranged in a 3-column by 2-row grid. Each panel has a blue numbered square, an uppercase scene title, one ultra-realistic cinematic image, and three tiny notes underneath labeled ACTION, CAMERA, and NOTES. Keep the same consistent reference character in all 6 panels: {argument name="character description" default="a young athletic blonde female footballer with a high ponytail, wearing a white Real Madrid-style football kit with black shoulder panels, blue trim, white socks, and football boots"}. Make the face neutral or softly obscured rather than celebrity-specific.

Storyboard panels, exactly 6:
1. “THE ARRIVAL” — The player emerges from a stadium tunnel into a packed football arena at sunset, dramatic orange sky, Real Madrid-style flags in the crowd, huge stadium lights, low-angle wide entrance shot. Text below: ACTION: She emerges from the tunnel as the stadium erupts. CAMERA: Low-angle wide entrance shot with dramatic scale. NOTES: Sunset + stadium lights create cinematic contrast.
2. “CROWD REACTION” — Handheld sideline view as excited fans press forward cheering, filming on phones, flashes and stadium lights behind her while she walks past confidently. Text below: ACTION: Fans stand, cheer, and film her entrance. CAMERA: Handheld sideline perspective for energy. NOTES: Flashes, motion blur, and real crowd atmosphere.
3. “THE FIRST TRICK” — Close sports-action tracking shot as she juggles a {argument name="football type" default="black and white football"} effortlessly with her knee near the sideline, crowd roaring, bright stadium floodlights, blue Champions League-style ribbon signage. Text below: ACTION: She juggles the ball effortlessly with her knee. CAMERA: Close sports-action tracking shot. NOTES: Ball frozen mid-air, crowd reacts louder.
4. “MATCH-DAY ENERGY” — Wide cinematic stadium view with the player moving along the sideline, crowd packed and waving flags, confetti and smoke cannons, advertising boards, dynamic match-day atmosphere. Text below: ACTION: She moves along the sideline, crowd goes wild. CAMERA: Ultra-wide cinematic stadium view. NOTES: Confetti, smoke, banners, and vibrant atmosphere.
5. “THE MOMENT” — Dramatic low-angle portrait on the pitch as she controls the ball with one foot raised, stadium lights glowing overhead, shallow depth of field, intense heroic pause. Text below: ACTION: She stops, controls the ball, and owns the moment. CAMERA: Dramatic low-angle portrait shot. NOTES: Shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting on face.
6. “ICONIC EXIT” — Rear follow shot of the player jogging toward center pitch with a black backpack, jersey number visible, match continuing in the distance, giant stadium screen showing her, crowd and lights slightly motion blurred. Text below: ACTION: She jogs to the center pitch as the match continues. CAMERA: Rear follow shot with stadium scale. NOTES: Epic finale frame, motion blur on crowd and lights.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic sports commercial photography, cinematic grading, crisp detail, stadium floodlights, crowd energy, slight motion blur, premium brand-storyboard aesthetic, clean editorial spacing, thin white borders around images, tiny but legible production-note typography.

Constraints: Use exactly 6 panels and no extra panels. Maintain the same player, kit, hair, and body type across all panels. Keep the board landscape 16:9 even though it describes a vertical video campaign. Avoid random logos except the Adidas-style header mark and football-stadium branding cues. Make it look like a finished professional storyboard sheet, not a comic page.
title: Cinematic Football Commercial Storyboard
description: Generates a six-panel professional sports commercial storyboard board for a football campaign with a consistent female athlete character.

content:
Goal: Create a richly detailed vertical dark-fantasy anime poster for {argument name="story title" default="Alice in Wonderland"}, reimagined as an elegant gothic tea-party character illustration.

Canvas: Tall 2:3 portrait poster, dense decorative composition, cinematic lighting, deep navy, violet, black, antique gold, muted cream, and ruby-red accents. Use ornate Victorian borders, filigree corners, glowing bokeh, floating cards, and magical dust throughout.

Main subject: A beautiful androgynous young male anime character seated in a plush vintage armchair at the center, looking tired, aloof, and melancholic. He has messy dark blue-purple hair, golden amber eyes, pale skin, and black cat ears, with a dark fluffy cat tail visible near the lower right. He wears an extravagant Mad Hatter-inspired gothic aristocrat outfit: oversized checkerboard top hat decorated with playing cards, blue roses, chains, gears, ribbons, and small charms; layered black and navy tailcoat with gold trim; ruffled white lace shirt; blue bow at the neck; ornate brooches; shoulder epaulettes; dangling chains; pocket watches; belts; gloves or lace cuffs; fitted dark trousers; and tall black lace-up platform boots. Pose him lounging with one leg crossed forward, one elbow resting on the chair arm, one hand near his face, and the other holding a delicate teacup.

Environment: A surreal enchanted Wonderland forest or tea-party room with blurred glowing lanterns, blue stained-glass-like lights, mushrooms, roses, antique bottles, tea sets, cakes, clocks, playing cards, ribbons, and magical floating fragments. The mood should feel mysterious, decadent, dreamlike, and slightly ominous.

Layout and text elements: Include exactly 6 distinct readable graphic text panels/signs:
1. Upper-left ornate arched title plaque with the large title “ALICE in WONDERLAND”, a smaller Japanese subtitle “不思議の国のアリス”, a tiny teapot icon, and story text: “Down the rabbit-hole he fell, chasing a whisper not meant for him— In a land where time is broken and rules are only a joke, ...is there a way to return?”
2. Upper-right wooden signpost with 4 arrow signs labeled exactly: “This Way”, “That Way”, “Tea Party”, and “Go Back”.
3. Lower-left parchment invitation card titled “Mad Hatter’s Tea Invitation” with smaller text: “You’re invited to a most unusual tea. Don’t be late. Or be. It doesn’t matter.”
4. Bottom-left ornate oval cameo frame showing a tiny silhouette tea-party scene with two seated figures, labeled “Who Are You?”
5. Lower-center handwritten chalk-like quote: {argument name="center quote" default="There’s no truth here. Only what you choose to believe."} with a small doodle cat face and sparkle marks.
6. Lower-right parchment tag titled “Drink Me” with smaller text: “A sip may shrink you, A sip may change you, Choose wisely.” plus a small potion-bottle illustration.

Additional visible objects: Include floating playing cards with suits, at least 3 red roses, at least 2 pocket watches, a teapot and cupcake tea set near the lower left, a glowing potion bottle labeled “Drink me” on the lower right, a crystal orb or glowing glass lamp, wax seals on parchment notes, ribbons, chains, and blue flowers.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed Japanese anime key visual, ornate gothic lolita / ouji fashion, Victorian fantasy poster design, high-contrast rim lighting, soft painterly rendering, crisp character details, luminous particles, intricate accessories, dramatic depth of field, premium collectible illustration quality.

Constraints: Keep the main character recognizable as the central focus, do not crop off the hat or boots, preserve all 6 text panels/signs, avoid modern objects, avoid minimalism, avoid flat colors, and make the typography decorative but legible.

Add exactly 7 visible food/drink items on and near the counter: 1 oden cup with large Japanese label, 1 melon bread held in the subject’s hand, 1 bottled milk tea, 1 wrapped onigiri, 1 packaged snack bag, 1 small plate with an extra melon bread, and 1 small receipt/slip. Outside the window, emphasize a rainy Shinjuku night skyline with blurred neon and Tokyo Tower-like red landmark lights.

Journal layout elements: Add exactly 10 scrapbook/annotation elements around the illustration: 1 large handwritten Japanese headline at top left, 1 small English phrase “late night journal,” 1 taped label reading “Daily Konbini Life,” 1 top-right note card, 1 left-side handwritten thought box, 1 left checklist box for today’s purchases, 1 small convenience-store tote-bag doodle, 1 bottom-left Polaroid photo labeled “Shinjuku Rainy Night,” 1 bottom-right memo checklist card, and 1 speech bubble near the subject. Use arrows and tiny doodles to connect notes to the food and window view.

Text: Use mostly handwritten Japanese with a few casual English accents. Main headline text: {argument name="headline text" default="コンビニ日和。"}. Top-left English phrase: {argument name="journal phrase" default="late night journal"}. Taped label text: {argument name="tape label" default="Daily Konbini Life"}. Polaroid caption: {argument name="polaroid caption" default="Shinjuku Rainy Night"}. Memo card title: {argument name="memo title" default="MEMO"}.

Constraints: Keep the composition based on the reference rather than inventing a new character angle. Preserve the anonymous blurred/blank face. Do not make it photorealistic; it must look like an illustrated notebook page. Avoid extra characters, logos, watermarks, or clean digital UI styling.

content:
Goal: Create a cinematic anime storyboard image card for an animation prompt, designed as a comic-strip scene plan with voice lines and timing.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape canvas, approximately 1152×768, with a black script header occupying the top third and a 10-panel storyboard grid occupying the bottom two thirds. Use thin white dividers between panels and a clean production-board layout.

Header: Black background with crisp white sans-serif text. Top line reads: SCENE TITLE: {argument name="scene title" default="Sunset Promise"}  |  DURATION: {argument name="duration" default="~10 SECONDS"}  |  GENRE / MOOD: {argument name="genre and mood" default="Emotional, Bittersweet"}. Below it, include exactly 10 numbered shot instructions with yellow timecodes and white descriptions:
1. 0:00 - 0:01 WIDE SHOT. Rooftop at sunset. Boy and girl stand apart, facing each other. Wind blows.
2. 0:01 - 0:02 MEDIUM CLOSE UP on boy. He takes a breath, hesitant. BOY: “There’s something I need to say...”
3. 0:02 - 0:03 MEDIUM CLOSE UP on girl. She turns to him, curious.
4. 0:03 - 0:04 CLOSE UP on boy. He speaks with feeling. BOY: “Thank you... for everything.”
5. 0:04 - 0:05 CLOSE UP on girl. She’s taken aback, eyes glisten.
6. 0:05 - 0:06 CLOSE UP on boy. He shows a small, warm smile. BOY: {argument name="farewell line" default="I won’t forget you."}
7. 0:06 - 0:07 CLOSE UP on girl. Tears form, she fights to hold them back.
8. 0:07 - 0:08 WIDE SHOT. A beat of silence between them. Wind and sunset fill the moment.
9. 0:08 - 0:09 BOY turns and walks away slowly. Girl watches, unable to call out.
10. 0:09 - 0:10 CLOSE UP on girl reaching out. Tears fall. Fade out. (NO DIALOGUE)

Storyboard grid: Exactly 10 panels arranged in two rows of five. Each panel has a small white square number label in the top-left corner and a small white timecode in the top-right corner. Panel labels are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 on the top row; 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 on the bottom row. Timecodes are: 0:00 - 0:01, 0:01 - 0:02, 0:02 - 0:03, 0:03 - 0:04, 0:04 - 0:05, 0:05 - 0:06, 0:06 - 0:07, 0:07 - 0:08, 0:08 - 0:09, 0:09 - 0:10.

Panel visuals: Use a dramatic Japanese anime film style with warm orange-pink sunset lighting, a rooftop railing, wet reflective rooftop floor, distant city skyline, glowing sun near the horizon, and wind-blown hair. The characters are a teenage boy in a dark Japanese school uniform and a teenage girl in a sailor-style school uniform with long brown hair. Add opaque brown rectangular censor blocks over the characters’ faces in close-up panels, matching the generated look.

Panel-by-panel imagery: 1) Wide rooftop shot with boy and girl standing apart facing each other, sunset centered between them. 2) Medium close-up of the boy from chest up, dark uniform, sunset skyline behind him, face covered by a brown rectangle. 3) Medium close-up of the girl turning toward him, long hair blowing, sailor uniform, face covered by a brown rectangle. 4) Extreme side close-up of the boy speaking, sunset behind, face mostly covered by a brown rectangle. 5) Close-up of the girl reacting, hair across frame, face covered by a brown rectangle. 6) Close-up of the boy with a subtle warm smile, face covered by a brown rectangle. 7) Close-up of the girl holding back tears, wind-blown hair, face covered by a brown rectangle. 8) Wide rooftop silence shot with both characters separated against the sunset. 9) Rear view of the boy walking away while the girl remains near the railing, orange sky behind them. 10) Close-up of the girl reaching one hand toward the camera, tears implied, face covered by a brown rectangle.

Visual style: High-detail anime key art, cinematic lighting, emotional bittersweet mood, soft film grain, saturated sunset clouds, reflective puddles, clean white storyboard borders, legible typography, no logos or watermarks.
title: Sunset Promise Anime Storyboard Card
description: Creates a 10-panel anime storyboard card with timed shots and dialogue for animating an emotional rooftop farewell scene.

content:
Goal: Create a dramatic vertical anime magazine-cover poster inspired by Neon Genesis Evangelion, combining a realistic full-body teenage boy in the foreground with a colossal biomechanical mecha bursting through destruction behind him.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, high-resolution, cinematic composition, pale off-white sky background with black typography and purple energy effects. The top is dominated by an oversized luxury-fashion serif masthead reading {argument name="main title" default="EVANGELION"}, spanning nearly the full width and partially overlapping the mecha.

Layout: Foreground subject stands slightly left of center, low-angle camera view, full body visible from shoes to head. Behind him, one giant purple-and-green Evangelion Unit-01 mecha lunges forward from the upper right, head and shoulders huge, one clawed hand reaching in from the left, glowing magenta eyes and mouth details. The bottom third shows cracked black rubble, reflective wet ground, sparks, dust, and purple lightning streaks cutting diagonally upward. Use strong depth of field: sharp subject and mecha, smoky background debris fading into haze.

Subject details: A slim teenage boy, about 14 years old, confident but neutral pose, one hand in trouser pocket and the other relaxed at his side, looking forward. His face should be intentionally anonymized with a soft rectangular blur/mosaic over the facial features while keeping hair and body visible. Outfit has exactly 6 visible pieces: short-sleeve white school shirt, dark blue undershirt visible at the collar, black belt, loose high-waisted black trousers, white low-top sneakers, and short dark brown hair. Lighting on the boy is realistic, with cool rim light from purple energy and soft shadow under the chin.

Mecha and action details: One massive EVA Unit-01, angular armor plates, black and deep purple body with neon green accents, long horn, red glowing eyes, open mechanical jaw, aggressive crouching motion. Surround it with exactly 12 large floating rubble chunks at different depths plus many tiny dust specks and sparks. Add jagged violet lightning bolts, shattered concrete, smoke plumes, and a chaotic battle-damaged city ground plane.

Text content: Include exactly 11 distinct printed design elements on the poster: 1) the huge top masthead {argument name="main title" default="EVANGELION"}; 2) small left label "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION"; 3) large left issue number {argument name="issue number" default="01"}; 4) a small black hatched rectangle under the issue number; 5) left label "TEST TYPE"; 6) large Japanese unit label {argument name="Japanese unit label" default="初号機"}; 7) small quote "God's in his heaven. All's right with the world."; 8) right-side character name {argument name="character name" default="SHINJI IKARI"}; 9) Japanese name text "碇 シンジ"; 10) small labels "THIRD CHILD", "THIRD CHILDREN", and "PROJECT EVA" grouped under the name; 11) a small NERV-style emblem with tiny motto text and barcode near the lower right. Add tiny technical microtext in the bottom-right corner reading "SPT", "BUSY", and "0x0x0".

Visual style: Premium anime key art mixed with editorial fashion magazine cover, ultra-detailed digital painting, sharp contrast, gritty rubble, glossy armor, violet and magenta energy, black elegant serif typography similar to high-fashion magazine type. Keep the composition poster-like, dramatic, polished, and print-ready.

Constraints: No extra characters, no additional mecha, no speech bubbles, no watermark, no modern UI frame. Keep all typography black or very dark, readable, and integrated into the poster design.
title: Evangelion Anime Magazine Cover
description: Creates a cinematic Evangelion-inspired anime poster with a school-uniform boy, giant EVA mecha, editorial typography, and violet battle effects.

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime storyboard sheet for a fictional 10-second trading card battle anime sequence, designed like a cinematic ad storyboard made from five horizontal panels.

Canvas: Landscape 16:10 white storyboard page with thin gray table borders, a centered Japanese headline at the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="10秒トレーディングカードバトルアニメ 絵コンテ"}, a thin red line accent near the top left, and a small angular red logo-like mark in the top right.

Layout: Use a three-column storyboard grid. The left column is narrow and contains red cut labels plus timing. The center column is wide and contains cinematic anime stills. The right column is a white notes column with camera direction and action notes. There are exactly 5 horizontal rows, separated by light gray lines.

Visible cut list: 1) Cut 1, 0.0s-2.0s: wide establishing arena shot. 2) Cut 2, 2.0s-4.0s: medium-close shot of the protagonist activating a card device. 3) Cut 3, 4.0s-6.2s: extreme close-up of a card thrust toward the viewer. 4) Cut 4, 6.2s-8.5s: whip-pan summoning scene with a dragon hologram appearing. 5) Cut 5, 8.5s-10.0s: final low-angle hero-and-dragon shot.

Subject details: The protagonist is {argument name="protagonist description" default="a fiery red-haired teenage anime boy wearing a red-and-black battle jacket, fingerless gloves, and a glowing mechanical card duel device on one arm"}. The summoned monster is {argument name="dragon description" default="a crimson armored dragon with huge wings, jagged horns, glowing red crystal chest core, and ember-like highlights"}. The arena is {argument name="arena description" default="a futuristic packed stadium at night with blue neon spotlights, a glowing duel field, massive audience stands, and a giant VS screen"}. The main card art shows a red demonic dragon emblem and fiery energy.

Center-panel imagery: Cut 1 shows the full stadium duel field with the red-haired protagonist on the left, an opponent in white far away on the right, giant red and blue card banners, and a large glowing “VS” display in the background. Cut 2 shows the protagonist grinning confidently, holding up a red dragon card while red energy coils around the wrist-mounted duel device; intentionally obscure or soften the exact face area as if motion-blurred/censored. Cut 3 shows a sharp close-up of one intense red eye and the raised dragon card, with rack-focus depth of field and explosive red particle streaks behind it. Cut 4 shows a red magic circle covering the arena floor as the dragon materializes in holographic flame beside the protagonist. Cut 5 shows the protagonist standing heroically beside the fully formed dragon, both lit from below by red embers and dramatic battle light.

Right-column text notes: For Cut 1 write “wide shot / dolly in / audience cheers, introduce protagonist”. For Cut 2 include the red Japanese quote {argument name="summon quote" default="「来い、紅蓮王ドラグレイザー！」"} followed by “medium-close-up / fearless smile / device activation”. For Cut 3 write “extreme close-up / rack focus / thrust card toward camera”. For Cut 4 write “whip pan / hologram summon / dragon appears”. For Cut 5 write “low angle / orbit shot / decisive cut”.

Visual style: High-energy modern shonen anime, glossy digital painting, cinematic lighting, red and blue color contrast, intense lens flares, speed lines, sparks, holographic particles, dramatic perspective, crisp storyboard presentation, professional production-board clarity.

Constraints: Keep exactly 5 storyboard rows, exactly 3 columns, and preserve the timing labels. Do not add extra cuts, extra characters, watermarks, or unrelated UI elements.
title: Trading Card Battle Anime Storyboard
description: A structured prompt for generating a five-cut cinematic anime storyboard sheet for a fictional trading card battle sequence.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical Japanese 4-panel manga comic about a cute chibi girl becoming even more excited when a rainy sports day is postponed.

Canvas: Tall vertical comic page in full color, approximately 9:16, with a white outer margin and thick black panel borders. Use exactly 4 stacked horizontal panels of equal width, manga-style composition, energetic expressions, glossy digital coloring, bold outlines, dramatic speed lines, sparkles, and sound effects.

Main character: A single chibi elementary-school girl named {argument name="character name" default="purple-haired girl"}. She has long wavy lavender-purple hair, pale skin, round gray eyes that turn into sparkling star eyes when excited, rosy cheeks, and a small open mouth. She wears a pale pink short-sleeve blouse with buttons, a light beige skirt, white socks, and simple shoes. Her pose is usually fists clenched near her chest in excitement or surprise.

Panel 1: School sports day setup under stormy clouds. Show the girl standing large in the center of a school athletic field, smiling with clenched fists and sparkles around her. Background includes a school building, Japanese flag, strings of international flags, a clock, a flower-decorated sports day arch labeled 「運動会」, tents, cones, bags, and lunch boxes. Add a large vertical speech bubble on the right with 「今日は運動会！」. At the very top outside or above the first panel, add the headline: {argument name="headline text" default="雨が空ごとプールに変わっても、楽しみは10倍に跳ね上がる！"}.

Panel 2: Indoor announcement scene. Show a wall-mounted gray loudspeaker on the left, a taped white notice below it reading 「雨で延期」, and the girl on the right in close-up looking shocked with a sweat drop, clenched fist, and wide open mouth. Add a speech bubble on the right reading 「延期!?」. Use beige indoor wall tones and manga burst lines radiating from her face.

Panel 3: Torrential rain on the sports field. Show the athletic field transformed into a shallow flooded pool under heavy rain, lightning, dark storm clouds, and dramatic water splashes. The girl stands in the foreground with star-shaped eyes and an amazed open mouth, holding a spiral-bound calendar that reads 「運動会（新しい日）」 with a large red circled 「7」 and 「日後！」 underneath. Add two sound effects: blue 「ザーッ」 for heavy rain on the left and orange 「ゴロゴロ」 for thunder on the upper right. Add a vertical speech bubble on the right reading 「あと7日!?」.

Panel 4: Extreme close-up celebration. Fill the panel with the girl's happy face, sparkling star eyes, open smiling mouth, and clenched fists. Use a hot pink and red radial burst background filled with yellow sparkles. Add one jagged speech bubble on the left containing 「100倍!!」 in red and 「楽しみ」 in black, meaning the excitement is multiplied.

Text count and placement: Include exactly 1 headline, exactly 4 comic panels, exactly 4 speech bubbles, exactly 1 taped notice, exactly 1 calendar page, exactly 2 manga sound effects, and exactly 1 sports day arch label. Preserve all Japanese text exactly as written. Avoid adding extra dialogue, captions, logos, watermarks, or additional characters.

Visual style: Cute Japanese chibi manga, bright saturated colors, clean black line art, expressive faces, playful dramatic exaggeration, polished webcomic look, high readability of all Japanese text.
title: Rainy Sports Day Chibi Manga
description: Generates a colorful four-panel Japanese chibi manga about a rainy sports day postponement turning into even greater excitement.

content: Using the character from the reference image, depict the moment the 'Summoning Jutsu' is activated. Accurately maintain the character's face, hairstyle, hair color, eyes, ears, costume, silhouette, body proportions, and atmosphere. Do not break the character's identity. Do not use the reference image as-is; redraw it naturally according to the situation and composition. The character is performing actions recognizable as activating the Summoning Jutsu, such as slamming a hand onto the ground, unfurling a scroll, or forming hand signs. Vary the pose and action for each image. Simultaneously, a massive ritual circle is spreading across the ground with black curse patterns, a circular array, and ink-like effects. A large amount of white smoke is explosively appearing. From the smoke, a giant entity contracted with the character fully emerges. The summoned being should be depicted as strongly linked to the character's worldview, personality, and design. It should not be a mere animal but possess a mythical, monstrous, mechanical, or fantastical presence. It is overwhelmingly larger than the character. Place the character in the foreground and the summoned being gigantically in the background. Use a low camera angle. Create impact like a Shonen manga spread. Add focus lines, ground destruction, flying debris, and smoke flows. Add manga-style onomatopoeia like 'Doron!!', 'Summoning Jutsu!!', or 'Gogogogo'. Add an old scroll-style information frame at the edge of the screen containing the summoned being's name, alias, and a short description. Keep the text brief. The presentation should feel like a sudden dangerous entity introduction in a manga spread, not a technical reference sheet. Use high-energy direction like 90s-2000s Jump manga. Maintain anime illustration style. High density, high contrast, dramatic lighting, and strong silhouettes. A composition that instantly catches the eye on social media.
title: Summoning Jutsu i2i Manga Prompt
description: A complex instruction set for performing image-to-image generation that transforms a reference character into a dramatic manga-style summoning scene.

She wears a short-sleeved white button-up school blouse with a collar, a dark olive-black layered ruffle skirt, and a loose blue-gray ribbon tied at the waist. Her {argument name="hair color" default="olive brown with blonde highlights and green-purple dyed streaks"} hair is shoulder length with bangs and side locks, slightly messy, catching cool overhead light. Add a large opaque square censor block over the center of her face, filled with a soft muted brown-to-pink gradient, hiding all facial features. The setting includes exactly 4 major stairwell elements: gray concrete walls, silver metal safety railings, textured steel floor panels, and one glowing emergency wall lamp near the lower left casting warm yellow light. Use dramatic cinematic anime lighting with cool blue-gray shadows, warm lamp glow, detailed line art, subtle film-grain texture, and a slightly intimate emotional mood as if she is guiding the viewer up or down the emergency stairs. Keep the composition tight, with her torso and skirt dominant in frame, one of her hands extended toward the viewer, the viewer's hand visible at bottom center, and no text or watermark.

content:
Goal: Create a dark-mode chat interface screenshot showing an AI image-generation conversation about making anime-style animated characters from photos.

Canvas: Square 768×768 image, dark charcoal background, cropped like a desktop chat app. Use subtle rounded rectangles, soft shadows, and muted gray dividers.

Layout: At the top left, display exactly 3 square thumbnail cards in a row, each with a circular portrait inside: 1) a brunette woman with shoulder-length wavy hair, 2) a blonde woman with long light hair, 3) a black-haired woman with straight long hair. Each face should be intentionally blurred or covered with a soft rectangular privacy blur. To the right beneath the thumbnails, place a rounded dark chat bubble containing the Japanese message {argument name="first message" default="あー、あとアニメ風の Ping を作りたいかも？？"}. Below, show a small gray status line on the left reading {argument name="status text" default="2m 38s作業しました ›"}, followed by a thin horizontal divider.

Generated image preview: Under the divider on the left, place exactly 1 rounded rectangular preview image showing the same 3 women transformed into polished anime/semi-realistic character art, standing shoulder-to-shoulder on a warm off-white background. Count the characters exactly: 3 women — brunette in a cream cardigan over a light blue shirt, blonde in a white top with layered necklaces, and black-haired woman in a black leather jacket. Keep all faces privacy-blurred with soft rectangular blur blocks.

Chat bubbles: Include exactly 4 visible outgoing message bubbles total: 1 top prompt bubble, 2 mid-lower bubbles, and 1 bottom-right bubble. The mid-lower first bubble should read {argument name="reaction message" default="おー超いい感じ！！\n一人一人、一枚ずつ、作る感じで"}. The mid-lower second, wider bubble should read {argument name="instruction message" default="その上で、そのまま、最後まで動く、ナレーション込みのやつでお願い"}. The bottom-right bubble should read {argument name="final message" default="作って欲しい"}. Add a small circular down-arrow button centered near the lower middle between the bubbles.

Visual style: Realistic UI screenshot, Japanese chat app aesthetic, minimal and modern, dark theme, rounded corners, graphite message bubbles, light gray text, clean spacing. The character art preview should look like high-quality anime-photo conversion rather than flat cartoon.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 top portrait thumbnails, exactly 1 generated preview image, exactly 3 anime-style women inside the preview, exactly 4 chat bubbles, and exactly 1 down-arrow button. Do not add app logos, watermarks, extra buttons, extra text, or extra people.
title: Dark Chat UI Anime Conversion Screenshot
description: Creates a dark-mode chat screenshot mockup showing three portrait inputs and an anime-style generated group preview with Japanese conversation bubbles.

content:

Analyze the scene as a {argument name="aesthetic" default="cozy daily lifestyle / casual fashion moment with a clean Korean scrapbook aesthetic"}. Each chibi should closely resemble the real person with the same hairstyle, glasses, outfit colors, and overall appearance.

expressive eyes and soft facial expressions

peace sign pose
holding coffee
casual walking
shy smile
sitting relaxed
cheerful greeting

hearts
sparkles
arrows
motion lines
stars
speech bubbles
tiny circles

full-body central subject remains the primary focus
chibi stickers surround the subject harmoniously
maintain a clean beige/light neutral background
overall style should feel premium, cozy, polished, and highly shareable like a Korean lifestyle Instagram diary post or sticker scrapbook photo.

3. Center outfit: High orange ponytail blowing to the side, bright cobalt blue cropped puffer cape/jacket over a neon yellow fitted long-sleeve top, high-waisted deep plum wide culotte skirt or cropped pants, black leggings, patterned navy-and-white socks, chunky white sneakers, fluffy white crossbody bag, playful mid-step pose with one foot lifted.

Fourth outfit: Long straight orange hair, black layered avant-garde coat over a quilted black vest and black shirt, white high-neck inner layer, long asymmetrical pleated black skirt, gray tights, black platform lace-up shoes, carrying a small black handbag, calm upright pose, gothic minimalist fashion.

5. Right outfit: Orange hair in small twin buns with long loose strands, pale blue-green turtleneck sweater, white and light gray technical hooded jacket with pockets, gray belted shorts or mini skirt over black leggings, mint leg warmers, white chunky sneakers, small gray utility pouch, one leg bent upward in a lively pose.

Keep the palette wintery with accents of navy, cream, cobalt blue, neon yellow, black, gray, mint, and plum.

content:
Create a cinematic {argument name="purpose" default="character design board for a high-budget drama film"}.

A beautiful female lead with soft expressive eyes, flawless but natural skin texture, {argument name="outfit" default="elegant silk gown"}, subtle jewelry.

Include {argument name="elements" default="full-body turnaround, expressive head studies, cinematic portrait, fabric flow breakdown, makeup detail studies, annotation notes, height scale"}.

Mood: soft studio lighting, golden Hollywood glamour aesthetic.
title: Cinematic Character Design Board
description: A prompt for creating a professional character design board for film, including full-body turnarounds and facial studies.

content:
[Layout]
Configure as a single, organized character sheet. White or very light gray background. Clean layout with easy-to-read margins. Each panel should have a dark blue or calm blue heading label. Minimal decoration, prioritizing clarity of information.

[Required Panel Configuration]
1. Full Body (Front)
2. Full Body (Side)
3. Full Body (Back)
4. Face Close-up (Front)
5. Face Close-up (45-degree angle)
6. Face Close-up (Profile)
7. Upper Body Close-up (Front)

[Content for Each Panel]
- Full Body (Front): A natural standing pose. Make face, hair, entire suit, skirt length, black high socks, and shoes visible.
- Full Body (Side): Profile standing pose. Make the side profile of the face, chest, waist, hips, leg lines, hair fall, and twintail position visible.
- Full Body (Back): Rear view. Show the parting, how the twintails look from the back, jacket back, skirt back, and leg lines.
- Face Close-up (Front): Reference shot of the face. Clearly show eyes, nose, mouth, contour, bangs, and ribbon position.
- Face Close-up (45-degree angle): Show the three-dimensionality of the face from an angle, appearance of cheeks, fall of bangs, and one twintail.
- Face Close-up (Profile): Clearly show the forehead, bridge of the nose, mouth, chin, ear position, neck connection, and side profile silhouette.
- Upper Body Close-up (Front): In addition to the face, show the jacket collar, blouse collar, shoulder shape, and silhouette from the chest to the upper waist.

[Style/Texture]
High-quality portrait expression leaning towards photorealism. Avoid excessive AI-style skin processing; keep a natural skin feel for a {argument name="subject" default="young person"}. Skin should be clean and smooth but not wax-like. {argument name="hair" default="Black hair"} should have a natural shine. The {argument name="outfit" default="suit"} should have a clean, high-quality fabric feel. Overall bright, clear, and highly informative finish.

[Excluded Items]
No tiny costume detail windows. No color palette column. No long profile section. No excessive explanatory text. No scene, background, or prop staging.

[Prohibitions]
Changing the person, making them look younger, mass-produced anime face, oversized eyes, unstable nose or chin shape, broken side profiles, changing twintail positions, changing ribbon shapes, altered hairstyles, suit color changes, unnecessary accessories, excessive skin beautification, excessive shadows, or cluttered layouts.
title: Professional Character Sheet Template
description: A comprehensive structured prompt for generating professional character reference sheets with multiple angles and close-ups to ensure character consistency.

content:
Transform the photo into a {argument name="illustration style" default="delicate minimalist hand-drawn children’s illustration"} with a soft whimsical fairy-tale aesthetic. Use simple elongated shapes, thin imperfect hand-drawn lines, flat pastel colors, minimal details, and a {argument name="character style" default="cute doll-like character style"} with rosy cheeks, tiny facial features, and simplified anatomy. Add {argument name="texture" default="subtle paper texture"}, soft pencil and pastel shading, watercolor softness, and a clean white background with small stars or sparkles.

Stylize the clothing in a playful storybook way with simplified shapes and gentle decorative details. The overall mood should feel airy, cozy, naive, and charming, like a modern Scandinavian nursery postcard or children’s book illustration. Avoid photorealism, 3D, cinematic lighting, glossy surfaces, complex shadows, realistic anatomy, and hyper-detail.

In the top-left corner, place a small white rounded square label containing the black number “1”. Background: a bright spring Kyoto street scene with traditional wooden machiya houses, stone-paved road receding into the distance, a large multi-tiered pagoda near the center-right, Kyoto Tower visible far in the distance, blue sky, mountains, and pink cherry blossoms overhead with petals drifting through the air. Foreground: on the right half, draw an elegant anime-style young woman wearing a pale yellow floral kimono with a dark navy obi, posed like a welcoming guide with one hand extended toward the city. She has vivid {argument name="hair color" default="blue"} shoulder-length wavy hair and a decorative flower hair ornament with dangling gold tassels. Her face is intentionally covered by a large opaque square censor block with a vertical blue-gray to beige gradient, centered over the face and obscuring all facial features. Text: on the upper-left and center-left, add large hand-brushed Japanese calligraphy reading {argument name="headline text" default="京都へ おこしやす"}, with “京都へ” in dark red and “おこしやす” in dark navy, plus a red swoosh underline and two small flower icons. Style: polished GPT-image anime illustration, clean line art, saturated spring colors, soft sunlight, high detail in architecture and kimono pattern, cheerful tourism-poster mood. Constraints: include exactly one numbered panel label, exactly one foreground character, exactly one face-covering square, and do not add extra captions, watermarks, speech bubbles, or additional characters.

content: Create a cinematic anime-style night scene in a horizontal 3:2 composition. Outside, show a sprawling hillside town at night with old stone houses and red-tiled roofs, warm lit windows, low garden walls, trees, and a wet winding road that starts near the foreground and snakes down through the town toward a distant bay or lake between dark mountains. The sky is deep navy blue with scattered stars, layered clouds, and a thin orange glow on the horizon after sunset. Use rich warm-and-cool contrast: golden lamplight and window glow reflecting on the rain-slick road and polished wood, against cool blue moonlit mountains and sky. Highly detailed painterly anime background art, cozy melancholic atmosphere, realistic perspective depth, soft bloom around lights, no text, no watermark, no modern vehicles or crowds.

content:
Goal: Create a black-and-white manga page about two schoolgirls arriving at a school gate under cherry blossoms, with one character partly highlighted in pale cyan and the other character’s face obscured by gray blur blocks.

Canvas: Vertical manga page, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, high-resolution monochrome screentone style with thick black panel borders, clean line art, speed lines, petals, and dramatic perspective. Use grayscale shading with only one accent color: faint cyan glow on the glasses-haired girl.

Layout: Use exactly 5 visible manga panels. Panel 1 is a large top-left scene showing a twin-tailed schoolgirl in a sailor uniform standing on a cherry blossom path with the school gate far behind her; her face is covered by a soft-edged gray rectangular blur. Panel 2 is a narrow inset at the top right showing a cropped long-haired girl in sailor uniform holding a school bag in front of her body. Panel 3 is another top-right inset beside it showing the same long-haired girl wearing a beret and glowing cyan glasses, touching the bridge of her glasses with a confident gesture. Panel 4 is a wide middle panel showing the twin-tailed girl close up, raising one hand in greeting; her face is again covered by a larger gray rectangular blur. Panel 5 is a large bottom panel showing a dramatic tilted view of an ornate school gate opening in bright light, with the long-haired girl running or turning toward the viewer and the cyan-glasses girl standing farther back on the right.

Characters: The twin-tailed girl has messy medium-length twin ponytails tied with ribbons, a sailor school uniform with bow, pleated skirt, and shy energetic body language. The long-haired girl has very long flowing hair, sailor uniform, pleated skirt, school bag in one inset, and a composed expression in the bottom panel. The second version of the long-haired girl wears a round beret, glasses glowing pale cyan, sailor uniform, dark skirt, knee socks, and has a mysterious tech-like aura.

Text content: Include exactly 3 Japanese speech/sound text elements: a speech bubble in panel 1 reading {argument name="first speech bubble" default="あ見えたー校門"}, a speech bubble in panel 4 reading {argument name="second speech bubble" default="沙羅さーん、葵ちゃん！"}, and large stylized gate-opening sound effects in panel 5 reading {argument name="sound effect text" default="ザァァァ"}. Add small handwritten manga sound effects near the girls if needed, but keep them minimal and visually secondary.

Setting and style: A spring school entrance lined with dense cherry blossom trees, falling petals, stone path, ornate iron gate, bright backlight from the gate, detailed manga hatching, screentones, speed lines, and cinematic perspective. The overall style should resemble a polished Japanese shoujo manga page, with expressive poses, delicate hair rendering, dramatic lighting, and clean page composition.

Constraints: Keep the page monochrome except for the cyan glow on the glasses character. Keep the blurred gray face blocks visible on the twin-tailed girl in panels 1 and 4. Do not add extra panels, extra main characters, watermarks, logos, or English text. Use {argument name="school uniform style" default="Japanese sailor uniforms with bow ties and pleated skirts"} and a {argument name="season" default="spring cherry blossom season"} atmosphere.
title: Cherry Blossom School Gate Manga Page
description: A structured prompt for generating a monochrome shoujo manga page with five panels, schoolgirls, cherry blossoms, Japanese speech bubbles, and a cyan-accented glasses character.

content:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the layout and gag concept, transform the ASCII-art scene into a polished full-color Japanese manga/cartoon illustration. Keep the same basic composition: a cat on top of an Ehime mikan cardboard box, striking a ramen bowl with chopsticks, with sound effects on the left and a speech bubble on the right.

Style: Convert the monochrome text-art into a lively hand-drawn anime illustration with clean ink lines, warm colors, expressive motion lines, comic impact bursts, and a white background. Make the cat cute but angry/frustrated, with flushed cheeks, open shouting mouth, and an orange sitting on its head.

Additions and details: Add a large ramen bowl in front of the cat, two chopsticks held like drumsticks, yellow impact sparks where the chopsticks hit the bowl, and a realistic cardboard fruit crate texture. Add exactly 5 loose whole oranges around the scene: 1 on the cat’s head, 1 in front of the box near center, 1 at bottom left, 1 at bottom center, and 1 at bottom right. Also show 2 printed oranges on the front of the cardboard box.

Legal-complaint theme additions: Add stacks of documents and complaint paperwork around the box, including a large pile at lower left labeled 「訴状」 with a red stamp, loose sheets in the foreground stamped 「提出済」, and a thick dark blue legal book at lower right labeled 「民事訴訟法」 with a sticky note reading 「いつまで待たせる気なの？」. Include scattered papers, tabs, envelopes, and crumpled paper balls to make the scene feel chaotic.

Text to preserve or recreate: Keep the box label as {argument name="box label" default="愛媛みかん"}. Keep two left-side star sound effects reading 「チン」. Keep the upper-right chant text as {argument name="chant text" default="マチクタビレタ〜\nマチクタビレタ〜"}. Keep the right speech bubble text as {argument name="speech bubble text" default="Grok集団訴訟\nマダ〜"}. Use bold, legible Japanese lettering, not ASCII characters.

Constraints: Do not keep the ASCII-art look; fully reinterpret it as a colorful comic illustration while retaining the original joke, layout, and main Japanese text.
title: ASCII Cat Meme to Manga Illustration
description: Transforms a Japanese ASCII cat meme into a colorful manga-style complaint-themed illustration while preserving the core layout and text.

content:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical 3D character profile poster for {argument name="character name" default="沙僧"}, inspired by an epic dark-fantasy Journey to the West return theme.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 poster, high-resolution, dramatic movie-poster composition with a thin antique gold rectangular border and worn parchment-metal texture around the edges.

Main subject: One imposing warrior-monk stands full body in the center, wading through a shallow stormy river. He is tall, broad, rugged, and dressed in layered tattered dark green and gray monk robes, wrapped belts, hanging pouches, rope ties, weathered boots, and a huge strand of black prayer beads around his neck. His face is intentionally covered by a plain centered brown square censor block, while a small ornate golden headpiece remains visible above it. His stance is powerful, one foot forward splashing water.

Weapon and props: The character thrusts one large crescent-bladed demon-subduing staff toward the viewer, breaking the frame with extreme foreshortening from the left foreground. The blade is ornate bronze-gold with engraved patterns and sharp curved hooks. In his other hand he carries one small dark wooden traveling chest. Count the main visible props exactly: 1 oversized crescent staff, 1 wooden chest, 1 large prayer-bead necklace, multiple belt pouches as costume detail.

Background: A vast mythic river landscape under storm clouds, mist, splashing water, rocks, and glowing golden energy currents. Add exactly 5 narrative vignette scenes embedded in swirling circular mist portals around the character: 1 upper-left river struggle scene with a monk-like figure in turbulent water, 1 upper-right escort scene with a master riding a white horse and attendants, 1 mid-right pilgrimage scene with two travelers walking across a barren riverbank, 1 lower-left demon-slaying battle scene in rocks and waves, and 1 far-right distant mountain-road scene suggesting the westward journey. Make the vignettes semi-transparent, painterly, and integrated into the smoky sky and water.

Text content and placement: Use vertical Chinese calligraphy and small annotation text as decorative poster typography. Include exactly 6 prominent text groups: 1 large gold brush-calligraphy title at lower left reading {argument name="main title text" default="沙僧"}; 1 small subtitle below it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="流沙河护法 / 沉稳之心"}; 1 upper-left vertical heading reading {argument name="upper left label" default="流沙河"} with small supporting text; 1 upper-right vertical heading reading "保护师父" with small supporting text; 1 middle-right vertical heading reading "挑担牵行" with small supporting text; 1 lower-right vertical heading reading "西行之路" with small supporting text. Also include a lower-left vertical heading "降妖伏魔" near the battle vignette, styled as part of the poster annotations. Keep all Chinese text legible enough to read but aged and integrated into the design.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed 3D cinematic realism, dark fantasy Chinese mythological epic, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, smoky volumetric atmosphere, gold sparks, wet fabric, rippling water, highly detailed metal engravings, weathered cloth texture, shallow depth of field on the foreground weapon, moody gray-blue and antique gold palette.

Constraints: Do not add extra characters beyond the background vignette figures. Keep the central warrior dominant, weapon breaking out toward the viewer, face covered by the brown square, and maintain the exact poster-like layout with ornate border, gold calligraphy, and 5 mist-vignette scenes.
title: Dark Fantasy Sha Seng Character Poster
description: A cinematic 3D Journey to the West character-profile poster featuring Sha Seng with an oversized staff, narrative vignettes, and Chinese calligraphy labels.

content:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical character-profile poster for a dark fantasy Journey to the West returning-heroes series, focused on {argument name="character name" default="猪八戒"}. The image should feel like a high-end 3D/photoreal fantasy movie key art poster, with the character standing full body in the foreground and breaking the poster frame with his weapon.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, aged parchment and bronze-gold color palette, ornate thin border lines at the edges, dramatic backlit clouds, dusty mountain road, ancient Chinese pagodas and pilgrimage scenery in the distance.

Main subject: One full-body stocky monk-warrior figure, Zhu Bajie inspired, centered and walking toward the viewer. He has a large round belly exposed under loose layered dark travel robes, worn cloth pants, wrapped boots, a scarf at the neck, a bundled traveler backpack over one shoulder, and two round brown gourds tied at his right side. His face is deliberately covered by a plain soft-edged brown rectangular blur mask, while the rest of the body remains sharp and detailed. He carries an oversized nine-toothed rake weapon diagonally across his body; the metal rake head rises above the upper left area and visually breaks out of the frame. The weapon should look heavy, metallic, ancient, and battle-worn.

Background layout: Behind the main figure, show layered narrative scenes embedded into the cloudy mountain landscape like glowing sepia memory panels. Use exactly 7 small story vignette areas with Chinese vertical calligraphy captions: 3 on the left side and 4 on the right side. The vignettes should depict tiny robed pilgrims, monks, soldiers, mountain paths, temple silhouettes, and journey scenes, all integrated into the environment rather than as modern boxes.

Visible text: Add a large brush-calligraphy gold title near the lower left reading {argument name="large title text" default="猪八戒"}. Add a small red seal stamp beside it. Add a small gold subtitle along the bottom left reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="西行取经｜信念之心"}. Add the 7 vertical side captions as decorative Chinese calligraphy: left side captions include {argument name="left side captions" default="一戒挑担；高老庄招亲；贪嗔痴处皆自在人"}; right side captions include {argument name="right side captions" default="天蓬下凡；流沙河收徒；同行取经；终成正果"}. Make the calligraphy legible but secondary, with thin explanatory microtext beside some captions.

Style: Ultra-detailed 3D character render blended with painterly cinematic concept art, warm golden rim light from the cloudy sky, volumetric dust, dramatic depth, intricate fabric texture, mud and wear on clothing, ornate historical Chinese fantasy design, epic mythological atmosphere. Use a muted brown, amber, charcoal, and gold palette. High contrast, sharp foreground, atmospheric background.

Constraints: Include exactly 1 central character, exactly 1 oversized nine-toothed rake, exactly 1 backpack bundle, exactly 2 hanging gourds, exactly 7 side-story vignette caption areas, and 1 large gold calligraphy title. Do not add modern UI elements, English text, watermarks, logos, or extra characters in the foreground.
title: Zhu Bajie 3D Character Poster
description: A cinematic 3D fantasy character-profile poster of Zhu Bajie from Journey to the West with ornate Chinese calligraphy and mythic story vignettes.

content:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical fantasy character archive poster for {argument name="character name" default="Tang Sanzang"}, inspired by Journey to the West, showing a holy monk returning from the Western Heaven in an epic 3D-realistic mythological style.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, dark bronze and golden color palette, dramatic stormy clouds, rocky mountain road, glowing heavenly light, high detail, volumetric fog, painterly realism, ornate Chinese fantasy film-poster composition.

Main subject: One central rider: Tang Sanzang wearing layered Buddhist monk robes in red, ochre, and gold, an ornate red-and-gold ceremonial crown, prayer beads, and a calm sacred posture. His face is replaced by a smooth soft rectangular blurred placeholder with no facial features. He rides one white horse facing forward, with elaborate leather-and-gold tack, tassels, medallions, and raised front hoof. In his left hand he holds one tall golden monk staff with multiple circular rings and decorative filigree; the staff extends upward like a heroic weapon breaking out of the composition. Wind blows the red robe to the right.

Background and layout: Surround the central figure with exactly 6 glowing parchment-like memory vignettes, each separated by flowing golden light trails and translucent irregular frame edges. The cat slowly walks past tiny ramen shops, steaming food stalls, and snow-covered bicycles parked beside wooden buildings. Soft ambient snowfall and cold winter wind create a peaceful emotional atmosphere.
The cat enters a cozy fish market tucked beneath glowing lanterns and snowy rooftops. Cinematic close-up shots of fresh salmon and tuna resting on crushed ice, warm steam rising from nearby soup stalls, snowflakes melting on wooden counters. Friendly seafood vendors wrap fresh fish while the cat carefully chooses dinner ingredients. Cozy winter ambience with soft chatter and distant train sounds.
Next, the cat stops at a small roadside sweet potato and roasted chestnut stand beside a snowy alley. Slow-motion shots of steam rising from hot roasted snacks, glowing charcoal fire, warm hands exchanging food. The cat places roasted chestnuts into a small canvas tote bag while snow continues falling softly around lantern-lit streets.
The cat walks home through quiet snow-covered Japanese backstreets at blue hour dusk. Cinematic wide shots of snowy rooftops, glowing vending machines, distant temple bells, and warm apartment windows. Footprints form behind the cat in fresh snow while soft wind carries snowflakes through narrow alleyways.
Inside a tiny wooden apartment, the cat relaxes beside a heater and takes a warm bubble bath with steam filling the room. Cozy close-ups of fluffy fur drying beside glowing lamps and knitted blankets. Snow continues falling outside the frosted window.
Final cooking sequence shows cinematic close-ups of fish frying in a pan with sizzling butter and steam, warm golden lighting filling the kitchen. The cat prepares hot soup and roasted chestnuts while snowfall glows softly outside the window. Final emotional scene of the cat sitting beside the snowy window eating dinner peacefully while warm lantern lights reflect across the icy night streets, ultra detailed winter atmosphere, Studio Ghibli inspired realism, cinematic camera movement, shallow depth of field, realistic snow and steam physics, emotional cozy storytelling, 4K animated film quality.”

content:
Using the provided reference photo as the scene base, transform it into a strange vintage children's picture-book illustration on aged yellow paper. Keep the same overall composition, building, clock tower, tent, lawn, statue position, string lights, tree, and dramatic cloud placement, but redraw everything as delicate ink line art with muted watercolor washes, paper grain, stains, scratches, and a slightly creepy whimsical storybook mood.

Style: old absurdist children's book illustration, hand-drawn pen hatching, muted olive/sepia/gray palette, worn book-page texture, imperfect perspective, whimsical grotesque faces added to ordinary objects.

Additions and changes:
- Add a hand-lettered poem in the upper-left, exactly 8 lines in two 4-line stanzas:
  “The clock has one moustache,
  and wears a green boiled egg.
  It watches the clouds
  who forget their legs.

  The tent has no secrets
  but keeps them anyway.
  The statue lost his head
  and went to buy a tea.”
- Turn the clock face on the tower into a surprised character with eyes, mouth, and one moustache; make the dome look like a green boiled egg.
- Add exactly 5 anthropomorphic clouds with worried faces and tiny dangling legs, placed around the tower and sky.
- Turn exactly 3 hanging bulbs on the string light into little worried faces.
- Make the statue headless and give it a teacup and small kettle/lantern, with a small plaque reading “HE WENT FOR TEA.”
- Add exactly 2 vertical poster banners on the building facade with silly monster faces and short readable words, one saying “EAT ART” and one saying “WHY?”
- Add exactly 2 strange figures inside or behind the tent plastic, one tall person-like figure holding tea and one shaggy creature near the right side.
- Add exactly 1 bird-like creature on the grass in the foreground with a speech bubble saying “TEA!”, plus exactly 1 small worm nearby.
- Add exactly 2 rusty cylindrical bins in the lower-right foreground, each with a face.

Constraints: preserve the architecture and layout from the reference, but make it look fully illustrated rather than photographic. No modern photorealism, no clean digital vector look, no extra poem text beyond the specified lines.

Add exactly 4 environmental motifs: 1) a traditional Japanese temple building on the mid-right, 2) a modern city skyline at bottom center, 3) a red torii gate at the lower foreground behind the central figure’s legs, and 4) tiny bird silhouettes in the white margins. Keep all secondary elements partially dissolved into blue and purple watercolor smoke.

Text layout: on the left side, large vertical Japanese brush-calligraphy reading {argument name="large Japanese title" default="五条悟"}, painted in dark navy ink. Beside it add small vertical roman text reading “SATORU GOJO” and a small red seal with Japanese characters. On the right side, add clean vertical Japanese text reading {argument name="right side slogan" default="最強の呪術師 — 五条悟"}, with a small circular emblem and the Japanese series title beneath it. On the lower left, add smaller vertical Japanese text reading {argument name="lower left quote" default="大丈夫 僕 最強だから"}, mixing black and muted red characters. Overall mood: heroic, mythic, national-poster-like propaganda energy without real-world politics, elegant manga poster design, high detail, strong central silhouette, layered ink splashes, luminous cursed energy, crisp face profile, no English headline except the small “SATORU GOJO,” no watermark, no extra characters beyond the listed vignettes.

content:
Goal: Create a detailed anime-style motion sheet for a 15-second short film about making {argument name="dish name" default="Unagi Kabayaki (3 Skewers)"}, laid out like a storyboard contact sheet with captions and production notes.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 black-background production board, high-resolution, with thin white panel borders and a hand-drawn cinematic sketch aesthetic. Use a muted sepia, charcoal, beige, and warm orange palette with glossy brown eel glaze and firelight accents.

Top header: Large white title text on the left: “UNAGI KABAYAKI (3 SKEWERS) MOTION SHEET | 15-SECOND SHORT FILM”. Small white note on the right: “Character Consistency: Same character, same hair, same outfit, same setting throughout.”

Main layout: Use exactly 15 storyboard panels arranged in a 3-row by 5-column grid. Each panel has a black timecode label in the top-left corner and a black caption strip along the bottom. The character must remain consistent throughout: {argument name="main character" default="a young anime woman with short wavy ash-brown hair, soft tired eyes, and a ruffled patterned blouse with an apron"}, cooking in {argument name="setting" default="a cozy Japanese apartment kitchen with shelves, bottles, utensils, soft window light, smoke, steam, and a tabletop charcoal grill"}. The visual style should resemble a digicam-recorded anime cooking documentary: hand-drawn ink linework, lightly watercolor-washed backgrounds, realistic food detail, subtle motion blur, warm morning light, smoke, steam, and charcoal glow.

Storyboard panels: Include exactly these 15 timed shots and captions:
1. Timecode “0:00–0:01”; character places 3 eel skewers on the grill; caption: “1. Place 3 eel skewers on the grill.”
2. Timecode “0:01–0:02”; smoke gently rises around the grill; caption: “2. Smoke rises gently.”
3. Timecode “0:02–0:03”; character brushes sauce over the eel with a basting brush; caption: “3. Brush the sauce over the eel.”
4. Timecode “0:03–0:04”; close-up of glazed skewers as sauce drips onto charcoal; caption: “4. Sauce drips onto the charcoal.”
5. Timecode “0:04–0:05”; orange flames rise beside the character; caption: “5. Flames rise up.”
6. Timecode “0:05–0:06”; character flips all 3 skewers; caption: “6. Flip all 3 skewers.”
7. Timecode “0:06–0:07”; close view of character checking the eel texture; caption: “7. Check the eel’s texture.”
8. Timecode “0:07–0:08”; character brushes on more sauce; include a small vertical beige blur block partially obscuring the upper face area; caption: “8. Brush on more sauce.”
9. Timecode “0:08–0:09”; fire flares up again with bright orange flames; caption: “9. Fire flares up again.”
10. Timecode “0:09–0:10”; character carefully rotates the skewers with focused hands; caption: “10. Rotate the skewers carefully.”
11. Timecode “0:10–0:11”; close-up of the 3 glossy caramelized eel skewers on the grill; caption: “11. The eel looks perfectly glazed.”
12. Timecode “0:11–0:12”; character plates the 3 skewers on a dish; caption: “12. Plate the 3 skewers.”
13. Timecode “0:12–0:13”; plated skewers with steam rising beautifully as the character holds the plate; caption: “13. Steam rises beautifully.”
14. Timecode “0:13–0:14”; character picks up one skewer and brings it toward her mouth; caption: “14. Pick up one skewer.”
15. Timecode “0:14–0:15”; close-up of the first bite with a beige rectangular blur block obscuring much of the face while the skewer enters her mouth; caption: “15. Bite and react in surprise.” Add a smaller orange parenthetical line below: “(Instant expression of surprise as it enters her mouth.)”

Bottom production notes: Beneath the 15 panels, add a black notes band divided into exactly 6 labeled areas: 5 text columns plus 1 duration box.
Column 1 title: “CAMERA STYLE (DIGICAM LOOK)” with 6 bullets: “Handheld digital camera aesthetic”; “Early 2000s compact camera feel”; “Slight autofocus hunting”; “Natural exposure bloom”; “Realistic digital noise and grain”; “Subtle motion blur and shake”; “Casual, home video atmosphere”.
Column 2 title: “ATMOSPHERE & LIGHTING” with 5 bullets: “Warm morning sunlight”; “Soft window light and shadows”; “Smoke, steam, and fire glow”; “Cozy Japanese apartment kitchen”; “Nostalgic and emotional tone”.
Column 3 title: “COOKING POINTS” with 6 bullets: “Unagi kabayaki (3 skewers)”; “Sweet soy glaze (tare sauce)”; “Charcoal grilling”; “Rich smoke and aroma”; “ASMR cooking sounds”; “Glossy, caramelized finish”.
Column 4 title: “CHARACTER EXPRESSION” with 5 bullets: “Calm and focused at first”; “Gradually softer and warmer”; “Subtle emotions while cooking”; “Genuine happiness in the end”; “Surprise and delight at the first bite”.
Column 5 title: “OTHER NOTES” with 6 bullets: “Maintain exact same character throughout”; “Same hair, outfit, and setting”; “No toppings or garnishes”; “Only 3 skewers on the plate”; “Realistic Japanese home cooking”; “Photorealistic cinematic style”.
Column 6: A boxed duration badge reading “DURATION” at top, large number “15”, and “SECONDS” below.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 eel skewers whenever the dish is visible. Keep all text in clean white sans-serif type on black labels. Do not add extra panels, extra skewers, unrelated food, logos, watermarks, or modern UI elements. Maintain the same character, same outfit, same kitchen, and same warm sketchy anime documentary style throughout.
title: Unagi Kabayaki Motion Sheet
description: Creates a 15-panel anime storyboard production sheet for a short film about grilling three unagi kabayaki skewers.

content:
Goal: Create a 15-panel cinematic cooking storyboard showing a young woman making tamagoyaki in a rustic kitchen, with each panel labeled by timestamp and step caption.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 contact-sheet layout, exactly 5 columns by 3 rows, thin white dividers between panels. Each panel has small white timestamp text at the top-left and a white step caption with a black shadow at the bottom-left.

Subject details: A delicate anime-inspired young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="soft ash-blonde wavy bob hair"}, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="frilly vintage beige floral blouse with lace ruffles and a dark ribbon bow at the collar"}. She cooks at a wooden counter in an old cozy kitchen filled with shelves, jars, utensils, plants, warm sunlight, and atmospheric dust. Her face should be softly obscured or blurred in all panels for privacy, while hands, food, cookware, and clothing remain detailed.

Visual style: Photorealistic cinematic anime realism, warm golden-brown color grade, shallow depth of field, moody natural window light, textured rustic kitchen background, realistic steam, oil shine, egg texture, and handheld film-still feeling.

Panel sequence: Include exactly 15 discrete panels with these visible labels and actions:
1. timestamp “0:00-0:01”, caption “1. Crack egg into bowl”, she cracks an egg into a glass bowl on the counter.
2. timestamp “0:01-0:02”, caption “2. Whisk eggs gently”, she gently whisks yellow eggs in the glass bowl.
3. timestamp “0:02-0:03”, caption “3. Add seasoning carefully”, she sprinkles seasoning into the bowl while holding the whisk.

5. timestamp “0:04-0:05”, caption “5. Place pan on stove”, she sets a rectangular tamagoyaki pan on a stovetop.
6. timestamp “0:05-0:06”, caption “6. Spread oil across pan”, she brushes oil across the rectangular pan.
7. timestamp “0:06-0:07”, caption “7. Pour egg mixture”, she pours egg mixture from the glass bowl into the pan.
8. timestamp “0:07-0:08”, caption “8. Start rolling with chopsticks”, she begins rolling the egg sheet with chopsticks.
9. timestamp “0:08-0:09”, caption “9. Continue rolling”, she continues shaping the rolled omelette with chopsticks.

11. timestamp “0:10-0:11”, caption “11. Shape into rectangle”, she shapes the tamagoyaki into a neat rectangle with chopsticks.
12. timestamp “0:11-0:12”, caption “12. Steam rises”, the pan releases a dramatic cloud of steam in front of her.
13. timestamp “0:12-0:13”, caption “13. Plate finished tamagoyaki”, the finished rectangular golden tamagoyaki sits on a plate on the counter.
14. timestamp “0:13-0:14”, caption “14. Pick up with chopsticks”, she lifts a bite-sized piece with chopsticks.
15. timestamp “0:14-0:15”, caption “15. Take a bite and smile”, close-up of her bringing the tamagoyaki to her mouth with chopsticks, face still obscured.

The poster is leaning against a graffiti-covered wall and reads “CRISTIANO RONALDO: Lenda Viva” in large retro comic lettering, with an old trading-card style strip on the left labeled “ABE” and “5022.” The player’s face should be intentionally obscured with a soft square blur, while his body is sharply rendered in dynamic mid-run pose, one hand raised, dramatic golden backlight exploding from the torn poster opening.
