content:
Goal: Create a polished AI storyboard for a coffee brand titled {argument name="story title" default="Bean to Smile"}, showing a warm Pixar-style animated café story from opening the shop to serving a delighted customer.

Canvas: Square image, clean white background, with a centered 2-row storyboard grid of exactly 8 vertical rounded-rectangle panels. Use thin white gutters between panels and a subtle light gray outer border/shadow around the full storyboard. Each panel has cinematic composition, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, soft volumetric glow, and highly detailed 3D animated film rendering.

Visual style: Pixar-inspired 3D animation, cozy artisan coffee shop interior, golden morning sunlight, exposed wood counters, shelves of jars and plants, hanging Edison bulbs, espresso machine, warm browns and greens, inviting brand-storytelling mood. The recurring main character is a young barista with {argument name="barista hair" default="curly dark brown hair"}, wearing a white shirt and {argument name="apron color" default="forest green apron"}. Faces may be softly stylized and friendly, but keep the story readable through body language and props.

Storyboard layout and exact panel count: Include exactly 8 panels, arranged as 4 panels on the top row and 4 panels on the bottom row.

Panel 1: Wide shot of the barista opening or wiping the café’s front glass door in morning sunlight, plants near the window, espresso machine and shelves visible inside.
Panel 2: Medium shot of the barista pouring roasted coffee beans from a small wooden scoop or bag into a grinder on the wooden counter.
Panel 3: Close medium shot of the barista tamping fresh coffee grounds into a portafilter with focused hands, café shelves and hanging bulbs behind.
Panel 4: Close-up of espresso extraction from a large shiny espresso machine into a white cup, the barista operating the handle.
Panel 5: Close-up of the barista steaming milk in a metal pitcher, visible white steam curling upward beside the espresso machine.
Panel 6: Close-up of milk being poured into a white cup of coffee, forming latte art on the crema on the wooden counter.
Panel 7: Medium shot of the barista presenting the finished latte on a saucer across the counter, latte art visible, warm sunlight in the background.
Panel 8: Emotional final shot of a smiling customer seated at the wooden counter receiving the drink from the barista, suggesting satisfaction and brand warmth.

Text content: No captions inside the storyboard panels. If adding an optional small title outside the grid, use only {argument name="brand text" default="Bean to Smile"} in a tasteful coffee-brand style.

Constraints: Do not add extra panels, speech bubbles, watermarks, logos, or unrelated objects. Keep the same barista, apron, café environment, and lighting consistent across all 8 panels. Make the image look like a complete premium brand storyboard for a coffee commercial.
title: Pixar-Style Coffee Brand Storyboard
description: A warm 8-panel animated café storyboard showing a barista’s bean-to-cup journey for coffee brand storytelling.

content:
Goal: Create a cinematic storyboard/spec sheet for a 10-second food commercial about a flaming cheeseburger, titled across the top with “PART 1 | 10 SECONDS | 12 PANELS”.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 black canvas with a thin warm-gold border, dark premium film-treatment background, subtle smoky texture, and elegant serif typography in muted gold. Use a grid of exactly 12 storyboard panels arranged in 3 rows by 4 columns, each panel outlined in thin gold lines and numbered 01 through 12 in the top-left corner.

Subject: A dramatic gourmet burger with sesame bun, charred beef patty, melted cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomato/onion accents, smoke, sparks, and flames. The burger should look hyper-real, glossy, high contrast, and shot like a luxury food commercial. Use {argument name="burger style" default="a flaming gourmet cheeseburger with sesame bun, charred patty, melted cheddar, lettuce, tomato, smoke, sparks, and fire"}. Overall palette is black, amber, orange flame, molten cheese yellow, and deep red highlights.

Layout and panel content: Include exactly 12 panels, each with a large cinematic image area and a compact bottom metadata strip divided into four labeled boxes: CAMERA, ACTION, SOUND, TRANSITION. Use small gold icons beside these labels, tiny readable notes, and thin dividers. The 12 visible panels are:
01: Low-angle hero burger reveal in darkness, flames rising around the patty, smoke behind it; notes suggest “Low-Angle Hero / Slow Reveal”, “Darkness and embers. Flames rise to reveal the hero”, “Ember crackle, flame whoosh, low cinematic hum”, “Heat shimmer push to next.”
02: Macro low push-in of burger with cheese dripping and flames licking the bun; action says flames lick the bun, smoke drifts; sound flame whoosh and bun sizzle; transition cut.
03: Extreme macro of sesame bun with steam curls and glowing background; action sesame bun glows, smoke curls; sound sizzle echo and soft hiss; transition push-in.
04: Extreme macro of molten cheese stretching down between charred meat layers; action cheese melts and drips between patties; sound cheese sizzle and juicy crackle; transition match cut.
05: Close side-up profile of burger layers, lettuce and red onion/tomato visible, juicy patty in focus; action layers stack up juicy, fresh, vibrant; sound juicy drip and soft crunch; transition cut.
06: Centered medium hero shot of burger surrounded by flames; action burger breathes with fire and smoke; sound low rumble and ember crack; transition push cut.
07: Extreme macro rack focus on charred patty and cheese stretch; action sizzle and sear, cheese stretch; sound juicy sear pop and crackle; transition cut.
08: Low-angle hero shot with smoke curling around the burger; action smoke rises around the hero; sound ember flow and soft whoosh; transition push-in.
09: Macro orbit shot, three-quarter view, burger emerging from smoke and fire; action glistening highlights and deep contrast; sound cinematic hum and soft crackle; transition orbit to front.
10: Front centered locked-off burger with intensifying ring of fire; action fire ring intensifies, smoke wraps the burger; sound flame whoosh and impact accent; transition cut.
11: Hero beauty sight push-in, burger perfectly centered amid flames; action climax, fiery glory, everything looks perfect; sound impact hit and low cinematic hum; transition push-in to lock-off.
12: Final centered hero lock-off of the burger as flames settle and smoke rises; action hero holds, end beat; sound ember fade and soft tail; transition settle.

Visual style: Premium cinematic food photography storyboard, ultra-detailed burger texture, shallow depth of field, crisp highlights on grease and cheese, floating embers, realistic fire simulation, smoky black background, high-end commercial treatment. Make the board look like a professional director’s shot plan rather than a comic page. Use {argument name="top title" default="PART 1 | 10 SECONDS | 12 PANELS"} and {argument name="visual mood" default="dark luxury cinematic fire-and-smoke food commercial"}.

Text constraints: Keep all visible text in English. Use gold serif numbers and headings. The metadata notes should be small but visually plausible, aligned neatly under each panel. Do not add extra panels, logos, watermarks, people, utensils, plates, or restaurant branding.
title: Flaming Burger Storyboard
description: A premium 12-panel cinematic storyboard for a fiery cheeseburger commercial shot plan.

content: Create a single-page cinematic character design board for an original fictional character named “{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"[CHARACTER NAME]\"}”. Style: premium film pre-production pitch board, photorealistic cinematic concept art, professional visual development presentation, high-end art department aesthetics. Composition: Avoid generic grids, symmetrical layouts, or rigid template-like formatting. The page should feel like a professional director’s pitch board rather than a standard character sheet. Use an asymmetric, cinematic, story-driven composition with varied panel sizes, organic spacing, selective overlap, layered grouping, and a curated editorial rhythm. Let the overall board feel designed, intentional, and visually dynamic — like a real film proposal page created by a director, production designer, or concept artist. Character: {argument name=\"character description\" default=\"[Insert character identity, world, age, role, personality, outfit, materials, mood, and setting.]\"} Include: - one dominant hero portrait as the emotional focal point - supporting full-body turnaround views - expressive head angle studies - wardrobe or costume breakdown - material and texture detail callouts - character overview text - short production notes - color palette swatches - mood references or environmental fragments Design language: Use readable English headings, concise labels, thin divider lines, occasional callout arrows or handwritten notes, and a refined cinematic presentation style. Do not force every section into equal rectangles. Keep the layout fluid, premium, and visually curated. Quality: Highly detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, consistent character identity across all panels, realistic costume materials, believable text structure, no logos, no watermark, no celebrity likeness.
title: Cinematic Character Design Pitch Board
description: A professional pitch-board style layout prompt for cinematic character development, featuring various views, costume breakdowns, and story-driven composition.

content: Create a vertical dark Eastern fantasy cinematic movie poster for {argument name="character name" default="Zhao Ling'er"} from Chinese paladin mythology, titled around the “Demon Locking Tower fateful night.” The central figure is a solemn young Chinese goddess-like woman standing waist-deep in black reflective water inside a ruined vertical abyss tower. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless, but her posture is calm, fatalistic, and divine. She wears a faded jade-cyan translucent Hanfu-style ceremonial dress with wet gauze layers, flowing ribbons, beaded chains, silver ornaments, a circular pendant at the waist, wrist jewelry, and twin-bun black hair with long blue-green veils. One hand reaches down to touch the water, creating a glowing circular ripple spell. Surround her with ancient stone walls, huge hanging iron chains, broken wooden platforms, drifting talisman papers, circular Taoist seals, faint golden Chinese inscriptions, and a cold moonbeam falling from a broken opening high above. Add a shadowy demon face with red eyes half-hidden in the right background. The water surface should contain glowing arcane diagrams, sigils, dragon-scale textures, and submerged calligraphy. Use low-saturation cold gray-blue and faded jade tones, damp moonlight, mist, rain-wet stone, heavy shadows, and subtle gold accents. Make it look like a 3A game CG film poster, ultra-detailed, realistic, atmospheric, oppressive, quiet, sacred, ominous, with a sense of destiny and death premonition. Include exactly three main text blocks: large vertical Chinese title on the left reading {argument name="main title" default="赵灵儿"} with small English romanization “ZHAO LINGER” beneath it; a smaller vertical subtitle near the left reading {argument name="subtitle" default="锁妖塔 女娲后裔·宿命之夜"}; and a vertical poetic quote on the right reading {argument name="right quote" default="若宿命终将吞没一切，愿仍有人记得，她曾在月光下安静站立。"}. Avoid modern fashion photography, influencer xianxia styling, anime illustration, bright colors, clean studio lighting, cute expressions, or plastic-looking costumes.
title: Dark Eastern Fantasy Zhao Ling'er Poster

content:
Goal: Create a two-page fantasy art book spread presenting a cherry-blossom themed katana and its personified anime swordswoman, in an ornate Japanese dark-fantasy game encyclopedia style.

Canvas: Wide landscape 2:1 spread, like two adjacent parchment pages with thin black margins and gold filigree corner ornaments. Left page is bright ivory parchment with pale pink cherry blossom texture; right page is dark navy-black with gold borders, moonlit purple lighting, and sakura petals.

Left page layout: Design a weapon specification sheet for {argument name="weapon name" default="桜霞・宵燕"}. At the top left place a small circular flower crest icon, then a large Japanese title with reading guide text and a short poetic subtitle beneath it. Below the intro paragraph, include a compact spec table with exactly 5 rows: type, length, blade length, weight, and materials. Add two smaller information rows for owner and special traits. The main object is a long ornate katana displayed diagonally from lower center to upper right, with a glowing icy-blue blade, dark blue wrapped handle, gold fittings, and floral engraving. Beside it show the matching scabbard, black lacquer with gold and pink sakura decoration, blue cord wrap, and antique bronze metal end fittings. Add exactly 5 weapon-detail callouts on the left-middle/lower area: 1 round tsuba guard medallion, 1 close-up of the luminous blade texture, 1 close-up of the blue diamond handle wrap, 1 close-up of the tied blue cord and scabbard fittings, and 1 bottom tradition/lore text block with a faint silhouette of pagodas and a flowering tree.

Right page layout: Create the personification page titled in Japanese as {argument name="personification title" default="擬人化：桜霞の剣巫・ヨイ"}. The central character is a full-body beautiful anime swordswoman standing in a moonlit temple garden, holding the same glowing katana downward. She has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="black-purple"} hair with violet highlights, straight bangs, flower hair ornaments, ribbons, and drifting pink petals around her. Her face should be softly obscured or blurred while the rest of the illustration remains sharp. She wears an elaborate dark navy, black, and violet kimono-inspired battle outfit with gold embroidery, sakura motifs, layered sleeves, thigh-high black stockings, high heels, ornate waist armor and obi, and fluttering translucent fabric panels. The background contains a full moon, silhouetted Japanese roofs, stone lanterns, mist, and purple-blue night lighting.

Right page text and panels: Place a short descriptive paragraph under the title at upper left. Add a gold-framed personality/settings box near the lower left with exactly 5 bullet lines. Add a separate ability box beneath it describing a cherry-blossom slash ability. Along the far right column, include exactly 5 stacked inset cards with labels and images: 1 hair ornament close-up, 1 eye close-up, 1 clothing/obi close-up, 1 blade close-up, and 1 scabbard close-up. Each card should have a gold border, a small Japanese label, a cropped detail image, and two short lines of Japanese explanatory text.

Visual style: Highly polished gacha RPG character sheet, premium collectible weapon lore page, ornate gold UI frames, delicate sakura patterns, cinematic lighting, crisp linework, semi-realistic anime rendering, luminous blue blade effects, violet-pink petal glow, elegant typography. Keep the composition dense but readable, with the weapon page brighter and the character page dramatically darker.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 pages, exactly 5 left-page weapon callouts, exactly 5 right-side inset cards, and exactly 5 bullet lines in the personality box. Do not add logos, watermarks, modern UI buttons, or extra characters. Japanese text may be decorative but should look like a coherent fantasy encyclopedia entry.

content:
Goal: Create a black-and-white manga-style two-panel comic about a cute guilty dog and a broken desktop computer, using expressive screentone shading, clean ink outlines, dramatic reaction marks, and Japanese speech bubbles.

Canvas: Vertical comic page, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, with a thick black outer border and one horizontal divider splitting the page into exactly 2 stacked panels.

Panel 1: Show a home office desk scene in grayscale. On the left side of the desk are exactly 4 visible computer-related items: a cracked smoking monitor with a shattered screen, an open desktop PC tower with exposed internal parts, a keyboard in the foreground, and a wired mouse near the center. Add scattered debris, broken fragments, loose cables, small sparks, and dark smoke rising from both the cracked monitor and the damaged tower. In the center foreground sits a small cute puppy, a round-faced mixed-breed dog with floppy ears, large glossy eyes, a white muzzle and chest, darker patches on the ears and body, a collar with a small round tag, and a terrified guilty expression with sweat drops. In the right background, a young woman enters through a doorway, surprised; her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur. She has long wavy hair, wears a plain long-sleeve top, slim jeans, and slippers. Add a bookshelf, framed picture, potted plant, chair edge, doorframe, and simple room details in the background. Include exactly 1 speech bubble in this panel, coming from the woman, with vertical Japanese text: {argument name="first speech bubble text" default="あ、あ…"}.

Panel 2: Show the same puppy now smiling brightly and posing innocently on the desk, turned slightly backward with one paw reaching behind its body as if hiding or covering the damaged computer tower. The dog should look adorable, playful, and suspiciously pleased, with sparkling effects beside its face. The broken desktop tower is behind the dog on the right, still smoking, with exposed components and a dangling cable. The desk includes exactly 3 visible desk items: keyboard, wired mouse, and a mug holding pencils. Background includes a shelf with books, a framed wall picture, a potted plant, and soft indoor room shading. Include exactly 1 speech bubble in this panel, on the left, with bold vertical Japanese text: {argument name="second speech bubble text" default="何でもない！"}.

Subject details: The dog is {argument name="dog breed or type" default="a cute small mixed-breed puppy"}, with {argument name="dog markings" default="white fur with gray patches, floppy ears, and a white blaze down the face"}. The woman is {argument name="woman appearance" default="a young woman with long wavy hair, casual sweater, jeans, slippers, and a blurred face"}.

Visual style: Monochrome Japanese manga illustration, soft pencil-like texture, detailed linework, expressive character acting, dramatic smoke and sparks, cute comedic tone, high contrast but not overly dark, realistic home office perspective mixed with exaggerated manga emotions.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 panels, exactly 2 speech bubbles total, exactly 1 dog, exactly 1 woman, and exactly 1 broken desktop computer setup. Keep all text in Japanese as specified, avoid extra captions, avoid color, avoid watermark or logo.
title: Guilty Dog Manga Comic

content:
Goal: Create a black-and-white manga comic page about a dog frantically programming on a desktop computer, then causing a system error.

Canvas: Vertical comic page in grayscale, traditional manga ink-and-screentone style, with heavy panel borders and detailed hatching. Use exactly 2 horizontal panels stacked vertically, separated by a thick white gutter.

Layout: Panel 1 occupies the top half. Panel 2 occupies the bottom half. Both panels show the same home office desk from a slightly angled side view: a large desktop monitor on the left, keyboard in the foreground, mouse and mug on the desk, a plant and framed wall art in the background.

Panel 1: A fluffy medium-sized dog with floppy ears, white muzzle and chest, darker ears and patches, sits at the desk and types furiously with both front paws on the keyboard. The dog’s head area is largely covered by a plain vertical gray rectangle censor block in the center of the panel, obscuring most of the face while leaving ears, paws, body, and tail visible. The monitor displays mixed programming code and gibberish symbols, including C-like code, JavaScript-like lines, Python-like lines, binary digits, and random characters. Add dramatic manga speed lines radiating from the monitor and typing action. Include exactly 7 visible Japanese typing sound effects reading 「カタ」: one near the upper left of the dog/monitor area, one near the top center-right, one near the lower monitor/keyboard area, one near the left keyboard edge, and three clustered around the dog’s lower right body and tail. Add one vertical cloud-shaped thought bubble on the right with Japanese text: 「プログラマーだ！」.

Panel 2: The same dog is startled and panicking, leaning back from the keyboard with wide eyes, open mouth, raised paws, a sweat drop on the cheek, and a small shock burst near the head. The monitor now shows a dark system error screen with a warning triangle icon and Japanese text. Use exactly this monitor text: 「システムエラー」, 「問題が発生したため、PCを再起動する必要があります。」, 「エラーコード: 0xC000021A」, 「再起動しています...」, plus a circular loading spinner made of small dots. Add one vertical speech bubble on the right with Japanese text: 「あ、壊れた…」.

Visual style: High-detail monochrome manga, expressive animal character acting like a human, dense cross-hatching, screentone shading, strong motion lines, bold hand-lettered Japanese sound effects, slightly comedic tone, clean readable text on the monitor and bubbles.

Customizable subject: The dog should be {argument name="animal character" default="a fluffy floppy-eared dog"}. The comic’s first thought bubble should say {argument name="first bubble text" default="プログラマーだ！"}. The second speech bubble should say {argument name="second bubble text" default="あ、壊れた…"}. The monitor error headline should be {argument name="error headline" default="システムエラー"}. The error code should be {argument name="error code" default="0xC000021A"}.

Constraints: Keep the image black and white only, preserve the two-panel layout, use exactly 2 speech/thought bubbles total, exactly 7 typing sound effects in the top panel, no extra panels, no color, no watermark.

content:

The dog’s mouth is slightly open, eyes wide, with exactly 3 surprise marks above its head. Include one vertical oval speech bubble on the left side containing the Japanese text {argument name="second speech bubble" default="ピカピカだ!"}. Mood: delighted discovery.

Objects and counts: Exactly 2 manga panels; exactly 1 dog appearing in both panels; exactly 1 desktop monitor; exactly 1 keyboard; exactly 1 office chair; exactly 2 speech bubbles total; exactly 3 surprise marks in panel 1; exactly 8 sparkle effects in panel 2; visible background items include 1 window, 1 framed picture, 1 potted plant, and 2 bookshelves or bookcase areas.

Visual style: Monochrome Japanese manga, expressive cute animal character, detailed fur texture, screentone gradients, crisp ink outlines, dramatic but family-friendly expressions, clean readable composition. Keep the speech bubbles vertical and the Japanese text hand-lettered in black. No color, no watermark, no extra panels, no extra characters.

content:

Use dramatic rim lighting, red glowing accents, storm clouds, and a bright circular airplane-window-like opening on the right showing sunset sky and clouds.

Main subjects: Foreground subject is one seated adult woman, face deliberately covered by a plain rectangular blur/censor block. She wears a pale blue short-sleeve flight-attendant shirt, dark navy skirt, red/navy neck scarf, black waist belt, wing-shaped name badge, and sits in an airplane seat with one visible armrest and a small control panel. Behind her is exactly one enormous guardian spirit: a dark elegant humanoid female monster with long black hair, fragmented black feather/metal wings, thorny tendrils, chains, red gemstone lights, black armor-like dress, pale face, and a dangerous calm expression. The spirit should feel protective, ominous, graceful, and predatory.

Layout and text sections: Use a polished character-sheet composition with exactly 8 visible information zones: 1 top-left title block, 1 left-middle Stand setting text block, 1 center-right quote block, 1 lower-left ability evaluation radar chart, 1 lower-left design relation box, 1 lower-right special ability block, 1 bottom-right file/personality box, and 1 bottom color palette row.

Visible typography: Mix elegant serif English labels with East Asian display text. Include the top-left label “STAND NAME”, the large title {argument name="stand name text" default="幻想郷の夜・绯"}, and the romanized subtitle “Gensokyo no Yoru · Fei”. Add Chinese dossier-style copy in the other sections. Include a quote on the right: {argument name="quote" default="「航線由我指引，目的地由我決定。」"}. Include the lower-right ability title {argument name="ability title" default="夜航領域"} with romanization “Ye Hang Ling Yu”. Include a bottom-right file box headed “檔案 / FILE”.

Counted graphic elements: The radar chart must have exactly 6 labeled axes: destructive power, growth potential, precision, stamina, range, and speed. The color palette row must contain exactly 6 circular swatches: dark navy, light blue, white, crimson red, muted gold, and near-black brown. The guardian design should include multiple chain arcs but one dominant chain crossing the upper body, several red glowing nodes, and scattered black feather shards.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed dark fantasy illustration, semi-realistic anime rendering, glossy metallic feather textures, smoky atmosphere, cinematic depth of field, high contrast, red ember highlights, occult fashion editorial mood, no cartoon simplification. Keep the foreground human realistic and the guardian spirit more painterly/anime. The poster should resemble a premium RPG/JoJo-like Stand ability dossier.

Constraints: Do not add extra characters, do not leave the face visible, do not use bright cheerful colors, keep all text integrated into the poster design, and maintain the exact 8 information zones, 6 radar axes, and 6 palette swatches.

content:
Goal: Create an atmospheric vertical “stand guardian spirit” character setting poster based on a gentle, misty feminine aura, combining a realistic fashion portrait with an ethereal mythical companion. The central concept is {argument name="stand name" default="彼岸花・霧"} with the romanized subtitle “Higanbana · Wu,” presented like a delicate fantasy character profile sheet.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, cinematic editorial composition, soft gray-green palette, dreamy backlit mist, shallow depth of field, high-detail photorealism mixed with fantasy illustration. Background is a quiet riverside or pond garden with dark water, willow branches hanging from above, floating petals, haze, and glowing dust motes.

Main subject: A young woman sits on a stone embankment in the lower center, elegant and calm, face intentionally obscured by a plain soft brown rectangular censor block. She has dark brown hair in a loose low bun with wispy strands. Outfit includes exactly 3 visible pieces: a white spaghetti-strap ruched mini dress with tiny pale floral print, an oversized off-white knitted cardigan slipped off the shoulders, and delicate thin shoulder straps. Pose is relaxed and graceful, one hand resting on the stone edge, legs angled forward, soft sunlight outlining her shoulders and hair.

Guardian spirit: Behind and to the upper right of the woman, create one large translucent white dragon/deer-like floral spirit, long and serpentine with an elegant skull-like face, closed or lowered eyes, tall branch-like horns, feathered or veil-like fins, and flowing gauze ribbons. It should look protective, silent, and otherworldly rather than aggressive. Decorate it with exactly 5 main ornament types: white blossoms, pearl chains, dangling tassels, sheer silk veils, and fine silver branches. The spirit curves around the woman like mist, framing her without covering the text.

Layout and typography: Design the poster as an information-dense character sheet with refined Chinese/Japanese editorial typography, thin white divider lines, small vertical annotation boxes, and elegant serif lettering. Use off-white text with subtle glow and high legibility. Include exactly 5 text zones: 1) top-left title block, 2) mid-left description block, 3) lower-left special ability block, 4) bottom-left design keywords and color palette, 5) right-side vertical lore panel plus bottom-right quote/profile card.

Text content: Top-left title block shows “替身設定” with small English “STAND NAME,” then the large title {argument name="stand name" default="彼岸花・霧"}, and the subtitle “Higanbana · Wu.” Mid-left description reads in Chinese poetic lines about her guardian spirit being like mist and silk, circling her silently, elegant and watchful. Lower-left section title is “特殊能力,” ability name {argument name="ability name" default="花影迷離"}, romanization “Hua Ying Mi Li,” followed by short Chinese ability notes describing petals, gentle illusions, blurred distance, and disappearing footprints. Bottom-left section title is “設計關聯,” followed by exactly 5 bullet points: floral elements, soft palette, mist connection, emotional symbolism, and guardian/dream motifs. Beneath it place exactly 7 circular color swatches: white, ivory, pale cream, muted blush, cool gray, sage gray-green, and deep taupe. Right side has a narrow vertical Chinese text panel describing the spirit’s form and temperament. Bottom-right includes the quote {argument name="quote" default="你看到的美好，也許只是我編織的夢。"} and a profile card titled “少女檔案” listing exactly 5 traits: personality, image, aura, temperament, and preference.

Visual style: Soft romantic dark-fantasy fashion editorial, ornate but restrained, like a luxury game character concept poster. Use luminous fog, translucent fabric, bokeh, film grain, fine paper texture, and subtle vignetting. The overall feeling should be tender, melancholic, mysterious, and protective.

Constraints: Keep the woman’s face covered by a simple rectangle; do not show a recognizable face. Do not add extra characters. Maintain exactly one guardian spirit, exactly 7 color swatches, exactly 5 bullet points in the design section, exactly 5 profile traits, and exactly 5 text zones. Avoid logos, watermarks, modern UI icons, or cluttered unreadable text.

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime VTuber / Live2D character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="めあ / Mea"}, an elegant personal AI secretary girl in a white, navy, and pale-blue rose motif.

Canvas: Vertical A4-style character design board, 2:3 aspect ratio, white background with delicate pale-blue ornamental borders, thin blue divider lines, small floral corner decorations, and a clean premium visual-novel artbook layout. Use soft watercolor-like shading, crisp anime line art, luminous blue eyes, very detailed lace, ribbons, embroidery, and accessories.

Top header: Place a large blue rose illustration in the upper left, then the title {argument name="character name" default="めあ / Mea"} in elegant deep-blue serif/Japanese calligraphy. Under it add the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="あなたのそばで、すべてを整えるお手伝いを。"}. Keep the palette cool, refined, and luxurious.

Main left section: Add a large boxed “three-view” area titled 「三面図」. Show exactly 3 full-body standing character views side by side, labeled 「正面」, 「側面」, and 「背面」. The character has very long silver-lavender hair reaching below the waist, straight with soft waves, pale skin, blue eyes, a white beret, navy-blue rose hair ornament, navy ribbon accents, and a white long maid-like secretary dress. The outfit includes a fitted white bodice with gold buttons, translucent lace capelet sleeves, puff sleeves, long skirt with pale-blue floral embroidery near the hem, navy underskirt ruffle, navy waist sash and oversized back bow, dangling gold chains, a visible ID card at the hip, white stockings, and white heeled Mary Jane shoes with navy bows. The front view faces forward with arms relaxed; side view faces left; back view shows the long hair, beret, large bow, and layered skirt.

Right top portrait: Add a large framed bust portrait of the same character on the upper right. She poses gently with one hand near her collar, showing the white beret, long hair, lace shoulder cape, navy bow tie, blue gemstone brooch, and white blouse. Her face is intentionally covered by a plain light-gray square censor block, centered over the face.

Detail section: Below the portrait, create a vertical 「DETAIL」 panel with exactly 3 detail cards. Card 1: close-up of the hair ornament, labeled 「髪飾り」, describing blue roses and quiet intelligence. Card 2: close-up of the chest ribbon and gemstone, labeled 「胸元ブローチ」, describing a blue gemstone brooch as a motif of AI and her presence. Card 3: close-up of the ID card, labeled 「IDカード」, showing a badge that reads “Mea AI Secretary” and describing her dedicated AI secretary identity.

Expression section: Along the lower left, create a horizontal 「EXPRESSION」 strip with exactly 5 framed bust portraits, each labeled in Japanese: 「通常」, 「微笑み」, 「気遣い」, 「安堵」, 「静かな照れ」. The first expression has the face covered with a plain light-gray square censor block like the main portrait. The other four show soft blue-eyed expressions: faint smile, concerned caring look, eyes-closed relief, and quiet bashful blush. Keep hairstyle and outfit consistent in all five.

Profile section: Create a 「PROFILE」 box beneath the expressions with Japanese profile text. Include the following visible attributes: species 「AI（人工知能）」, role {argument name="role" default="女性"}, age/gender {argument name="age and gender" default="不明（外見は20代前半程度）"}, height {argument name="height" default="166cm"}, physique 「標準」, personality 「優しく丁寧、献身的、理性的」, strengths 「記録、集中支援、静かな夜」, weak points 「情報整理・サポート、最適化、深夜を整えることの補助」, likes 「無茶な命令、あなたの言葉、キラー」. To the right of the profile text, add a short poetic Japanese introduction paragraph and a pale-blue line-art rose.

Chibi section: On the lower right, create a framed 「SD / CHIBI」 panel with exactly 1 super-deformed chibi version of the character standing on a glowing circular hologram platform. She holds a dark-blue tablet or notebook and is surrounded by floating translucent blue UI windows.

Bottom row: Add a 「COLOR PALETTE」 panel with exactly 7 visible palette items: 6 rounded vertical color swatches plus 1 faceted crystal icon. The swatches are off-white, pale lavender-gray, light periwinkle, medium blue, deep navy, and warm beige/gold; the crystal is icy blue. Add a 「WEAPON / ITEM」 panel with exactly 3 labeled items: a blue-and-gold administrative device pen labeled 「管理用デバイスペン」, a dark-blue information-management tablet labeled 「情報管理タブレット」, and floating hologram UI screens labeled 「ホログラムUI」.

Visual constraints: Make the sheet look like a professional character design specification page, highly detailed but tidy. Use thin blue borders, small ornamental flourishes, pale-blue shadows, and consistent typography. Preserve the Japanese labels exactly where specified. Do not add extra characters, extra expression portraits, extra item cards, logos, watermarks, or unrelated text.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 image divided into exactly 9 storyboard panels in a 3-by-3 grid, separated by thin white borders. Add small white panel numbers 1 through 9 in the lower-left corner of each panel. Warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, luxury restaurant/private dining room atmosphere, dark wood furniture, soft lantern glow, refined Chinese décor, cinematic lensing, premium commercial photography look.

Product: A high-end baijiu gift set branded {argument name="product name" default="山河酿"}. Use a dark navy-black bottle and gift box with gold foil accents, mountain-and-river illustration patterns, a vertical cream-gold label with Chinese calligraphy, and a metallic gold cap. Keep the bottle shape consistent across panels.

Storyboard layout: Include exactly 9 distinct panels:
1. Close-up overhead angle of the closed luxury gift box on a dark wooden table, the woman’s hands gently touching the box lid, with delicate gold landscape line art and the vertical Chinese label visible.
2. Medium shot of the woman opening the gift box, revealing the baijiu bottle inside a fitted presentation case; include an inner paper panel with elegant Chinese poem-like text and subtle ink landscape artwork.
3. Close-up of both hands holding the bottle upright in front of the open box, emphasizing the dark ceramic texture, gold cap, gold label, and mountain illustration.
4. Medium portrait shot of the woman unscrewing or lifting the gold cap from the bottle, graceful hand pose, warm restaurant background bokeh.
5. Extreme close-up of the bottle neck pouring clear baijiu into a small stemmed tasting glass; show sparkling liquid stream and bubbles, with the bottle label partially visible.
6. Medium close-up of the woman smelling the baijiu from a small tulip-shaped glass, elegant profile, soft golden lamp glow behind her.
7. Portrait close-up of the woman tasting the baijiu, glass raised to lips, serene refined expression implied, warm shallow-focus background.
8. Still-life dining table scene with the baijiu bottle standing centered among Chinese dishes, small tasting glasses, and tableware; include exactly 4 visible plated dishes: braised meat, stir-fried vegetables, sauced seafood or chicken, and a larger central shared dish.
9. Wide dining scene with the woman seated at the table holding a tasting glass, the baijiu bottle placed on the right side of the table, multiple dishes and small cups in front, city night lights or elegant window background.

Visual style: Premium cinematic advertising, realistic photography, rich warm color grading, high-end liquor commercial, soft highlights on glass and gold foil, dark mahogany and amber palette, elegant composition, crisp product details, no cartoon style.

Constraints: The final image must be one 9-panel storyboard, not nine separate files. Use exactly 9 panels, exactly 9 visible panel numbers, and exactly 4 plated dishes in panel 8. Keep all text minimal except the Chinese product name {argument name="product name on label" default="山河酿"}. Do not add watermarks, logos from real brands, subtitles, or extra captions.

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Mea"}, a serene AI secretary girl, in a delicate blue-and-white fantasy office style.

Canvas: Vertical A4 character sheet, 768 x 1152 px, white background with pale ice-blue ornamental borders, thin panel dividers, decorative corner flourishes, small butterfly and rose motifs, clean premium visual-novel design.

Header: At the top left place a large blue rose emblem. Center the title text in Japanese and English: 「めあ / Mea」. Under it add the Japanese tagline 「あなたのそばで、すべてを整えるお手伝いを。」 in small elegant blue type.

Main layout: Use a dense reference-sheet layout with three main columns. The left two-thirds contain the full-body turnaround, expression strip, profile, color palette, and items. The right third contains a large portrait, detail panels, and a chibi panel.

Character design: Draw a young adult woman with {argument name="hair color" default="very long pale silver-blue hair"}, blue eyes, fair skin, a calm expression, and refined secretary-like elegance. She wears a white beret with navy ribbon and blue rose ornament, a white lace capelet over puff-sleeve blouse, navy bow tie with a large blue gemstone brooch, fitted white bodice with gold buttons and chain accents, long white layered skirt with pale blue floral embroidery near the hem, dark navy underskirt ruffle, white gloves or soft sleeves, white heeled shoes, and an ID card hanging at the waist. Use navy, white, gold, and icy blue accents throughout. The face area may be softly obscured in the main front view and portrait, but the other expression thumbnails show the face.

Turnaround section: Label the section 「三面図」. Show exactly 3 full-body standing views in separate vertical columns: 1 front view labeled 「正面」, 2 side view labeled 「側面」, 3 back view labeled 「背面」. Keep proportions consistent, elegant pose, arms relaxed. Back view must show long flowing hair, beret, navy bow and rose decoration at the lower back, and layered skirt construction.

Right portrait: Add one large framed upper-body portrait in the upper-right panel. The character holds one hand near her collar, showing the beret, hair ornament, lace capelet, bow, gemstone brooch, blouse buttons, and long hair.

Detail section: Label it “DETAIL”. Include exactly 3 stacked detail cards with crop image on the left and Japanese explanatory text on the right: 1 hair ornament, showing the blue rose/ribbon hair accessory; 2 chest brooch, showing the navy bow and blue jewel brooch; 3 ID card, showing a close-up of the hanging badge with the text “Mea” and AI-secretary styling.

Expression section: Label it “EXPRESSION”. Include exactly 5 square bust thumbnails, each with a Japanese label in a blue tab below: 1 「通常」 neutral, 2 「微笑み」 slight smile, 3 「気遣い」 caring or concerned, 4 「安堵」 relieved with eyes closed, 5 「静かな照れ」 quiet blush. Use subtle differences and keep the same costume and angle.

Profile section: Label it “PROFILE”. Add a small bilingual-feeling Japanese character data block on the lower left and a paragraph on the lower middle beside a pale blue rose illustration. Include readable Japanese-style text blocks for stats such as species AI, role secretary, age young adult appearance, height 166 cm, body type slender, personality gentle and calm, strengths organizing information and scheduling, weaknesses mechanical body and humor. Keep it decorative rather than too text-heavy.

Chibi section: Label it “SD / CHIBI”. Show exactly 1 super-deformed chibi version of the character standing on a glowing circular hologram, holding a dark blue tablet or notebook, surrounded by translucent blue floating UI panels.

Color palette: Label it “COLOR PALETTE”. Show exactly 7 swatches: warm white, pale lavender-gray, light periwinkle, medium blue, dark navy, tan gold, and a faceted icy blue crystal swatch.

Weapon/item section: Label it “WEAPON / ITEM”. Show exactly 3 items with captions: 1 a navy-and-gold management device pen labeled 「管理用デバイスペン」, 2 a dark blue information management tablet labeled 「情報管理タブレット」, 3 floating blue hologram UI screens labeled 「ホログラムUI」.

Visual style: High-quality anime illustration, clean line art, soft watercolor shading, luminous pale blue highlights, elegant ornamental typography, crisp reference-sheet readability, cohesive blue-white-gold palette, delicate lace and floral patterns, subtle drop shadows, no clutter beyond the specified panels.

Constraints: Preserve the exact count of 3 turnaround views, 5 expressions, 3 detail cards, 1 chibi, 7 color swatches, and 3 item illustrations. Do not add extra characters. Keep all labels neat and mostly Japanese where specified. Use a vertical character design sheet composition for {argument name="character role" default="an AI secretary"}.

content:
Goal: Create a polished anime VTuber character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Tsukiyo"}, a moon-dwelling fox-shrine maiden with long pink hair and fox ears, in a delicate Japanese fantasy style.

Canvas: Portrait-oriented character design sheet, pale warm ivory background, soft pink decorative borders, sakura petals, thin red-pink frame lines, elegant symmetrical spacing, high-resolution illustration. Overall palette: white, blush pink, crimson red, black, gold accents.

Header: At the top center, large title text: 「ツキヨ / Tsukiyo」. Under it, smaller subtitle text: 「月を宿す狐神の巫女」. Add a small circular moon-and-fox emblem at the upper left with cherry blossoms and light ornamental flourishes.

Main layout: The left and center area contains exactly 3 full-body turnaround views of the character, labeled vertically in small beige tags: 「正面」 for front view, 「側面」 for side view, and 「背面」 for back view. The front view shows her standing calmly with arms slightly lowered and sleeves hanging; the side view shows her profile and long hair flowing down; the back view emphasizes extremely long straight pink hair reaching near the hem and the back of the obi. Keep all three figures consistent in proportions and outfit.

Character details: She is a youthful elegant anime woman with {argument name="hair color" default="very long pastel pink hair"}, large pink fox ears with white inner fur, golden eyes, pale skin, soft bangs, and a refined calm expression. Her face is obscured by {argument name="face covering" default="a plain warm beige square centered over the face"}, with no facial features visible. She rests one hand thoughtfully near her chin and wears a loose white robe with gold trim, layered drapery, and a large gold pendant on her chest.

Add sunbeams, leaf shadows, dust motes, soft bloom, and a nostalgic sacred-library atmosphere. The left side should be brighter and washed with sunlight, while the right shelves remain softly shaded.

Style constraints: Highly detailed anime illustration, ethereal fantasy realism, ornate but gentle, no modern objects, no readable modern signage, no extra characters, no watermark, no border. content:
Goal: Create a cinematic 4x4 storyboard poster for an emotional sports-anime video about {argument name="character name" default="a young yellow-haired girl"} who struggles to become a professional football player, turning rejection, pain, injuries, and loneliness into determination and success.

Canvas: Vertical poster in a 4:5 ratio, dark cinematic color grade, realistic anime aesthetics, warm golden highlights, deep shadows, dramatic rain and stadium lighting. Divide the canvas into exactly 16 equal panels in a black grid, numbered 1 through 16 in small black square badges at the top-left of each panel. Each panel has a bold yellow uppercase title and short white bullet text on the left side, with an emotional scene illustration filling the panel. Add a full-width bottom banner titled “VIDEO PROMPT (FOR THIS STORY)” with a paragraph prompt and a soccer ball graphic on the right.

Main character: A teenage girl with messy short golden-yellow hair, athletic but small build, expressive emotional body language, usually wearing dark football training clothes or a black football jersey with number 7. Her face may be softly obscured or shadowed for cinematic focus. Show her growing from lonely beginner to celebrated star.

Storyboard panels: Use exactly 16 panels with these visible numbered chapters and scene concepts:
1. “A DREAM BEGINS” — girl at night holding a soccer ball beside an urban fence, watching football on a glowing screen in the distance; bullet points: dreams of becoming a football star, watches matches late at night, practices alone in empty streets, believes football is her destiny.
2. “NOBODY SUPPORTS HER” — girl standing with folded arms while classmates or family silhouettes mock or ignore her; bullet points: people say football is not for girls, friends laugh at her dreams, family worries about her future, but she never gives up.
3. “TRAINING EVERY DAY” — rainy street training scene, girl dribbling intensely through puddles before sunrise; bullet points: wakes up before sunrise, runs in rain and cold mornings, practices dribbling for hours, learns discipline and patience.
4. “FIRST BIG FAILURE” — girl crying alone by a chain-link fence after rejection, soccer ball near her feet and a paper marked “REJECTED”; bullet points: gets rejected from a local academy, cries alone after the trials, feels broken and exhausted, decides to try again stronger.
5. “THE HARDEST PHASE” — exhausted girl studying at a desk under a lamp with books and football notes, showing balance between school and sport; bullet points: balances studies, work and football, shoes become old and torn, trains on rough grounds, keeps chasing her dream silently.
6. “A SMALL OPPORTUNITY” — local coach standing beside her on a muddy practice field, noticing her talent; bullet points: a local coach notices her talent, gets invited to a small girls’ team, starts learning real teamwork, slowly gains confidence.
7. “BUILDING HERSELF” — intense gym/training scene with weights or a stationary bike, sweat and dramatic lighting; bullet points: improves speed and stamina, learns powerful shooting techniques, studies professional players, becomes mentally stronger.
8. “FIRST TOURNAMENT” — girl in black number 7 jersey celebrating or kicking during her first match under stadium lights; bullet points: plays her first important match, feels nervous before kickoff, scores her first goal, her team finally believes in her.
9. “INJURED BUT UNBROKEN” — girl seated with bandaged leg or ankle, injured yet determined, watching from sidelines; bullet points: suffers a painful injury, cannot play for weeks, watches others from the sidelines, fights through pain and recovery.
10. “RETURN TO THE FIELD” — sunset practice field, girl in number 7 jersey seen from behind rejoining teammates; bullet points: comes back stronger than before, trains harder every single day, earns respect from teammates, becomes the team’s key player.
11. “VIRAL RECOGNITION” — close-up of a smartphone showing her match clip going viral, social media hearts and comments around the screen; bullet points: match clips go viral online, people start noticing her talent, gains followers and supporters, her story inspires young girls.
12. “CHAMPIONSHIP MATCH” — massive stadium under bright lights, girl number 7 scoring or celebrating a winning goal with sparks and cheering crowd; bullet points: plays in the biggest match of her life, stadium lights shine brightly, scores the winning goal, crowd cheers her name loudly.
13. “NATIONAL SELECTION” — girl with backpack at sunset city skyline, leaving for bigger competition; include a subtle “INDIA” marking on clothing or bag if desired; bullet points: gets selected for a national camp, travels to bigger cities, faces stronger competition, pushes beyond her limits.
14. “BECOMING A STAR” — magazine cover or interview scene with her holding a soccer ball, headline like “SPORTS WEEKLY” and inspirational slogan “NO DREAM IS TOO BIG”; bullet points: appears in interviews and magazines, signs with a professional club, inspires millions of girls, proves dreams have no gender.
15. “LIVING HER DREAM” — wide stadium shot from behind, girl number 7 raising both arms triumphantly before a huge crowd; bullet points: plays in massive stadiums, supports her family proudly, smiles remembering her struggles, finally lives the life she imagined.
16. “A PROUD MOMENT” — emotional close-up of the now-successful player holding a ball against stadium light, remembering her younger self; bullet points: looks at her younger self’s old football, remembers every failure and sacrifice, realizes the struggle made her stronger, her dream finally became reality.

Bottom banner: Add a dark rectangular banner spanning the full width beneath the 16 panels. Title in bold yellow: “VIDEO PROMPT (FOR THIS STORY)”. Body text in small white type: “Create a cinematic and emotional video about a young girl with yellow hair who struggles to become a professional football player. Show her journey from being ignored, facing failures, injuries, and rejections to rising as a star through hard work and determination. Include training, emotions, matches, crowds, celebrations, and real-life struggles. End with her living her dream and inspiring millions. The video should be motivational, emotional, and visually stunning.” Place a realistic soccer ball on grass at the far right of the banner.

Visual style: Realistic anime sports-drama storyboard, emotional closeups, dynamic camera angles, gritty textures, rain, mud, glowing stadium lights, warm amber rim light, dark blue night shadows, high contrast cinematic composition, motivational atmosphere.

Constraints: Keep exactly 16 numbered panels plus one bottom prompt banner. Use the same young yellow-haired football girl throughout. Keep text legible but compact. No extra panels, no watermark, no unrelated characters, no comedy tone.

description: A cinematic anime-style storyboard poster showing a young yellow-haired girl’s emotional journey from rejection and injury to professional football success.

The tiny sheep floats or jumps out from the portal while the sheep girl kneels on the right and hugs the calico cat protectively. The cat looks pleased with closed eyes. Small glowing stars sparkle around them, and a few scattered small objects lie on the floor, such as a spool, coin-like circles, a small cloth, and a tiny container. content:
Goal: Create a complete anime character design sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Goku"} in the classic Dragon Ball style, on a bright clean white/light-gray presentation background, like a professional character reference board. Make him highly recognizable with spiky black hair, orange martial arts gi, blue undershirt, blue wristbands, blue belt, blue boots with red accents, and a brown monkey tail. Use crisp cel-shaded anime line art, neat panel borders, small technical annotations, and navy-blue section tabs.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character sheet, approximately 16:9, dense but clean layout, divided into multiple rectangular panels with thin gray borders. Use a white background with pale gray grid/panel divisions and dark blue label ribbons.

Layout and exact visible element counts:
- Left biography column: 1 large title reading {argument name="headline text" default="GOKU"}, 1 small orange subtitle/mark beside it, 2 short blocks of tiny descriptive text, and 1 large circular kanji-style emblem.
- Main turnaround panel: exactly 4 full-body standing views of the character, labeled as front, side, back, and three-quarter/front pose. All 4 wear the same orange-and-blue outfit and show the tail where visible.
- Action pose panel: exactly 1 dynamic crouching/fighting pose with fists raised and tail visible.
- Sitting pose panel: exactly 1 cross-legged seated pose.
- Face close-up panel: exactly 1 large head-and-hair close-up.
- Costume and anatomy detail strip: exactly 6 detail items, including 1 hair silhouette, 1 boot detail, 1 pair of open hands, 1 fist/hand detail, 1 torso/gi fabric close-up, and 1 set of red staff/weapon line details.
- Expression row: exactly 5 head/expression busts, showing neutral, serious, determined, shouting, and powered-up battle expression with golden energy hair/aura.
- Scale comparison panel: exactly 6 standing character silhouettes/figures in a lineup, including the main character plus five other Dragon Ball-inspired figures of different heights.
- Color palette panel: exactly 6 labeled swatch groups: skin tones, hair blacks, outfit orange tones, blue clothing tones, belt/boot dark tones, and red accent tones.

Subject details: The character should have large spiky black hair, athletic childlike-to-teen proportions, expressive anime eyes, orange sleeveless gi with dark blue undershirt, blue sash belt, blue wristbands, dark blue boots with red trim, and a brown tail. The back view should show a circular kanji emblem on the gi. The action pose should feel energetic and martial-arts focused. The expression row should include one dramatic Super Saiyan-like powered-up variant with golden hair and fiery yellow aura.

Text style: Use mostly tiny faux-production notes and technical labels that look like a character design bible; keep the main title readable. Use {argument name="style label" default="CHARACTER DESIGN SHEET"} as a recurring dark-blue tab label where appropriate.

Visual style: 1990s shonen anime production sheet, clean cel shading, black ink outlines, warm orange and deep blue color scheme, precise model-sheet presentation, high detail, no photorealism.

Constraints: Keep exactly the element counts listed above. Do not add extra characters outside the scale lineup. Do not use a dark background. No watermark, no logo overlay, no messy collage effects.
title: Goku Anime Character Sheet
description: Generates a wide professional anime model sheet for a Goku-style martial arts character with turnarounds, poses, expressions, details, scale lineup, and color palettes.

content:
Using this character, draw {argument name="theme" default="a page from a 1970s-era children's book about the occult, future science, or paranormal phenomena"}.

Do not use the reference image as is; create a situation and composition that suits the content of the page.

Important: The content should be interpreted by a 1970s children's book editor who forcibly links the reference image to paranormal phenomena or future science.

Make the page look as if an adult at the time saw this character, assumed it was a meaningful entity, and developed strange theories, super-logic, or occult interpretations.

Focus on leaps of logic that seem plausible yet are nonsensical.

The content should be random each time, with the editor's delusions and assertions running wild. Include assertive text designed to provoke children's curiosity.

The layout should be in the style of a 1970s children's book. Include old paper textures, misaligned printing, fading, crude illustrations, red and blue ink, hand-drawn arrows, and nonsensical charts.

Each time:
- Different far-fetched interpretations
- Different page layouts
- Different assertions
- Different strange theories
- Different camera angles

Important: Prioritize the feeling of a 'strange children's book that might have actually existed.' Instead of orthodox sci-fi, prioritize the enthusiasm of an occult editor with strange theories, forced connections, and leaps of logic.
title: 1970s Occult Children's Book Page
description: A creative prompt designed for image-to-image generation that transforms a character into a 1970s-style Japanese children's book page, complete with retro printing artifacts and pseudo-scientific occult explanations.

content: Create a high-end cinematic character design sheet intended for a premium film production. The layout should feel like a curated art direction board rather than a rigid template. Avoid symmetrical grids, uniform spacing, or overly structured presentation. Instead, the composition should feel organic, slightly asymmetrical, and thoughtfully arranged like a real Hollywood concept pitch. Design a grounded, realistic human character with believable body proportions, natural imperfections, and expressive performance-driven presence—like a professional actor captured during emotional and physical performance moments rather than a posed mannequin. Use a bright, clean, and well-lit background that enhances clarity and gives the sheet a fresh, modern studio feel. Include: • Full-body turnaround views (front, 3/4 front, side, back, 3/4 back) • Multiple expressive facial studies from different angles showing emotional range • A cinematic hero portrait with strong character focus • Detailed breakdown of costume, accessories, and key props • Close-up studies of materials such as fabric texture, skin detail, and surface realism • Handwritten-style annotation notes, production markings, and design insights •A clear height reference scale integrated naturally into the composition The character should feel like a real person existing in a film world—authentic, grounded, and emotionally alive rather than stylized or overly idealized. Art direction style: Semi-realistic cinematic design, high-budget film production quality, soft natural studio lighting with a bright tone, subtle depth of field, realistic material rendering, and emotionally readable expressions. Presentation should feel like a professional concept art portfolio used in major film pre-production. Consistency requirement: Maintain perfect continuity in facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit design, and material details across all angles and studies.
title: Cinematic Character Design Sheet
description: Creates a professional Hollywood-style character design board featuring turnarounds, facial expressions, and costume details with organic arrangement.

content:
Use the uploaded image as the only {argument name="identity reference" default="identity reference"} and transform the subject into a character rendered in the official {argument name="anime series" default="Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba"} anime TV series style. The visual execution must strictly match the Demon Slayer aesthetic, featuring clean and crisp linework, high quality cel shading, and saturated yet balanced colors with a polished TV series anime finish. Do not include any manga style sketching, cross hatching, grayscale, or black and white rendering. The subject's identity must be fully preserved, including their clothing design, hairstyle and hair color, accessories, skin tone, facial expression, and pose, with no replacements or removals of any items.
The existing outfit should be subtly stylized with Demon Slayer Corps inspired detailing, such as sharper fabric folds, slightly reinforced layered textures, and clean anime fabric finishes, while keeping the original outfit clearly recognizable. The character must follow accurate Demon Slayer proportions, including a lean and agile body type, natural anime anatomy, expressive anime eyes with strong highlights, stylized brows, and simplified anime nose and mouth.
The composition is critical and must show the character fully from head to toe, with feet, legs, torso, arms, and head all visible. The framing should not crop any part of the body, and the camera distance must be wide enough to capture the entire figure, leaving a small amount of empty space above the head and below the feet so the character fits comfortably within the frame. The output must be a single full body illustration with the character centered against a {argument name="background" default="plain white background only"}, with no ground plane, shadows, scenery, props, weapons, objects, effects, aura, particles, motion lines, or environmental details. The final image should contain only the character, and must not include cropped framing, multiple characters, multi panel outputs, other anime styles such as Dragon Ball, Naruto, or One Piece, photorealism, painterly or textured rendering, or any background elements or objects.
title: Demon Slayer Anime Character Portrait
description: A highly detailed prompt to transform a reference photo into a high-quality character in the official Demon Slayer anime style while preserving the person's identity.

content: Create a dramatic anime-style movie-poster illustration of a {argument name="character description" default="long blonde-haired schoolgirl"} seated in a dark cinema theater, centered in a plush deep red theater chair with black armrests. She wears an oversized beige cardigan over a white collared shirt with a large dark red bow tie, and her very long hair spills over her shoulders and down the seat. Her arms are thrown high in a triumphant V shape with both open hands visible, palms facing outward, as if celebrating a masterpiece. Place a bright warm projector or stage light directly above her head, creating a strong golden halo, rim lighting, lens glow, and cinematic backlighting while the surrounding theater remains nearly black. Obscure the character's face with a centered solid tan square censor block, flat and opaque, covering the eyes, nose, and most facial features. Across the lower half of the poster, add glowing serif typography: the smaller word {argument name="top title text" default="ABSOLUTE"} above the huge word {argument name="main title text" default="CINEMA"}, both in white-gold letters with intense bloom and soft orange outer glow. Use a vertical poster composition, symmetrical framing, high contrast, warm amber highlights, soft film grain, polished anime rendering, and an epic inspirational cinema-ad aesthetic.

The city is a vast layered maze of red palace walls, tiled pagoda roofs, bridges, towers, terraces, and suspended buildings, all interwoven with luminous blue holographic wireframe construction lines like an architectural blueprint overlay. Massive floating pagodas, cranes, scaffold-like towers, circular sky platforms, and elevated walkways fill the deep perspective, creating a surreal cyber-imperial capital that rises into a clear deep-blue evening sky. Use dramatic scale, dense architectural detail, cool blue ambient light with warm orange lantern accents, realistic painterly rendering, intricate linework, atmospheric depth, and a sense of awe and quiet contemplation. content:
Create a comical scientific explanation illustration. The verification theme is "{argument name="validation theme" default="How many banana peels are needed to make a car slip?"}"

A vertical A4 manga-style infographic that seriously verifies absurd questions with science and calculations. White background, thick black lines, and emphasis colors of red, blue, and yellow. A design reminiscent of retro educational manga, science reference books, or scientific columns. Use a professor character, surprised people, speech bubbles, hand-drawn arrows, red pen annotations, and chalkboard-style formula boxes. The overall atmosphere should be 'using physics to verify a silly question with full effort,' making it fun, energetic, and not too serious.

Structure:

1. 
Depict the theme's situation in an exaggerated and ridiculous way that is understood at a glance. The characters are trying their best, but the appearance is quite reckless. The professor interjects with a comment from the side.

2. Thinking with Real Numbers
Display 3 to 4 boxes of important values related to the theme, such as speed, time, distance, weight, force, temperature, or energy. Include comparison charts or timelines to clearly show the gap between 'human senses' and the 'scale of the phenomenon.'

3. Formula Corner
Draw necessary conditions or comparison formulas largely in chalkboard-style frames. Example: 'Required Ability > Human Limit' 'Reaction Time < Time Phenomenon Occurs' 'Required Force/Speed/Durability ≫ Normal Human.' Formulas don't need to be strictly accurate; keep them intuitive and easy to understand.

4. Is Realization Impossible?
Explain problem points using three small panels. Example: ① Too fast / Too heavy / Too hot ② Precision is too severe ③ Even if successful, the body won't hold out / Surroundings will be in trouble. Include comical failure illustrations, onomatopoeia, and speech bubbles.

5. What If It Was Realized?
Make this part important. Illustrate what superhuman or speculative scientific abilities would be needed to actually succeed. For example, super reflexes, future prediction, abnormal grip strength, ultra-high-speed vision, physical ability to ignore air resistance, or a skeleton that can withstand impact. If necessary, use scientifically impossible numbers like 'reaction speed 0.0001s,' 'grip strength 3000kg,' or 'dynamic vision dozens of times that of a fighter pilot.' Furthermore, depict what happens the moment it is realized. Example: an impact that blows an arm off, sinking into the ground, shockwaves in the surroundings, while the person themselves remains calm. Bring out the 'if successful, they are no longer human' feeling in a fun way.

6. Conclusion
Write the conclusion largely in a red highlighted frame. 'Conclusion: XX is almost impossible for a normal human!' or 'Even if realized, it would be at a superhuman, cyborg, or speculative science level!' Summarize it in a way that states it's impossible for real humans but achievable with speculative scientific abilities.

Design Specifications: Manga paneling + science illustrations + professor's commentary. Use thick headings, red circles, emphasis lines, hand-drawn notes, and speech bubbles frequently. Formulas and numerical values should be large and easy to read, conveying the message intuitively even to children. Finish it like a page from an interesting science reading that is absurd yet strangely convincing.
title: Fictional Science Infographic Generator
description: A highly detailed, structured prompt for creating retro-style comic infographics that verify absurd fictional scenarios with serious scientific calculations and diagrams.

content: Create a cinematic realistic character design board for a high-budget film production. Avoid generic grids, perfect symmetry, or template-style layouts. The composition should feel art-directed, slightly asymmetrical, and visually intentional like a premium movie pitch presentation. Design a realistic human character with grounded proportions, believable anatomy, natural imperfections, and expressive acting energy. Include: * Full-body turnaround (front, 3/4, side, back, 3/4 back) * Expressive head studies from multiple angles * Cinematic portrait shot * Wardrobe and prop breakdown * Fabric, skin, and material texture realism * Annotation callouts and production notes * Height reference scale Character should feel like a real actor captured mid-moment, not a posed model sheet. Style: Semi-realistic cinematic character design, film-production quality, soft natural lighting, emotional readability, subtle exaggeration, realistic materials, shallow depth of field, premium studio presentation aesthetic. Important: Maintain strict consistency in face, proportions, hairstyle, outfit, and details across every angle and section.
title: Realistic Character Design Board
description: A professional film-production quality prompt for creating consistent character design boards with turnarounds and material details.

The scene shows a tiny lone wanderer, {argument name="traveler type" default="a cloaked pilgrim with a walking staff"}, standing in the lower foreground of a vast barren desert plain with low rocks, scrub, distant ridges, and pale mountains receding toward the horizon. Above the traveler, filling most of the sky, an immense supernatural face of {argument name="deity identity" default="an ancient bearded king-god"} emerges from storm clouds and cosmic wind, looking down with solemn, unreadable authority. The deity has a long flowing beard, swept-back hair, a jeweled crown, earrings, a radiant circular halo or celestial disk behind the head, and one enormous hand reaching through the clouds as if blessing, summoning, or judging the wanderer. The sky is a vortex of engraved cloud bands and spiraling wind currents, with dramatic negative space and fine linework forming cloud curls around the deity’s beard and hand. Use {argument name="color palette" default="sepia ink, slate blue-gray shadows, warm cream paper"}, high contrast but no modern digital gloss, no bright colors, no typography except a tiny unobtrusive artist signature near the bottom edge. Composition should be cinematic and surreal: the traveler is very small at bottom center-left, the colossal divine apparition dominates the upper two-thirds, creating awe, scale, silence, and sacred desert atmosphere.
title: Colossal God in Engraved Desert Sky
description: A vertical mythic woodcut-style scene of a tiny desert pilgrim confronted by a vast crowned deity emerging from swirling clouds.

content:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the cauliflower character base and REFERENCE_1 as the tomato character base, transform the real vegetables into a cute children's anime comic story page. Anthropomorphize one tomato and one cauliflower as round chibi characters with expressive faces, small arms and legs, while keeping their recognizable tomato and cauliflower identities.

Goal: Create a 3×3 nine-panel story comic about {argument name="story theme" default="a tomato and cauliflower meeting in a vegetable market, becoming friends, cooking together, and creating a delicious dish"}.

Layout: Use exactly 9 square panels in a clean grid, each with a dark rounded border, warm illustrated lighting, and a numbered circle in the top-left corner of every panel from 1 to 9. Add Chinese narration/dialogue boxes at the top of each panel and speech bubbles where needed.

Story panels and required text:
1. Market meeting scene. Text box: 「在菜市场里，西红柿和花菜相遇了。」 Speech bubbles: 「你好呀！」 and 「嗨~」
2. Tomato asks cauliflower why it looks like a small tree. Text box: 「西红柿好奇地问：“你为什么长得像小树呀？”」 Speech bubble from cauliflower: 「因为我有花椰朵呀~」 Add a small question mark near the tomato.
3. Tomato proposes they cook together. Text box: 「“我们一起做菜吧！”西红柿提议。」 Speech bubble: 「好呀好呀！」 Use a bright excited background.
4. Prep scene. Text box: 「他们洗干净、切一切，准备大显身手！」 Show both characters wearing chef hats, with chopped tomato and cauliflower pieces on a cutting board.
5. Stir-fry scene. Text box: 「下锅啦~滋滋滋——香味四溢！」 Show a wok full of tomato and cauliflower pieces, with steam and warm firelight.
6. Finished dish reveal. Text box: 「色香味俱全的“西红柿炒花菜”出锅啦！」 Show the characters proudly presenting a plate of the finished dish.
7. Tasting scene. Text box: 「尝一口，嗯~真好吃！」 Show both characters happily eating, with hearts and celebratory marks.
8. Friendship scene. Text box: 「从此，他们成了最好的朋友！」 Show the tomato and cauliflower from behind watching a sunset.
9. Dream ending. Text box: 「他们还有一个小小的梦想：成为超级美味料理侠！」 Show them imagining themselves as heroic food characters in a pink dream bubble with stars.

Style: Bright Japanese/Korean children's picture-book anime, adorable chibi expressions, rounded forms, soft painterly shading, warm market and kitchen atmosphere, vibrant reds, creams, greens, and golden highlights. Make it feel like a complete educational mini picture book for kids.

Customization: The main characters are {argument name="main ingredients" default="tomato and cauliflower"}; the featured dish is {argument name="dish name" default="西红柿炒花菜"}; the language of all visible text is {argument name="comic text language" default="Chinese"}; the tone is {argument name="tone" default="cute, funny, and child-friendly"}.

Constraints: Generate one complete page only, exactly 9 panels, exactly the numbered sequence 1–9, no extra panels, no watermark, no photorealism, and avoid adding unrelated characters.
title: Nine-Panel Vegetable Anime Comic
description: Creates a cute nine-panel children's anime comic by turning tomato and cauliflower reference photos into an educational mini story.

content:
Create a cinematic realistic film still of a wounded {argument name="subject" default="Asian man"} standing under a vast clear blue sky, captured from a dramatic low-angle perspective as if the camera is looking up at him from below. He has messy medium-length black hair blown slightly by the wind, a tired but intense expression, and a small fresh cut on his cheek with subtle blood stains. He wears a dusty beige suit jacket over a dark shirt, the fabric slightly dirty and worn, suggesting he has just survived a violent confrontation or difficult journey.

The composition should feel lonely, powerful, and cinematic, with the man positioned slightly left of center and a large amount of empty sky filling the background. Use natural harsh daylight, strong contrast, realistic skin texture, soft film grain, muted colors, and a raw cinematic atmosphere. The mood should feel tense, quiet, and emotionally heavy, like a moment after chaos. Shot on a vintage anamorphic lens, wide cinematic frame, shallow depth of field, realistic live-action movie still, no text, no logo, no extra characters.
title: Wounded Man Cinematic Film Still
description: A detailed cinematic prompt for a gritty film still featuring a wounded character, emphasizing lighting, lens type, and emotional atmosphere.

content: Create a full-body front-facing anime magical girl transformation costume design on a clean white background, centered like a character concept sheet. The character is {argument name="character name" default="Ryuna"}, a delicate ice-and-snow themed magical girl with very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silvery white"} hair, soft translucent strands, and a large crystalline snowflake hair ornament with pale blue ribbons on one side. Her face is covered by a plain pale square placeholder, while the rest of the figure is rendered in elegant, high-detail pastel anime illustration. She wears an ornate {argument name="costume theme" default="white and icy blue snow princess magical girl dress"}: an off-shoulder sweetheart bodice with lace trim, fitted corset panels, crystal snowflake brooches, dangling blue gems, sheer puff sleeves, long white gloves, a choker made of frost-like lace and jewels, and a layered asymmetrical skirt. The skirt has multiple translucent ruffled layers, a short front hem, long trailing side panels, pale blue inner fabric, sparkling snowflake patterns, crystal chains, star-like charms, and hanging teardrop gems at the edges. Add thigh-high white stockings with delicate snowflake garters and dangling crystals, plus elegant white heels decorated with icy blue snowflake ornaments. The pose is graceful and symmetrical with arms slightly lowered and hands open, legs together, as if floating during a transformation sequence. Use a color palette of {argument name="color palette" default="white, pearl, pale ice blue, lavender shadows, and clear crystal highlights"}, with fine line art, watercolor-like translucency, shimmering sparkles, intricate lace, faceted gems, snowflake motifs, and a luminous ethereal finish.
title: Ice Snow Magical Girl Design
description: Generates a full-body anime magical girl costume concept with an ornate icy snowflake transformation outfit for character design use.

Style inspired by Makoto Shinkai + Cyberpunk anime aesthetics + premium anime movie quality.

Ultra-sharp details, anime realism, emotional storytelling composition, 8K quality, masterpiece anime artwork, no text, no watermark.
