Use the uploaded image as the reference image. Preserve its structure, framing, and main visual information.

Recreate the provided image as a realistic handmade artwork by a clever 10-year-old child.

Keep the original image’s main layout, composition, and recognizable content, but transform the entire scene into a 10-year-old child’s watercolor marker drawing mixed with crayon strokes and paper collage craft.

The image should be placed on a clean white paper background. Make it look genuinely handmade, with wobbly outlines, simple shapes, uneven coloring, visible watercolor marker texture, waxy crayon strokes, cut-paper edges, slight glue marks, layered paper pieces, imperfect proportions, and charming childlike details.

Do not use the original color palette. Replace it with {argument name="color theme" default="bright rainbow colors, soft pastel tones, playful candy colors, and cheerful handmade craft colors"}.

Add whimsical childlike decorations naturally around the scene: {argument name="decorations" default="castles, fairy-tale towers, candy, lollipops, stars, smiling clouds, rainbows, hearts, flowers, sparkles, planets, stickers, and random doodles"}.

Also add fantasy and sci-fi paper-collage characters as if the child added them for fun: {argument name="extra characters" default="a brave armored hero, a silly evil villain, a colorful mecha robot, a cute monster, a floating UFO, friendly little aliens, a lovely princess, and a fun spaceship flying through the sky"}.

All visible text should be redrawn as childlike handwriting, as if written by a 10-year-old using crayons and watercolor markers. The handwriting should be uneven, slightly messy, cute, naive, with inconsistent letter sizes, irregular spacing, playful wobble, and imperfect alignment.

The final image should feel realistic, smart, imaginative, innocent, colorful, and full of childlike creativity — like a charming school art project made with watercolor markers, crayons, scissors, glue, and colorful paper.
title: Childlike Watercolor and Crayon Art
description: A prompt that recreates an uploaded image as a charming 10-year-old's art project featuring watercolors, crayons, and paper collage elements.

Create a high-quality 4K cinematic “Get Ready With Me” Instagram-style storyboard in a 9:16 vertical layout with EXACTLY 8 PANELS ONLY (no more, no less). Use soft natural lighting, pastel tones, and a clean trendy aesthetic. No text anywhere.
The storyboard must include exactly these 8 scenes:
Waking up in a cozy aesthetic bedroom with soft sunlight
Skincare close-up (applying serum or moisturizer)
Standing in front of wardrobe, choosing outfit
Changing into a modern trendy outfit (quick transition moment, stylish dress)
Makeup close-up (foundation, lip gloss, or blush)
Hair styling (brushing, tying, or clip styling)
Mirror check with full modern outfit, confident pose
Final confident walk or soft smile in sunlight
Keep panels clearly separated in one single frame with even spacing. Use cinematic angles (mirror shots, close-ups, POV), smooth lighting, and a strong glow-up transformation vibe.
Strict rule: only 8 panels, no extra frames, no repetition.

content: A retro-futurist black-and-white sci-fi newspaper front page designed like a casualty report bulletin, with a distressed paper texture, halftone grain, thin technical border lines, and a slightly worn photocopied print look. Beneath it are 2 dense newspaper-style body text blocks in narrow columns of small monospaced or typewriter-like text, with a few bolded ship and faction names embedded in the copy. The article text should feel like military logistics reporting from an interstellar war, mentioning exact times, sectors, casualties, garrisons, probes, toll positions, and damaged ships. The right two-thirds of the page is a detailed monochrome ink illustration: in the upper right sky, 1 enormous wedge-shaped capital ship or dreadnought hovers diagonally from left-lower side toward right-upper side, covered in layered armor panels, antennae, gantries, and dense structural detailing. Below it, occupying the lower right half, is 1 industrial checkpoint or garrison gate spanning a wide road or landing lane, built from brutalist sci-fi frames, vertical pylons, gantry towers, and utility structures, with perspective lines drawing the eye toward the center distance. Add 1 small mid-distance flying craft near the horizon under the gate. In the far right background, include 1 cluster of tall refinery-like towers and industrial buildings. Overlay faint hexagonal grid motifs on the upper right and lower right background, subtle and partially faded into the paper texture. Use only grayscale tones, black ink linework, etched concept-art hatching, and newspaper-print contrast. The overall mood is bleak, militarized, archival, and editorial, like a war correspondent page from a far-future space empire newspaper.
title: Retro Sci-Fi Casualty Desk Front Page

content: A stylized humorous editorial illustration of a chaotic office on fire, rendered in warm orange, amber, and smoky brown tones with cinematic lighting and painterly detail. Center the scene on a frazzled office worker seated at a desk, wearing a wrinkled olive-green button-up shirt and a loose black tie, holding a black coffee mug near his face. Replace the face with a plain rectangular censor block in a warm skin-toned color. Give him messy dark brown hair and black rectangular glasses visible from the side. Above him on a stained beige wall, place a large bold black sans-serif quote in two centered lines that reads {argument name="headline text" default="this is fine. everything is fine."}, with a hand-drawn red underline beneath it. Fill the room with visible black smoke curling from the ceiling corners, a red emergency alarm light glowing in the upper left, and a ceiling smoke detector in the upper right. On the left wall, include a crooked framed poster of a cute hanging dog with the text "HANG IN THERE!". In the lower left foreground, show a black wire trash bin engulfed in bright flames containing a sheet labeled "PLAN" with 3 checkbox items reading "do thing", "do thing", and "do thing". Put a dark desk nameplate near the front edge reading "chaos coordinator". On the desk, scatter many loose papers, sticky notes, a pen, binder clip, and general office clutter. Place a central paper labeled "DEADLINES (yikes)" in red handwriting. Add a green sticky note near the bottom left reading "call back someday maybe". To the right, place an open gray laptop with a yellow sticky note on it that says "good job me :)". In the lower right foreground, show a tipped-over beige coffee cup spilling dark coffee across papers and over a simple red line chart. On the right wall, add a whiteboard titled "TODAY:" with exactly 4 checklist items: "survive", "coffee", "pretend", and "check email (ugh)". Below it, include a wilted dead office plant in a pot and a small sticky note on the wall reading "IT'S FINE". The overall mood should be absurdly calm despite obvious disaster, with satirical corporate burnout energy, detailed smoke, embers, cracked walls, and a polished digital illustration finish.
title: This Is Fine Office Meltdown

content:

Champagne gold and soft pink tones with black contrast, high-end lighting, backlighting combined with Tyndall effect, slight graininess in the air with a scented atmosphere, creating a cinematic and luxurious feel.

[Storyboard Content]

1 (Hook - Morning Awakening)
Title: Morning Light

Action: Eyes opening slightly, steady breathing.

Action: Touching behind the ear.
Mood: Self-appreciation.

Action: Hand slowly reaching for the perfume.

Action: Spraying neck lightly.
Mood: Releasing charm.

5 (Interaction)

Visual: A man in the elevator glances sideways.
Action: She turns her head slightly.
Mood: Subtle attraction.

6 (Detail)
Title: Fragrance Trail
Visual: Moving light in the air, visual fragrance.
Action: Scent mist dispersing.
Mood: Mysterious.

7 (Reveal)
Title: Nightfall
Visual: City night scene, she steps out of a car.
Action: Hem of dress moving slightly.
Mood: Commanding presence.

8 (Gift)
Title: Lingering Gaze
Visual: Someone in the crowd turns to look.
Action: Slow motion capturing the eyes.
Mood: Attracted.

9 (Unboxing)
Title: Exquisite Details
Visual: Close-up of the perfume bottle, glass reflecting light.
Action: Camera slowly zooming in.
Mood: High-end texture.

10 (Showcase)
Title: Elegant Walk
Visual: Walking on the street, flowing city lights.
Action: Confident stride.
Mood: In control.

11 (Identity)
Title: Who is She
Visual: She turns and smiles, blurred background.
Action: Slight side profile.
Mood: Mysterious, confident.

12 (Hero)
Title: Brand Freeze
Visual: Perfume bottle centered, black background, golden light edges.
Action: Perfect stillness.
Mood: Luxurious, classic.

Frames: (1) extreme wide autumn forest, single seed released from a tall tree, golden bokeh background; (2) macro tracking shot - seed floating through air, passing insects and leaves, delicate and small; (3) slow-motion impact - seed lands on soft soil, dirt particles scatter, raindrop falls beside it; (4) surreal underground macro - roots beginning to grow in darkness, microscopic and beautiful; (5) wide dramatic shot - violent storm raging, everything uprooted, but the seed's spot stays still; (6) macro close-up - first green sprout breaking through soil, morning dew on tip, sunlight catching it; (7) accelerated growth sequence - sapling rising, seasons shifting, light and shadow changing, alive; (8) wide shot - juvenile tree now standing, birds arriving, leaves rustling gently in wind; (9) medium warm shot - children playing in the tree's shade, a bird building a nest in the branches; (10) mirror wide shot - framed from the angle of the original tall tree, the new great tree now stands in its place circle of life.

content: A hand-drawn manga page on off-white notebook paper, created entirely with rough blue ballpoint pen lines, messy teenage doodle energy, uneven panel borders, scratchy shading, exaggerated action effects, and intentionally amateur "cringe black-history notebook" style. The page has 6 panels total arranged vertically: 1 wide top panel, 1 wide second panel, 1 wide third panel, 1 narrow horizontal impact panel, and 2 small bottom panels side by side. In the top panel, a round cute hero resembling a pink puffball swordsman crouches dramatically at left with a long sword planted upward behind him, glaring intensely, while a delinquent-looking or office-worker man with curly hair stands at right in a shirt, tie, and slacks, hands in pockets, on a barren rocky plain with sketchy clouds and speed-scratch background. In the second panel, the round swordsman leaps diagonally through the air with the sword raised, surrounded by vertical motion lines; large handwritten Japanese sound-effect text fills the panel with exactly 2 text groups: "断タネ" on the left and "超時空" on the right. In the third panel, the hero flies low from left to right and releases a piercing energy slash or scream-like attack toward the man on the right; across the panel is 1 giant handwritten Japanese shout: "ズギャアアアン!!!". In the fourth narrow panel, the entire frame is filled with smoke, impact scribbles, and explosive chaos, with 1 large handwritten Japanese effect: "ドォォォン!!!". In the bottom-left panel, after the smoke clears, the man is unharmed and casually catches or stops the tiny sword between two fingers near his face; a tiny handwritten caption appears near the fingers reading "ピタ…". In the bottom-right panel, the round hero appears in close-up, shocked and screaming with huge eyes, sweat, and dark streaked shading on the face; along the right side is 1 vertical handwritten Japanese reaction: "なっ!?". Keep the faces on the human character obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. Overall tone: comedic overdramatic battle manga parody, middle-school notebook doodle, chaotic composition, monochrome blue-ink pen sketch, no polished digital rendering, visible scribbles and imperfect anatomy.
title: Blue Pen Cringe Manga Battle Page
description: A rough blue-ballpoint parody manga page showing an overdramatic cute swordsman attack ending in a comedic failure, ideal for recreating nostalgic black-history notebook doodles.

content: Ultra-detailed wide street art mural painted on a rough, weathered concrete city wall with a dramatic split composition. On the left side, a vibrant tropical beach scene in warm pastel tones features a young man (same face as reference) relaxing on a beach chair, casually sipping from a fresh coconut under a glowing sunset sky, surrounded by palm trees and gentle ocean waves. The mood is calm and carefree, enhanced with playful tropical emojis and the caption ’healing’ integrated into the mural. On the right side, a dark, cluttered workspace in cold bluish-gray tones shows the same young man under stress, sitting at a messy desk filled with scattered papers, crumpled notes, a coffee mug, and dim lighting. A glowing laptop screen prominently displays ’DEADLINE 23:59,’ casting harsh light on his tired face, creating a late-night, high-pressure atmosphere. In the center, bold graffiti-style text reads ’OTHERS ARE HEALING’ and ’I AM ON A DEADLINE’ in dripping paint typography with strong contrast and layered spray textures. Beneath the text, include a stylized dragon logo with the tag ’JOHNN’ in graffiti signature style. Cinematic lighting, gritty textures, hyper-realistic mural finish, strong emotional contrast between relaxation and stress, urban street art aesthetic, 8K ultra-detailed resolution.
title: Contrast Street Art Mural
description: A dramatic split-composition mural prompt contrasting a relaxing tropical beach scene with a high-pressure, cluttered workspace.

The overall vibe should feel fun, energetic, and feminine.

content:
Generate a high-quality cinematic storyboard collage in a 16:9 frame, composed of 8–10 connected panels. The entire image should be illustrated in a {argument name="art style" default="stylized Korean manhwa / webtoon-inspired comic style"}, with clean line art, soft cel shading, dynamic action composition, and expressive visual storytelling. Avoid photorealism. Do not use realistic human facial rendering. Keep faces slightly simplified, stylized, and illustrated, while maintaining attractive character design and strong emotional expression. No text, no subtitles, no captions, no watermark.

Scene concept:
A freestyle fight between a man and a young Chinese woman, with the woman clearly winning in the end. The tone is intense, stylish, energetic, and dramatic, with strong visual rhythm and clear action storytelling. The setting should be clean and minimal, such as {argument name="setting" default="an urban rooftop at dusk"}, a modern training arena, or an empty industrial platform.

Female lead:
A young adult Chinese woman in her early 20s, clearly adult, illustrated in a Korean comic style. She wears a {argument name="outfit" default="pink Barbie-inspired sporty outfit"} with a fashionable, feminine look. Her design should feel youthful, agile, and confident. She has a light and nimble build, clear body lines, a slim and toned silhouette, and graceful but powerful movement. Her expression and posture should communicate calmness, sharp focus, and quiet confidence.

Male opponent:
An adult man with a physically stronger and more aggressive presence. He should appear forceful and intimidating at first, creating a visual contrast with the woman’s agility, technique, and composure.

Storyboard progression:
Panel 1: Wide establishing shot. The man and the woman stand apart in a tense face-off, dramatic atmosphere, strong composition.
Panel 2: Close-up or medium shot details — stylized eyes, hands tightening, ready stance, subtle body tension before the fight begins.
Panel 3: The man attacks first with aggressive speed and force.
Panel 4: The woman dodges smoothly and precisely, using quick footwork and agile body movement.
Panel 5: A fluid exchange of action — blocks, slips, pivots, and evasive movement, shown with dynamic comic-style angles.
Panel 6: The fight intensifies. The woman remains calm and starts reading his rhythm.
Panel 7: Turning point. She finds an opening and counters with clean, skillful technique.
Panel 8: A visually striking action moment — spin, redirect, sweep, or takedown — showing her taking control.
Panel 9: The man is down or clearly defeated, breathing heavily or collapsed.
Panel 10: Final hero shot. The woman stands strong and composed under dramatic lighting, calm and victorious.

Visual style:
Korean manhwa / webtoon-inspired illustration, cinematic comic storyboard, polished line art, soft cel shading, dramatic lighting, dynamic motion, expressive posing, elegant action choreography, stylish panel composition, clean background design, high detail, vivid but controlled color palette
title: Manhwa Style Fighting Storyboard
description: A complex cinematic storyboard prompt for a fighting scene in Korean manhwa style, featuring detailed panel-by-panel action progression.

content:
Dance Sequence Instruction Sheet
[VISUAL STYLE]
A composition featuring a highly detailed 3D-rendered female dancer. Designed like a professional choreography guide with a technical, diagram-inspired layout. Clean white background, soft studio lighting, and strong contrast to highlight body movement and posture.
[GRID LAYOUT]
Structured 4×4 panel grid (16 frames total), evenly spaced with thin black divider lines. Each panel is identical in size and clearly numbered from 1 to 16 to show a continuous dance progression.
[CHARACTER]
Use image1 as the base character. The same female dancer appears consistently across all panels with accurate likeness and proportions.
[WARDROBE]
The dancer wears a stylish, performance-ready outfit: same as in refrence image, bottom wears baggies trouser The look should feel modern and visually appealing while still practical for dance movement. Fabric should subtly respond to motion (slight flow and folds), even in grayscale.
[PANEL STRUCTURE – EACH FRAME]
Top-left: Step number + short dance move title (e.g., “Step 5 – Spin Transition”)
Center: Full-body pose capturing a precise moment in the choreography
Bottom-left: 3–4 lines of concise instruction describing the move
Overlay: Motion arrows and directional guides illustrating how the dancer transitions
[MOTION INDICATORS]
Incorporate curved arrows for fluid motion, straight arrows for directional steps, and circular indicators for spins or turns. Emphasize rhythm, weight shifts, and body isolation.
[RENDER QUALITY]
High-detail sculpted 3D style with smooth grayscale shading, subtle shadows, and clean linework. Maintain a polished, concept-art level finish with clarity in every pose.
[RESTRICTIONS]
No color, no background scenery, no extra characters, no visual clutter, only the dancer and instructional elements.
title: 3D Rendered Dance Sequence Guide
description: A prompt for a professional choreography guide showing a female dancer's movements in a 4x4 grid, emphasizing technical details and motion indicators.

content: A cinematic, ultra-detailed feudal Japanese courtyard at night in heavy rain, viewed from a high slightly diagonal angle as if from an upper balcony or rooftop. The scene is empty of people and focuses on atmosphere, architecture, and wet surfaces. A broad stone-paved yard fills most of the frame, with dark slick flagstones, puddles, ripples from rainfall, and strong reflections of lantern light. On the left stands a traditional wooden building with a tiled roof, deep eaves, warm interior light spilling from the open entrance, and a few barrels and containers near the doorway. In the center are 2 fenced wooden enclosures or work areas with lattice partitions, stacked lumber or bundled materials, low benches, and small lanterns placed on wooden stands. On the right foreground is another fenced partition with 2 hanging fabric banners bearing a circular clan crest. In the background, a large open gate and perimeter walls frame the compound, with 4 vertical hanging banners total visible across the scene, each marked with the same crest. Add 6 tripod torch stands around the courtyard, their flames small but bright against the rain, plus several warm wall lanterns near the gate and building. Use a moody blue-gray nighttime palette with warm amber practical lights, realistic rainfall streaks, wet wood, soaked fabric, stone texture, subtle mist, and soft volumetric lighting. The composition should feel like a grounded historical samurai drama set, realistic and photorealistic rather than stylized, with no characters, no modern objects, no text, and no fantasy elements.
title: Rainy Feudal Japan Courtyard
description: A cinematic photorealistic night scene of a rain-soaked samurai-era Japanese courtyard, ideal for historical atmosphere, film concept art, or game environment generation.

content: A nostalgic anime illustration set in a traditional Japanese tatami room during winter, viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. In the center is a low wooden kotatsu table covered with a thick brown patchwork quilt, with 2 floor cushions visible on the tatami. Around the table sit 3 people: a young woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="teal blue"} hair and a pink sleeveless dress with a white collar, sitting at the far side of the table and peeling a mandarin orange; a second young woman with short bobbed purple hair, wearing a pale yellow top, blue skirt, and a white apron tied in a bow at the back, seated in the right foreground; and a small boy in a white shirt with blue sleeves and blue shorts, kneeling on the left and crawling partway under the kotatsu to warm himself. On top of the table are 3 green-yellow plastic bottles labeled "mello Yello", a round woven tray holding 5 whole mandarins, and 1 peeled mandarin with loose orange peels spread on the tabletop. In the left background stands a chunky 1980s CRT television with woodgrain side panels on a low TV stand, with a silver video deck or console beneath it. The TV screen shows a blue title card with white Japanese credits and a glowing pale circular shape. Behind the characters are 1 shoji sliding door on the left and 2 beige fusuma sliding doors on the right wall. Warm indoor lighting, cozy family atmosphere, retro Showa-era Japanese home, detailed hand-drawn cel-anime style with soft shading, clean linework, and slightly faded vintage colors.
title: Retro Anime Kotatsu Family Scene
description: A cozy vintage anime-style winter interior showing three family members around a kotatsu in a traditional Japanese room, ideal for nostalgic slice-of-life illustrations.

content:
[Desired Output]
World-building Setting Materials + Original Anime Character Setting Materials
*Please visualize not only the character but also the environment, culture, systems, technology, and sense of daily life of the world in which the character lives.

[Worldview Seed]
Enter here

[Number of Proposals]
Enter here
*E.g., only 1 proposal / wish to compare multiple proposals, etc.

[Number of Characters]
Enter here

[Roles/Occupations]
Enter here

[Setting/Environment]
Enter here
*If details are sparse, design new parameters for climate, terrain, resources, dangers, transportation, and housing styles based on the input keywords.

[Society/Systems]
Enter here
*Design community rules, division of labor, status markers, affiliation marks, exchange methods, and rituals that fit the input.

[Technology/Faith/Taboos]
Enter here
*Derive material processing, recording methods, communication, prayers, taboos, festivals, and body decorations naturally from the input content.

[Lifestyle/Culture]
Enter here
*Housing, diet, transportation, work tools, clothing styles, meaning of ornaments, seasonal events, currency, script, emblems, etc.

[Overall Atmosphere]
Enter here

[Characteristics of the World]
Enter here

[Key Priorities]
Enter here

[Finish Direction]
Enter here
*E.g., emphasize realism/life-like feel, emphasize mysticism, emphasize practical utility of costumes, focus more on architecture, target bright children's content, etc.

[Differentiation Instructions]
Enter here

[Drawing Tone]
Smooth line art, flat anime coloring, minimal cel shading, single-level shadows, no gradients, no thick painting, no realistic texture expressions, no strong light/shadow effects, flat look optimized for animation.

[Anime Conversion Instructions]
While maintaining the structure, motifs, color scheme, roles, and cultural meanings of the original design, simplify the drawing for production animation. Use flat anime coloring and keep shadows to one level. Treat translucent materials or thin fabrics as simplified surfaces in a cel-shaded style rather than realistic textures.

Based on the input above, create an image in the style of "World-building Setting Materials + Character Setting Materials" for an original anime.

Purpose:
To visually communicate the world itself in which the character lives, rather than just the character alone. Create setting materials where the world's environment, culture, lifestyle tools, architecture, transportation, and the origins of clothing appear as a unified whole.

Most Important:
First, extract a "visual rule" unique to that world from the input content. Reflect that visual rule in everything: backgrounds, architecture, tools, costumes, color schemes, materials, emblems, and the overall page layout.

Desired Finish:
- Clothing, tools, and housing should look like things actually used by people living in this world.
- Characters, backgrounds, tools, text, and material samples should appear to belong to the same cultural sphere.
- Convey unique environments, resources, and lifestyle habits born from the worldview seed.
- Shapes should arise from necessity in daily life rather than existing genre tropes.
- Feature a unique shape language, color palette, and material feel recognizable at a glance.

Thought Process:
1. Determine the world's "Environment" from input (climate, terrain, light, seasons, dangers, resource distribution).
2. Determine "Lifestyle" from environment (housing, food, work, transport, storage, exchange, recording, celebrations).
3. Determine "Clothing and Tools" from lifestyle (fastening, layering, carrying, protection, showing status/role).
4. Determine "Character Appearance" from clothing/tools (focus on outfits, equipment, materials, colors, and silhouettes rather than just face/hair).
5. Determine "Page Design" from visual rules (reflect recording media, patterns, white space, and diagram styles of that world).

Diversity Enhancement:
Invent a new cultural sphere for each input. If multiple proposals are requested, ensure each has a distinct principle of living, material logic, and aesthetic.

For each proposal, significantly vary:
- Terrain and climate appearance
- Architecture and cityscape shapes
- Primary materials
- Meaning of colors
- Costume silhouettes
- How tools are held, stored, and carried
- Creation of symbols, scripts, patterns, and emblems
- Format of the page layout

Ideation Candidates (not fixed themes, but materials for inspiration):
Environment: Arid lands, cold regions, highlands, wetlands, volcanic ash zones, mirror lakes, misty valleys, high-wind zones, polar night, low gravity, floating strata, glowing mineral caves, etc.
Materials: Paper, bone, ceramics, leather, resin, glass, shell, bamboo, straw, crystals, recycled fabrics, lacquer, ash, feathers, amber, etc.
Culture: Oral traditions, mask culture, scent-based ID, knot-script, shadow puppet records, seasonal migration, silence rituals, dance contracts, etc.
Structure: Folding, wrapping, weaving, hanging, inserting, tying, layering, sealing, engraving, bundling, inflating, etc.

Mandatory Elements:
1. Worldview Board (symbolic landscape, cityscape, lifestyle tools, emblems, color rules, shape language).
2. Character Setting Materials (full-body standing pose, role-conveying outfits, detail diagrams for equipment/back view/belongings).
3. World-Character Connection (ensure clothes/gear logic stems from the world's tech/faith/environment).
4. Page Design (layout varies with worldview, using appropriate diagram methods and minimal labels/symbols).

Quality Standards:
- Not generic fantasy; the world's origins must be visible.
- Cohesive culture across characters and backgrounds.
- Decorations must have lifestyle, faith, or functional meanings.
- Visual differentiation between multiple world proposals.

Visual Presentation:
- High resolution, anime style, delicate line art, clean cel painting.
- Mixed layout of world boards + full-body character + tool details.
- Minimal text, prioritizing visual concept art sheets.

Final Goal:
Ensure a design where the world's establishment, resident life, material constraints, cultural meanings, and community rules are palpable. Create a unified sense where backgrounds and characters are instantly recognizable as belonging to the same unique world.
title: Anime World Building and Character Sheet
description: A highly detailed template for creating comprehensive setting materials for original anime worlds, including character designs, cultural backgrounds, and environmental visual rules.

The figure has 1 oval head near the upper center, 1 small dot eye, and 1 short curved facial line suggesting a simple nose or smile. A single vertical line runs down from the head as the neck and torso. There are 2 arms: the left arm is extended widely out to the left in a large curved arc, and the right arm bends outward to the right with a drooping forearm. The lower body is only partially indicated, with 1 central line continuing downward and 1 short curved line on the lower left suggesting a bent leg. content: A colossal {argument name="subject type" default="machine angel girl"} hovering above a dense futuristic megacity at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle so she dominates the skyline like a divine apparition. She has a sleek feminine humanoid body made of white, silver, and graphite biomechanical armor with exposed segmented joints, intricate filigree machinery, and glowing cyan energy lines embedded through the torso, hips, thighs, knees, and chest. Her face is smooth and mostly featureless like a blank mask, partially shadowed, with a luminous cyan visor across the eyes and a delicate metallic halo-crown or antennaed headpiece. She has exactly 2 enormous outstretched wings, each composed of layered metallic feathers in black, gray, and silver, with exactly 1 glowing circular cyan techno-emblem embedded near the center of each wing, for a total of 2 wing emblems. Her pose is calm, solemn, and godlike, arms relaxed at her sides, legs extended downward as if descending in silence. Surround her with heavy rain, mist, floating particles, and dramatic storm clouds split by bright celestial light behind her, creating a sacred cyberpunk atmosphere. Below her is a sprawling vertical city of dark skyscrapers packed with thousands of tiny window lights, haze, steam, and wet reflective surfaces. Include exactly 4 visible flying vehicles or drones scattered through the midair cityspace. Add illuminated billboards and neon signage with East Asian urban-future styling, including one large red vertical sign on the left reading "警戒" with small English text "ALERT", one smaller red sign reading "緊急警報", one huge right-side billboard reading "天使, 降臨。", and exactly 2 billboards that depict the same angelic machine figure. Color palette: cold steel gray, midnight blue, black, white, and electric cyan, with sparse red neon accents. Style: ultra-detailed cinematic sci-fi illustration, dystopian cyberpunk-meets-biblical angel imagery, painterly yet crisp, dense atmospheric effects, epic scale, high contrast, rain-soaked, awe-inspiring, haunting, and majestic.
title: Cyberpunk Machine Angel Over Megacity
description: This prompt generates a dramatic cinematic sci-fi key visual of a giant biomechanical angel descending over a rainy dystopian city, ideal for concept art, posters, and album-cover style imagery.

content:
K-Pop Dance 16-Step Instruction Sheet (4×4 Grid)

[VISUAL STYLE]
High-end K-pop choreography guide in monochrome grayscale
Crisp, studio-lit composition with strong contrast
Modern, editorial + performance aesthetic
Clean white background, no distractions

[GRID LAYOUT, STRICT]
4×4 grid (16 equal panels)
Thin black divider lines
Each panel clearly numbered 1–16
Top-left: Step number + short title
Bottom-left: 3–4 short instruction lines
Overlay: arrows + motion guides (curved, straight, circular)

[CHARACTER]
Korean female dancer (K-pop idol look)
Slim, athletic build
Long styled hair (soft waves or straight, dynamic movement)
Confident, expressive K-pop performance energy
Same character across all 16 panels (consistent face and proportions)

[WARDROBE  K-POP STYLE]
Fitted crop top (stylish, performance-ready)
High-waisted loose-fit jeans (street dance vibe)
Sneakers
Outfit should feel trendy, idol-stage inspired
Fabric reacts naturally to motion (subtle folds, movement)

🔢 [16 DANCE STEPS, SEQUENCE FLOW]
Starting Pose
Step Touch Right
Step Touch Left
Hip Sway Combo
Body Roll Down
Back Step Sweep
Quarter Turn Pivot
Hair Flip & Pose
Side Step Drag
Cross Behind Unwind
Body Wave Up
Hip Circle
Step Lock Step
Arm Sweep Pose
Chest Pop & Hit
Final Pose

[PANEL STRUCTURE,  EACH FRAME]
Center: full-body pose (clear choreography position)
Bottom-left: short bullet instructions (clean typography)
Motion arrows showing direction, spins, and flow
Emphasize rhythm, weight shift, and sharp K-pop accents

[MOTION STYLE]
Mix of sharp hits + smooth transitions (K-pop signature)
Clean isolations (hips, chest, arms)
Expressive poses with attitude

[RENDER QUALITY]
Ultra-detailed, high-resolution
Sharp anatomy and pose clarity
Smooth grayscale shading
No blur, no distortion, no clutter

[RESTRICTIONS]
No background elements
No extra characters
No color (strict grayscale)
Maintain clean instructional aesthetic
title: K-Pop Dance 16-Step Instruction Sheet
description: A detailed instructional grid prompt for creating a 4x4 guide showing dance steps with motion arrows and text labels.

content: A cozy late-night street-food stall photo in a Xiaohongshu-style healing mood-board aesthetic, showing a seated young woman with her face intentionally blurred, medium-long straight black hair, wearing a fitted deep V-neck ribbed knit top in {argument name="top color" default="warm beige"} and high-waisted blue jeans. She sits slightly angled to the camera on a red plastic stool, holding a small clear glass of pale beer near her mouth with one hand, relaxed and slightly tipsy, in a candid nightlife snapshot. The setting is a casual roadside food stand with warm, dim ambient lighting: a yellow tabletop in the lower left with exactly 2 green-label beer bottles, 1 plastic cup with beer foam, 1 colorful cigarette pack, and small scraps of napkin or paper; behind her is exactly 1 old electric fan placed on top of 1 white appliance box, a translucent plastic sheet curtain hanging behind her, and exactly 2 red plastic stools visible in the background. On the right side is a small vendor counter area with shelves, cups, and red cans, plus a partial illuminated sign. Add hand-drawn white doodle outlines around the woman and objects, with arrows, sparkles, hearts, swirls, and handwritten Chinese annotations placed all around the image like emotional captions. Include exactly 10 text callouts in Chinese: “老式风扇呼呼转着～有种怀旧感♡”, “塑胶布帘隔开的小空间 反而更有安全感～”, “路边小摊 人间烟火气 最抚慰人心～”, “冰凉的啤酒 苦中带甘～ 越喝越放松！”, “小口慢慢喝～ 让自己 稍微放空一下♡”, “杯子里的泡泡 像小小的快乐 慢慢消失～”, “今晚有点微醺… 心情刚刚好 什么烦恼都 先放一边吧♡”, “舒服的穿搭 自在又放松～ 做自己最重要♡”, “高腰牛仔裤 修饰比例 也很有安全感！”, and a large cloud-shaped caption near the bottom left reading “生活偶尔需要 一点微醺的小确幸～ 今天也要好好爱自己♡”. Use a realistic mobile-phone photo look with cinematic contrast, glossy highlights on skin and hair, slightly cramped composition, intimate street-night atmosphere, and a soft but sharp editorial finish. Keep the handwritten notes bright white and clearly legible, integrated naturally over the photo.

content:
Convert the subject in this image into a 4:5 mixed-reality transformation with a fully realistic background and a realistically rendered face, combined with bold {argument name="style" default="cartoon apparel"}, hand-drawn comic fire effects, and playful cartoon companions. Use a live-action hybrid composition with the subject preserved as the clear identity anchor while the stylized elements read as designed overlays inside one coherent scene.

CHARACTER:
Preserve the subject’s recognizable facial identity, hair state, and facial hair pattern if presented exactly, then re-render the face with realistic live-action AAA structure, natural skin response, and clean hybrid integration. Ensure high brightness, low contrast, medium saturation, low sharpness details. Dress the figure in exaggerated cartoon clothing with simplified seams, and graphic trims that feel intentionally designed rather than photographed. Add funny cartoon characters as supporting visual accents with expressive silhouettes, rounded forms, and lively attitude, while keeping the subject as the primary focal figure. The body should remain human and believable, but the clothing and accessories should carry comic exaggeration and strong graphic personality.

FACE & ANATOMY:
Keep the subject’s core facial proportions, expression logic, and likeness intact, rendered with realistic but controlled hybrid facial detail. Use natural eye depth, believable skin, while avoiding any plastic toy look or full caricature distortion. The body should read as live-action proportioned, with the stylization concentrated in the outfit, props, and surrounding comic elements.

ENVIRONMENT:
Restyle the exact same environment as a realistic setting with clear depth and natural perspective. Build the scene as a mixed-reality stage where comic fire drawings, playful animated accents, and graphic energy bursts sit visibly inside the real space without breaking spatial coherence. Keep the background believable, structured, and physically present, with the stylized elements integrated as deliberate designed interventions.

RENDER PIPELINE:
Use a mixed-reality rendering pipeline that combines realistic plate-like environment treatment with stylized 2D graphic overlays and hybrid character compositing. Preserve live-action shading on the face and background, then layer cartoon clothing, comic effect shapes, and illustrated fire forms with crisp contour control and clean edge separation. The final finish must feel like a polished real-world composite with intentional animated design language, not a pure cartoon render and not a standard photograph.

COLOR & LIGHT:
Use clean low contrast, and bright comic-highlight behavior against a realistic ambient base. Shadows remain natural in the background and face, while the stylized garments and effects carry punchy neon-like energy and high chroma separation.
title: Mixed-Reality Comic Transformation
description: A complex prompt for converting a real subject into a mixed-reality scene combining realistic AAA facial rendering with bold cartoon clothing and comic effects.

content: A full-body anime character poster on a vertical canvas, designed like a dramatic manga-themed hero introduction. At the top left, large bold Japanese title text reads "マンガ柱" with small furigana "ばしら" above it, and beneath it a black nameplate with pink trim reads "漫画咲" with small furigana above the kanji. In the center stands an energetic teenage girl anime swordswoman, facing forward in a confident wide stance, smiling brightly with an open mouth and sparkling eyes. She has very long voluminous twin-tail hair in {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"}, with multicolored streaks of cyan, yellow, and lavender woven through the hair, and many decorative hair clips and ribbons, including small manga-themed tags. Her eye color is large and vivid pink-purple with glossy highlights. She wears a dark navy or black demon-slayer-inspired uniform with gold buttons, a white belt, loose tucked pants, white leg wraps printed with manga sound effects and doodles, and black platform sandals with pink straps. Over the uniform she wears a flowing haori whose entire outer surface is covered in black-and-white manga panels and graphic inked artwork, while the lining is bright pink. She holds 2 katanas: one raised across her shoulders in her right hand and one lowered in her left hand. Both swords have manga-decorated sheaths and hilts with pink accents, and one sheath includes bold Japanese lettering. Add small star-shaped sparkles around her. Surround her with flying loose manga pages and clipped comic panels, scattered diagonally across the composition as if blown by wind. Include 3 large manga sound-effect texts in pink and black: one "ドン!" at lower left, one "ドン!" near the lower right leg, and one "ドン" on the right side of the haori. Also include 2 speech-bubble callouts: one spiky bubble at upper right containing "!!" and one vertical spiky bubble at left containing Japanese dialogue. The background is a soft pink-and-white halftone and ink-splash pattern with dynamic speed lines radiating inward, giving the feel of a manga cover splash page. content: A joyful springtime Paris street scene in a richly textured impasto oil painting style, viewed at street level along a sunlit boulevard lined with blooming cherry blossom trees on the left and elegant cream-colored Haussmann buildings on the right. The sky is a vivid saturated blue with large soft white clouds, and pink petals drift through the air and scatter across the pavement. Include a black iron riverside railing and 1 tall vintage streetlamp on the left, bustling outdoor café terraces on the right with awnings and seated patrons, and a grand domed historic building in the distance centered down the avenue. Show a lively crowd of pedestrians strolling in warm weather, including 2 cyclists riding away from the viewer in the foreground and 1 woman in a flowing pink dress and sunhat walking beneath the blossoms. The mood should be bright, romantic, happy, and full of warmth. Use thick visible palette-knife brushstrokes, high color saturation, sunlight and dappled shadows, expressive painterly detail, and a wide cinematic composition that feels like an idyllic Parisian spring day.

content: A dramatic dark fantasy anime illustration in a towering vertical composition, viewed from a low angle. A lone ethereal warrior woman stands on the head of a gigantic roaring beast statue or slain monster in the foreground, her pose powerful and steady as she braces an enormous gothic cannon-lance or cathedral-like pillar weapon on her shoulder. The weapon is impossibly tall, blackened iron and stone with ornate spires and filigree, wrapped in glowing red chains, and its top is exploding with violent crimson fire, sparks, and shards. Behind her fills a colossal full moon with a luminous circular crosshair-like sigil etched across its surface, casting cold silver light through turbulent clouds. The woman has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="platinum white"} hair streaming hard to the right in the wind, and wears layered torn black-and-white ceremonial armor robes with feathered and tattered textures, mixing gothic knight, fallen angel, and priestess aesthetics. Her face is mostly obscured, making her feel mysterious and solemn. Surrounding her are ruined gothic cathedral towers, broken flying buttresses, shattered stained-glass fragments, drifting debris, and distant spires fading into a stormy moonlit sky. The palette is desaturated blue-gray, charcoal, silver, and violet, punctuated by intense red glow from the chains and muzzle flare. Rendered as ultra-detailed, high-contrast, painterly concept art with dynamic motion, cinematic lighting, sharp atmospheric perspective, intricate architectural destruction, and a slightly gritty, rough-textured finish that feels intentionally crunchy and dramatic. Emphasize epic scale, apocalyptic grandeur, wind-swept fabric, glowing embers, and a tragic holy-war atmosphere.
title: Moonlit Gothic Cannon Maiden
description: A dark fantasy anime key visual of a white-haired warrior carrying a blazing cathedral-like weapon amid ruined gothic architecture, ideal for epic poster art or cinematic concept illustration.

content: A warm, cozy anime-style illustration set inside a traditional Japanese mahjong parlor with polished wood walls, shoji-style windows, bookshelves, framed calligraphy, bottles, flowers, and soft amber ceiling lights. In the center foreground, a sad teenage boy with messy dark navy-black hair and tired eyes sits hunched on a chair, wearing a loose dark indigo hoodie and black pants, holding a ranking sheet close to his chest. The sheet prominently reads "11位" at the top, with a vertical list of placements beneath it and the bottom line reading "11位 神代トウマ". He looks embarrassed and defeated, with small sweat drops on his face and 4 vertical blue stress marks above his head. Behind him stands a cheerful young woman with wavy medium-length chestnut-brown hair, a white flower hairpin, and a cream ribbed sweater, smiling warmly and placing one hand on his shoulder. She wears a name tag that reads "雀和ソリ". Her speech bubble says "トウマくん、ドンマイだよ〜！ 次はきっとツイてるよ♡". To the left sits 1 young man with short dark hair in a white shirt, leaning in with one hand near his face, speaking supportively; his speech bubble says "内容は悪くなかったよ。 オーラスの押し引きもよかったし。". To the right sits 1 young woman in a dark blazer over a white shirt, with neat brown hair tied back, gently touching the central boy’s shoulder and speaking calmly; her speech bubble says "結果より内容が大事よ。 焦らず一歩ずつ進んでいきましょう。". Add 1 small muttering bubble near the central boy that says "うっ…". In the upper left, include a hanging wooden sign decorated with cherry blossoms that reads "雀和荘 ようこそ！". In the upper right, place 1 framed scoreboard on the wall titled "本日の麻雀結果" listing 4 ranking lines for 1位, 2位, 3位, 4位 as dotted blanks, and a final line reading "11位 神代トウマ". In the foreground, show 1 green mahjong table with visible rows of mahjong tiles, including a standing tile labeled "中", a small wooden marker labeled "ドラ", and 1 ceramic cup printed with "雀和荘". On the right front corner, add a small snack setup with 3 boxed sweets or candy packages, 1 bowl of snacks, and 1 small potted plant. Use a soft painterly anime aesthetic, detailed fabric folds, expressive eyes, rich warm lighting, gentle emotional contrast between encouragement and disappointment, and a polished visual-novel illustration feel.
title: Anime Mahjong Loss Consolation Scene
description: This prompt generates a warm indoor anime illustration of a defeated mahjong player being comforted by friends and staff, useful for visual novel scenes or emotional character art.

content: A highly detailed anime illustration of a messy pastel-pink bedroom seen from a high, slightly tilted top-down angle. In the center, a young woman lounges on a large pale pink inflatable chair or beanbag, her body stretched diagonally across the frame with her bare legs extended toward the back of the room and her head closer to the viewer. She has extremely long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="pink"} hair spilling dramatically over the edge of the seat and across the floor, luminous {argument name="eye color" default="green"} eyes, soft fair skin, and a relaxed, slightly dazed expression as she looks directly at the viewer. She wears a coordinated {argument name="outfit color" default="light pink"} loungewear outfit: an oversized jacket slipping loosely around her shoulders, a cropped knit camisole, and short drawstring shorts, all glossy and softly wrinkled in the sunlight. The room is saturated in warm late-afternoon sunlight filtered through a window on the upper left, casting bright bands of light and shadow across her body, the chair, and the cluttered floor. Surrounding her is an overwhelming cute-girly mess: scattered makeup bottles, lipsticks, compacts, tissues, shopping bags, plastic wrappers, drink bottles, cans, magazines, beauty products, accessories, and small boxes. In the background are pink drawers, shelves filled with books and manga, plush toys, and various decorative items. The entire image should feel indulgent, chaotic, intimate, and hyper-stylized, with a monochromatic pink palette, glossy textures, sparkling highlights, soft ambient haze, and polished anime rendering. Emphasize luxurious messiness, abundant small objects, realistic fabric folds, reflective packaging, and long hair strands rendered with exceptional detail.

content: A dramatic manga-style action illustration of a chaotic family apartment during a long holiday at home, shown in a wide cinematic interior shot with exaggerated perspective and motion lines. In the foreground right, a tired adult man in a wrinkled white T-shirt and dark pants slumps over a mop handle, head bowed on his arm, looking physically and emotionally exhausted. In the midground left, 1 wild child is captured midair launching off a torn sofa, wearing a loose red shirt and shorts, arms spread wide like a reckless dive, with explosive speed lines radiating behind him. In the center, 1 second child in a blue T-shirt and dark shorts runs forward through the wreckage with one fist raised, full of chaotic energy. In the background right, 1 adult woman with dark hair tied in a messy bun cooks frantically at the stove in an apron, surrounded by steam, splashing food, and towering stacks of dirty bowls and pots. The room is in total disarray: 1 damaged sofa with stuffing flying out, 1 television with a cracked screen, 1 toppled small table, 1 blue mop bucket, scattered trash, broken glass, papers, toys, food debris, and smeared mess all across the wooden floor. A sliding glass door or window in the back is visibly cracked, adding to the sense of destruction. Use gritty inked linework, rough painterly shading, desaturated browns and grays with muted reds and blues, highly detailed clutter, dynamic anatomy, and intense comic-book energy. The mood should contrast the idea of wanting to relax at home with the reality of nonstop domestic chaos, like an over-the-top Japanese manga cover about family exhaustion during vacation.
title: Chaotic Holiday at Home Manga Scene
description: This prompt generates a high-energy manga-style family chaos scene in a messy apartment, ideal for social posts or editorial art about stressful stay-at-home holidays.

title: Monochrome Fantasy Storyboard Sheet
description: Generates a Japanese-style black-and-white film storyboard page for a fictional fantasy movie trailer, useful for previsualization, pitch decks, and cinematic concept development.

content:
Create a cinematic {argument name="grid size" default="21-panel storyboard grid"} (3 columns × 7 rows) in a single image, styled like a professional sports photography sequence. Each panel is numbered 1–21 in the top-left corner with a bold white caption at the bottom in uppercase sans-serif text. The subject is a {argument name="subject" default="teenage female dancer"} (approximately 16–17 years old) performing a powerful {argument name="dance style" default="contemporary/hip-hop fusion"} routine on a dramatic stage with dark atmospheric lighting, spotlight beams, and bokeh crowd in the background. Cinematic color grade: deep blacks, warm amber highlights, motion blur on fast movements. Each frame feels like a high-budget editorial sports photography shot.
Panel sequence:
FIRST BREATH — She stands center stage, eyes closed, head down, hands relaxed at sides
THE BUILD — Slow chest rise, arms beginning to lift outward, tension in the body
EYES OPEN — Extreme close-up of her eyes snapping open, fierce and focused
FIRST MOVE — Sharp head isolation snap to the right, hair whipping mid-air
ARMS BREAK — Explosive arm wave rippling from shoulder to fingertip, motion blur
BODY ROLL — Full torso body roll in side profile, spine arching beautifully
FOOTWORK — Ground-level shot of fast footwork, sneakers kicking up dust/light particles
FLOOR HIT — She drops to the floor in a controlled krump-style chest drop
STAGE OPENS — Wide shot showing her isolated on vast dark stage, spotlight above
THE SPIN — Mid-spin, skirt or outfit fabric wrapping around her body in motion
FREEZE — Sudden sharp freeze pose, one arm extended, other cocked at 90°
GLIDE — Side view of a smooth slide/glide across the floor, low to ground
SLOW MOTION — Extreme close-up hands in slow graceful motion through the air
THE JUMP — Full airborne leap, legs split, arms wide, peak of the jump
THE LAND — Powerful landing, one knee down, dust particle explosion around her
ATTITUDE — Low angle looking up at her standing dominant, chin down, staring into camera
THE BREAKDOWN — Crowd in background reacts, silhouettes with raised hands
FINAL SEQUENCE — Multi-exposure ghost effect showing 3 overlapping positions
LAST EIGHT — Teammates/other dancers blur into frame behind her, energy building
THE FINALE — Full extension final pose, arms stretched to ceiling, head thrown back
UNFORGETTABLE — Wide cinematic shot, spotlight beam, smoke/haze, text overlay reads DANCE
Style references: Cinematic sports editorial, Adidas/Nike campaign aesthetic, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, 85mm lens feel, 4K ultra-sharp. Consistent character across all frames.
title: Cinematic Dance Routine Storyboard
description: A comprehensive 21-panel storyboard prompt for a teenage dancer's performance, styled after high-end sports campaign aesthetics.

content: A dark cinematic horror scene in a narrow rain-soaked urban alley at night, lit almost entirely by dim blue-black ambient light and a warm vertical Japanese hotel sign in the background. The sign glows on the left side and reads ホテル, with smaller vertical text beneath it, while distant city lights blur into soft bokeh through the heavy rain. In the foreground on the right, a {argument name="character type" default="young woman"} sits on the flooded ground with her back against a wet wall, knees bent and head hanging forward in exhaustion or despair. She has soaked shoulder-length dark hair plastered to her face and neck, a black wet jacket, a short plaid skirt, and chunky black lace-up combat boots. Her skin and clothing glisten with rain, and the shallow water on the ground reflects the neon sign and scattered highlights. Looming behind her in the center-left is a tall hooded grim reaper silhouette, draped in long ragged black robes that dissolve into shredded strands, holding one large curved scythe arcing above its head. Keep the reaper mostly in silhouette with only a faint rim light so it feels ghostly and threatening. The overall composition should be vertical, with 2 visible figures total: 1 seated woman and 1 reaper apparition. Style: hyper-realistic cinematic horror, moody noir atmosphere, high contrast, extremely dark shadows, wet textures, volumetric rain, reflective pavement, subtle filmic grain, ominous tension, photoreal lighting. Color palette: near-black, deep navy, muted charcoal, and warm amber highlights from the sign. No gore, no extra people, no daylight, no bright colors, no text overlays except the distant hotel sign.
title: Rainy Alley Grim Reaper Horror Scene
description: A moody cinematic horror image of a soaked woman in a neon-lit alley with a looming grim reaper, suited for dark thriller posters or atmospheric AI art.

content: A vintage single-panel comic illustration in a mid-century newspaper-cartoon style, showing an anthropomorphic red lobster standing on a wooden dock by the sea and posing like a bodybuilder. The lobster is the only character and fills most of the frame, facing slightly left with an angry, proud expression, narrowed eyes, long curved antennae, whisker-like mouth feelers, huge exaggerated claws, an enormous hyper-muscular torso, oversized biceps, thick chest, and a sharply defined six-pack and obliques. One claw is raised in a flexing pose near a large speech bubble. The speech bubble in the upper left contains exactly this hand-lettered text in bold black comic lettering: “I YAM WHAT I YAM! and I YAM RIPPED!” with “RIPPED!” emphasized larger and underlined. At the lobster’s feet, slightly left of center, place 1 opened can labeled “SPINACH” with green spinach visible inside and the lid peeled back. The dock includes 1 wooden mooring post wrapped with rope on the far left. In the background, show calm blue water, a bright blue sky, and 4 fluffy white clouds spread across the top area. On the far right background across the water, include 1 small cannery or factory building on pilings with a sign reading “SPINACH” and 2 smokestacks, one releasing a puff of gray smoke. Render it with flat comic colors, bold black outlines, slightly aged paper texture, light ink imperfections, and a humorous parody tone reminiscent of 1930s–1950s Popeye-era animation art.
title: Muscle Lobster Spinach Comic
description: This prompt generates a humorous retro comic-style illustration of a hyper-muscular lobster on a dock bragging about being ripped after eating spinach, ideal for parody cartoon art.

content: A dramatic vertical anime key visual poster for an original TV series titled {argument name="title text" default="ナイトコード：リベラシオン"}, with the English subtitle "Nightcode: Liberation" placed directly beneath the large Japanese logo at the top center. The composition shows 2 main characters standing back to back in a neon cyber city at night. On the left is a slim teenage boy in side profile facing left, with messy black hair, pale skin, sharp violet eyes, and a serious expression, wearing a dark high-collar school-uniform-style jacket. On the right foreground is a slim teenage girl shown from the chest up, facing slightly right but turning away from the boy; her face is obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur block, but her body and hair are fully visible. She has extremely long split-color hair, half pastel pink and half dark charcoal gray, styled in loose flowing lengths with a side ponytail on the dark side, and she wears a white sailor school blouse with navy trim, oversized sleeves, a large hot-pink ribbon bow, and a dark pleated skirt. The background is a dense futuristic nighttime skyline with glowing windows, magenta and cyan city lights, haze, lens flares, bokeh, and subtle star-like particles, creating a moody urban fantasy atmosphere. Use a high-contrast palette of black, indigo, violet, cyan, and neon pink, with halftone dot textures in the upper-right and lower-left corners. Add stylized Japanese promotional copy throughout the poster: a short tagline in small text along the top, a vertical slogan on the right side, a circular badge on the left reading {argument name="release month text" default="今夏 7月 放送開始!"}, a left column of staff credits in small Japanese text, a lower-left cast block, a bold large tagline across the bottom reading {argument name="bottom tagline" default="二重人格×魔法×青春＝偽りの救世主、開幕。"}, and small official website and social handle text near the lower right. The logo should be luminous, elegant, and slightly fractured, with a supernatural cyber-magic feel. Render in polished modern anime poster style, cinematic lighting, crisp line art, glossy shading, premium promotional visual design, highly detailed hair and fabric folds, with the central mood of dual identity, magic, adolescence, and a false savior emerging in the neon night.
title: Neon Anime Poster with Dual-Protagonist Mood
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime promotional poster for a supernatural cyber-school series, ideal for key visuals, mock TV anime announcements, or fictional franchise branding.

Ink masses form a circular vortex around the calm cat.","camera":"wide centered shot"},{"title":"CUT9：バレットタイム解除","scene":"Extreme close-up of the cat's face and shoulder, intense eyes looking forward, red scarf prominent, signaling the end of bullet time.","camera":"extreme close-up"},{"title":"CUT10：全敵、爆散","scene":"A massive panoramic detonation as every frozen enemy bursts at once into black ink, bright {argument name=\"neon accent colors\" default=\"magenta, cyan, and violet\"} paint, and explosive splashes radiating outward from the tiny centered hero.","camera":"ultra-wide panoramic shot"},{"title":"CUT11：余韻","scene":"After the explosion, the battlefield becomes quiet again. The cat stands victorious in a broad ink-wash landscape with residual neon color streaks fading into the mist.","camera":"wide heroic epilogue shot"}],"text":{"header language":"Japanese","captions":"each panel has white Japanese title text on black bars and a short explanatory sentence below the image area"},"rendering":{"aspect ratio":"16:9 overall sheet","finish":"polished storyboard illustration, concept-art quality, expressive ink splashes, seamless visual continuity between panels"}}

content:
K-Pop Dance 16-Step Instruction Sheet (4×4 Grid)

[VISUAL STYLE]
High-end K-pop choreography guide in monochrome grayscale
Crisp, studio-lit composition with strong contrast
Modern, editorial + performance aesthetic
Clean white background, no distractions

[GRID LAYOUT, STRICT]
{argument name="layout" default="4×4 grid (16 equal panels)"}
Thin black divider lines
Each panel clearly numbered 1–16
Top-left: Step number + short title
Bottom-left: 3–4 short instruction lines
Overlay: arrows + motion guides (curved, straight, circular)

[CHARACTER]
{argument name="dancer description" default="Korean female dancer (K-pop idol look)"}
Slim, athletic build
Long styled hair (soft waves or straight, dynamic movement)
Confident, expressive K-pop performance energy
Same character across all 16 panels (consistent face and proportions)

[WARDROBE  K-POP STYLE]
{argument name="outfit" default="Fitted crop top, high-waisted loose-fit jeans, and sneakers"}
Outfit should feel trendy, idol-stage inspired
Fabric reacts naturally to motion (subtle folds, movement)

🔢 [16 DANCE STEPS, SEQUENCE FLOW]
Starting Pose
Step Touch Right
Step Touch Left
Hip Sway Combo
Body Roll Down
Back Step Sweep
Quarter Turn Pivot
Hair Flip & Pose
Side Step Drag
Cross Behind Unwind
Body Wave Up
Hip Circle
Step Lock Step
Arm Sweep Pose
Chest Pop & Hit
Final Pose

[PANEL STRUCTURE,  EACH FRAME]
Center: full-body pose (clear choreography position)
Bottom-left: short bullet instructions (clean typography)
Motion arrows showing direction, spins, and flow
Emphasize rhythm, weight shift, and sharp K-pop accents

[MOTION STYLE]
Mix of sharp hits + smooth transitions (K-pop signature)
Clean isolations (hips, chest, arms)
Expressive poses with attitude

[RENDER QUALITY]
Ultra-detailed, high-resolution
Sharp anatomy and pose clarity
Smooth grayscale shading
No blur, no distortion, no clutter

[RESTRICTIONS]
No background elements
No extra characters
No color (strict grayscale)
Maintain clean instructional aesthetic
title: K-Pop Choreography Instruction Sheet
description: Generates a 16-panel instructional grid for K-pop dance, including arrows, labels, and consistent character poses.

content: A cinematic, photorealistic portrait of a {argument name="ethnicity" default="Japanese"} woman dancing at an opulent Rokumeikan-era ballroom reception in late 19th-century Japan, shown from about the waist up in a three-quarter pose and turning slightly to her left. She wears an elegant {argument name="dress color" default="champagne beige"} Victorian-inspired evening gown with a tightly fitted corseted bodice, soft sheen satin fabric, layered lace ruffles along the neckline and shoulders, decorative buttons and floral trim on the front, and long matching opera gloves. Her hair is dark and styled in a refined formal updo with curled sections and a delicate jeweled hair ornament, and she wears drop earrings plus layered necklaces with a small pendant. She holds a folded fan or small clutch in one gloved hand near her waist. The setting is a grand historic ballroom with warm amber gaslight or chandelier lighting, shallow depth of field, and a softly blurred crowd of exactly 4 visible background guests in formal attire: 2 women and 2 men. Behind her are dark-suited gentlemen, women in period dresses, and a large floral arrangement, all rendered as elegant bokeh shapes. The mood is romantic, nostalgic, and luxurious, with rich sepia-gold tones, soft cinematic contrast, realistic skin and fabric textures, and the feeling of a graceful dance at {argument name="venue style" default="Rokumeikan"}. Compose it like a high-end historical film still, vertical portrait framing, centered heroine, natural posture, poised and aristocratic.
title: Rokumeikan Ballroom Portrait
description: This prompt generates a cinematic historical portrait of an elegant woman in a Meiji-era Western ballroom, ideal for period-drama visuals and nostalgic luxury scenes.

content:
Create a glossy Japanese weekly shonen manga magazine cover in the style of a high-energy commercial comic anthology, with a dense, crowded layout, explosive typography, and dramatic cover-line design. The cover is portrait orientation, dominated by a huge red masthead at the top with thick black outlines and yellow accents, plus a secondary English subtitle reading “WEEKLY JUMP.” Add many Japanese teaser blurbs, issue-number boxes, starbursts, side callouts, and circular inset previews arranged around the main character, mimicking a real manga magazine cover packed with text and hype. Place issue details in the upper right, including a date and a large issue number, and add multiple bright promotional banners in yellow, red, white, and black.

Main subject: a handsome anime-style teenage boy martial artist in the center, shown from the waist up in a strong fighting stance with both fists thrust toward the viewer. He has messy layered {argument name="hair color" default="golden blond"} hair with long bangs partly covering one eye, sharp amber eyes, a confident smirk, and several ear piercings. He wears a soft white panda hat with black ears and panda eye patches on top, and a vivid red Chinese kung fu shirt with black frog closures and black trim, featuring a large black dragon motif on the chest. His pose should feel dynamic and confrontational, as if ready to strike, with foreshortened fists filling the foreground.

Background: a warm, slightly blurred traditional East Asian street or interior market scene with wooden beams, lantern-like red accents, and golden ambient lighting, kept soft so the character and typography dominate. Use fiery yellow energy bursts, black ink splashes, speed-line accents, and paint-like brush effects around the lower half of the cover to amplify impact.

Typography and cover-line design: include 1 giant vertical brush-calligraphy slogan on the left, 1 very large main title across the lower center in aggressive black and red kanji-style lettering, 1 smaller horizontal tagline beneath it in white and yellow, 1 yellow burst in the lower left promoting circulation or sales, 1 red banner near the lower right promoting a special feature, 1 large yellow-and-green feature box in the upper right, and 2 circular inset character preview portraits stacked along the right side with short Japanese teaser text next to each. Also include 1 small skull-emblem graphic near the top center-right integrated into the masthead area. The overall look must feel like a bestselling action manga issue focused on a new martial-arts series titled {argument name="series title" default="龍拳の咆哮"}, with the lead character {argument name="character name" default="Yume"} presented as a breakout shonen hero. Ultra-saturated colors, crisp anime rendering, polished print-cover finish, dramatic contrast, and authentic magazine-cover composition.
title: Shonen Manga Magazine Cover
description: A flashy faux Japanese weekly manga cover featuring a martial-arts anime hero, useful for generating commercial-style magazine parody art or cover mockups.

content: A dramatic Japanese anime movie poster in a dark action-thriller style, vertically composed like a theatrical one-sheet. The background is a school campus and city street engulfed in flames at night, with blazing orange fire, black smoke, flying embers, shattered structures, rain-slick pavement, and a cinematic apocalyptic atmosphere. In the top half, show 2 large opposing character close-ups in profile facing inward: on the left, a teenage boy with tousled medium brown hair, pale skin, and a serious expression, wearing a dark school uniform jacket and white shirt; on the right, a teenage girl with long dark hair tied back, pale skin, and an intense expression, also in a school uniform with a red ribbon at the collar. Between them, place a reflective knife blade angled upward, catching the firelight. Add a vertical Japanese tagline in the upper center, white serif text, reading {argument name="tagline text" default="この夏、隠された絆が運命を変える―"}. Across the middle, place a huge layered title in Japanese with distressed metallic texture, heavy cinematic typography, motion slashes, sparks, and red-to-blue contrast, reading {argument name="main title" default="私立 あかつき学園"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle above it reading "絆とスパイと夏". Directly below, add the English subtitle in bold silver blockbuster lettering: {argument name="english subtitle" default="THE SUMMER WITH SHADOW BONDS"}. In the bottom half, show 1 full-body action scene of a determined teenage schoolgirl riding a blue sport motorcycle at high speed through the burning campus street. She has short brown hair whipping in the wind, a fierce focused stare, a short-sleeved white school shirt, loosened red tie, plaid skirt, fingerless black gloves, and black shoes. Her pose is low and aggressive over the handlebars, as if in pursuit or escape. The motorcycle is sleek and angular with bright headlights and visible decals including "Shinobi" on the fairing and "250R" on the exhaust. Include 1 pursuing police car with flashing red and blue lights in the right background. At the very bottom, add small Japanese film-credit style text lines and a release line in gold and white reading {argument name="release line" default="2025.夏 ROADSHOW"}. Use ultra-detailed anime illustration, high contrast lighting, glossy reflections, dramatic rim light, intense orange-and-blue color grading, dynamic perspective, premium modern anime poster design, and the polished look of a high-budget theatrical key visual.
title: Burning Anime School Thriller Poster
description: A high-impact anime-style movie poster featuring rival students, a burning campus, and a motorcycle chase, ideal for blockbuster film key art or promotional concept posters.

content: A dramatic anime-style Japanese movie poster set in the middle of a modern downtown street canyon under bright afternoon sunlight, with tall office buildings on both sides, dense overhead utility wires, vertical Japanese shop and company signs, and a cinematic vanishing point down the road. In the foreground, two high school girls stand full-body in confident hero poses, framed low-angle like blockbuster poster key art. The girl on the left is slightly taller, with very long black hair flowing in the wind, styled half-up in a bun with a white flower hair ornament, arms crossed, serious and composed expression, wearing a navy school blazer with gold buttons, white shirt, red necktie, and a red plaid pleated skirt. She has bare legs and shiny black loafers. The girl on the right has a short light-brown bob haircut, a softer but determined expression, and holds up a peace sign with her right hand. She wears a matching navy blazer, white shirt, red tie, and red plaid pleated skirt, with navy knee-high socks and brown loafers. Make both characters elegant, stylish, and slightly idealized in polished contemporary anime illustration with crisp linework, rich cel-shading, glossy highlights, and subtle wind movement in hair and clothing. Use strong contrast, blue sky with scattered white clouds, warm sunlit rim light, long street shadows, and a high-budget action-drama poster mood. Add large layered title typography across the lower center, mixing Japanese and English in a bold distressed blockbuster style. Include 1 Japanese tagline above the main title reading "一命と絆とスパイー". Include 1 large Japanese main title reading "私立あかつき学園" with white, red, and cyan-blue emphasis. Include 1 English subtitle block below and overlapping it reading "THE SPY WHO FORGOT THE BONDS" in bold white condensed letters with gritty texture, with the word "SPY" especially large and dominant. The overall composition should feel like a fictional action-school-spy film poster, vertical format, highly polished, dynamic, and theatrical.
title: Anime School Spy Movie Poster
description: A cinematic vertical anime poster showing two schoolgirls in a Japanese city street with bold bilingual title text, ideal for fake movie poster or promotional key art generation.

content:
Create a clean, bright {argument name="product type" default="skincare commercial"} storyboard in a 16:9 layout with 9 panels. Use soft natural lighting, minimal aesthetic, and a fresh, airy mood with white and pastel tones. The {argument name="subject" default="main character is a young woman with soft makeup and styled hair"}, wearing light, elegant clothing. The setting is a modern, sunlit interior with large windows and a calm atmosphere. No text or subtitles anywhere.
Show a clear story flow: she starts at her desk looking slightly tired or concerned, then a close-up of her face showing dry or dull skin. She discovers a clear skincare bottle and gently presents it. Show a close-up of the liquid pouring onto her hand, followed by her applying it to her face. After use, her skin looks hydrated, glowing, and smooth. Transition to her feeling confident and refreshed, walking in a bright, clean space with soft breeze and flowing elements. End with a calm product beauty shot on a minimal surface, then a final frame of her smiling softly at the camera while holding the product.
Focus on natural expressions, glowing skin, and a transformation from dull to fresh. Include cinematic close-ups, soft focus, light reflections, and subtle sparkles to enhance the clean beauty feel. Keep everything elegant, minimal, and visually soothing with no branding text.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base character sheet, redesign the same male student into a fictional Japanese dark-bureaucratic fantasy worldbuilding dossier. Keep his core body type, hairstyle, and face structure consistent, but replace the school uniform concept with 3 official role variants presented as a professional concept-art document on aged white paper with thin grid lines, black ink, muted grayscale, and deep red accent marks. Create a 3-column layout labeled 01, 02, and 03, each showing full-body front, side, and back views of the same character reimagined for a different job. Role 01 should be a tax collection officer in a long black coat with hanging paperwork, armband, shoulder straps, leather belts, and a compact case. Role 02 should be an arcane audit scribe with glasses, layered robe-like outerwear over formal clothes, dangling seals and inspection documents, a ledger or clipboard, writing tools, and a briefcase. Role 03 should be a sealed artifact courier with a military-style cap, face covering, heavier protective coat, straps, tags, and a large transport case plus a backpack-like cargo unit. Add vertical Japanese side notes beside each role, dense bureaucratic labels, official insignias, stamps, serial numbers, and small English sublabels for the role names. At the bottom, include 3 equipment sections, one under each column: for role 01 show exactly 3 items — a hard case, an official stamp, and 2 paper forms; for role 02 show exactly 4 items — a black device/ledger panel, a set of 4 pens, a tray of 6 seal sticks or cartridges, and 1 blue handbook; for role 03 show exactly 4 items — a transport chest, 2 paper tags/forms, 3 hanging sealing tools, and 2 circular sealing tools plus 1 document card. Include an additional footer strip with exactly 4 color swatches, exactly 3 insignia emblems, a notice block, and publication/record information boxes. Overall style: high-end anime concept sheet mixed with occult government archive design, meticulous costume detailing, restrained composition, realistic textile rendering, and a serious institutional mood.
