content:
Dance Sequence Instruction Sheet [VISUAL STYLE] {argument name="visual style" default="Monochrome grayscale composition"} featuring a highly detailed 3D-rendered {argument name="subject" default="female dancer"}. Designed like a professional choreography guide with a technical, diagram-inspired layout. Clean white background, soft studio lighting, and strong contrast to highlight body movement and posture. 
[GRID LAYOUT] Structured 4×4 panel grid (16 frames total), evenly spaced with thin black divider lines. Each panel is identical in size and clearly numbered from 1 to 16 to show a continuous dance progression. [CHARACTER] Use image1 as the base character. The same {argument name="subject" default="female dancer"} appears consistently across all panels with accurate likeness and proportions. [WARDROBE] The dancer wears a stylish, performance-ready outfit: {argument name="outfit" default="a well-fitted top paired with a short, flowy skirt"}. The look should feel modern and visually appealing while still practical for dance movement. Fabric should subtly respond to motion (slight flow and folds), even in grayscale. [PANEL STRUCTURE – EACH FRAME] Top-left: Step number + short dance move title (e.g., “Step 5 – Spin Transition”) Center: Full-body pose capturing a precise moment in the choreography Bottom-left: 3–4 lines of concise instruction describing the move Overlay: Motion arrows and directional guides illustrating how the dancer transitions [MOTION INDICATORS] Incorporate curved arrows for fluid motion, straight arrows for directional steps, and circular indicators for spins or turns. Emphasize rhythm, weight shifts, and body isolation. [RENDER QUALITY] High-detail sculpted 3D style with smooth grayscale shading, subtle shadows, and clean linework. Maintain a polished, concept-art level finish with clarity in every pose. [RESTRICTIONS] No color, no background scenery, no extra characters, no visual clutter—only the dancer and instructional elements.
title: Choreography Instruction Sheet Generator
description: A technical prompt for creating professional dance sequence guides in a 4x4 grid layout, maintaining character consistency from a reference image.

content: A 4-panel comic strip in bold retro Sunday funnies / 1980s pop-art style, thick black outlines, halftone textures, vibrant saturated colors (hot pink, cyan, yellow, teal), dynamic comic lettering. Main character: A stylish young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="wavy mint-green"} hair, wearing oversized black sunglasses and a {argument name="clothing" default="pink polka-dot strapless top"}. Confident expression, glossy lips, dramatic lighting. Secondary character: A cute chibi-style character in a full penguin costume (dark blue body, white belly, yellow beak hood), big sparkling eyes, small body, playful and mischievous vibe. Panel 1 (close-up, bold intro): Zoomed-in portrait of the woman, hair slightly blowing. Bright comic burst background. Text: “THE WIND IS NO MATCH FOR MY SHADES!” Speech bubble: “Bring it, breeze.” Panel 2 (beach chaos begins): Beach setting with strong wind—palm trees bending, hat, towel, and drink flying. Woman standing confidently. Penguin character appears at the side. Text box: “BEACH DAY!” Speech bubble: “Ha! Nice try, wind.” Small penguin text: “awk!” Panel 3 (wind intensifies): Stronger gusts—trash can tipping, seagull mid-air, debris flying. Woman still composed, hair dramatically flowing. Penguin laughing mischievously. Text box: “STRONGER!” Speech bubbles: “Is that all?” / penguin: “hee hee!” Panel 4 (final punchline): Reveal a big electric fan wearing sunglasses blasting air dramatically. Woman surprised. Penguin proudly next to fan. Text box: “ULTIMATE BOSS.” Speech bubbles: “Wait… no!” Big comic text: “YOU GOT BLOWN AWAY!” Caption at bottom: “RESPECT THE FAN.”

content:
A dramatic dark fantasy mecha lineup on a black smoky studio-like background, rendered as ultra-detailed concept art with a wide cinematic composition. Show exactly 6 sinister biomechanical figures standing side by side on a glossy reflective floor, all designed as parts or forms of a combining robot set. The overall design language is gothic, infernal, and baroque: blackened steel, tarnished silver armor, serrated edges, thorn-like protrusions, skeletal filigree, red glowing cores and eyes, with subtle white-metal highlights and traces of crimson energy. The mood is ominous, majestic, and apocalyptic.

From left to right: first, a towering humanoid overlord mech, the largest figure in the lineup, with a crown-like halo ring behind the head, huge layered black feathered or blade-like wings draping downward, ornate chest armor with a bright central core, multiple red glowing orbs embedded asymmetrically, and a long staff or spear held diagonally. Second, a tall slender angelic-demonic humanoid mech with an elongated body, spiked antler-like crest, narrow waist, blade-like hanging armor panels, and red glowing shoulder nodes, posed upright and regal. Third, a beast unit on four legs, low and aggressive like a demonic wolf or draconic hound, covered in curved blade armor and long swept-back horns, with glowing red eyes and an arched tail or spine silhouette. Fourth, a heavy quadruped siege unit, bulkier and more armored, with a forward head assembly and two large circular shield-like wheel structures mounted on its sides, full of radial spikes and a glowing red core at the center of one wheel. Fifth, a centaur-like or upright beast warrior mech with long legs, layered armor, horned head, and a sharp avian-draconic profile, slimmer than the heavy unit but still imposing, with red lights in the chest and head. Sixth, a symmetrical winged emblem-like unit resembling a mechanical phoenix crest rather than a humanoid body, with two broad metallic wings spread outward around a central halo ring and a tapered hanging tail piece set with 3 visible red gem-like cores.

Keep the palette nearly monochrome except for the glowing reds. Emphasize razor-sharp silhouettes, intricate engravings, layered armor plates, cables and skeletal mechanical details, smoke drifting behind the figures, and faint reflections beneath their feet. The image should feel like a premium concept sheet for a {argument name="theme" default="dark combining robot"} in the style of hyper-detailed dark fantasy sci-fi illustration. Use a panoramic aspect ratio, front-facing lineup presentation, and high contrast lighting that picks out metallic edges against the deep black background.

content: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a fashionable fox-eared young man sitting casually on the edge of a floating industrial platform in a vast vertical steampunk city. He has messy layered {argument name="hair color" default="light blond"} hair with a small streak of deep magenta near one side, 2 large fox ears with pale inner fur, and a fluffy cream-colored fox tail curling behind him. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat square censor block centered over the face. He wears a glossy black bomber jacket embroidered with scattered floral patterns in 2 colors, red-pink and violet-blue, with ribbed cuffs and collar striped in dark red and black. Under it is a black graphic T-shirt with ornate gold lettering and emblem details, partially hidden by layered straps and necklaces. His outfit includes loose black cargo-style pants with zipper details, black socks with small gold lettering, and chunky black platform shoes with bright magenta laces. Add multiple silver rings, black suspenders or harness straps with metal buckles, and a long olive-gold hanging belt strap draped off the platform. Pose him in a relaxed seated posture with 1 knee raised and 1 leg extended diagonally downward, left arm resting over the raised knee and right hand planted beside him. The mood is cool, urban, and slightly rebellious. The background is an intricate labyrinth of towering pale teal and off-white mechanical structures, stacked platforms, scaffolding, hanging chains, exposed cables, suspended boxes, and several round clocks embedded in the architecture, creating a dense vertical futuristic-steampunk environment fading into atmospheric haze. Use soft daylight, muted pastel industrial colors, fine linework, delicate ink-and-watercolor rendering, crisp fabric highlights, and a polished contemporary anime illustration aesthetic.

The character is a youthful, ethereal kemonomimi girl with 2 fluffy squirrel ears, 1 large fluffy tail, and long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-blonde"} hair whipping in the wind, posed diagonally across the frame as if gliding or floating through the sky with both arms stretched wide. She wears an intricate, shimmering translucent outfit in {argument name="outfit color" default="iridescent pastel white"}: a jewel-studded fantasy dress with sheer cape-like fabric, delicate straps, frilled shorts, glossy thigh-high stockings, ornate bracelets, gemstone ornaments, and light lace-up shoes. Emphasize highly reflective soap-bubble aesthetics throughout: exactly 18 visible bubbles of varying size floating around her, each with rainbow iridescence, sparkling highlights, and glassy reflections, with additional tiny star-like glints scattered across the scene. The fabrics should look pearlescent and almost bubble-made, with intense prismatic light, glitter, and a polished high-detail gpt-image-2 anime finish. Bright saturated blue sky, fluffy white clouds, crisp sunlight, detailed urban skyline, lush green trees, and a magical airy sense of motion and freedom. Make it feel dazzling, expensive, ornate, whimsical, and celebratory, with the composition centered on the flying character crossing the cityscape in a burst of bubbles and light.

content: A dark fantasy gothic poster in a vertical composition, painted in a highly detailed anime-inspired style with dramatic lighting and rich texture. At the center is a beautiful young woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair, pale skin, and an elegant, calm but dangerous presence. Her face is mostly obscured in shadow and mystery. She wears an ornate black-and-deep-blue crystalline dress with lace, feathered and jagged organic details, semi-transparent flowing sleeves, and glowing blue highlights across the bodice and collar, as if infused with magic. Her right hand is raised slightly with an open gesture, while her left hand rests lower near her waist. Surrounding and partly growing from her are luminous blue butterflies and shard-like petals, creating a sense of transformation and corruption. Behind her looms a gigantic monstrous entity made of darkness, ink, smoke, and cosmic texture, with exactly 7 glowing blue eyes visible and a huge fanged grin packed with sharp icy-blue teeth. The creature feels Lovecraftian, predatory, and intimate, curling around her like a guardian, curse, or inner demon. The palette is dominated by black, midnight navy, indigo, and electric blue, with sparkling highlights like stars or wet paint splatter. Add a decorative antique silver filigree border in all 4 corners and along the edges, making it feel like a sinister book cover or exhibition poster. Place large Japanese title text at the top: {argument name="title text" default="私の中のバケモノ"}. Add 8 blocks of vertical Japanese copy around the figure, 4 on the left and 4 on the right, in elegant white Mincho-style type. Left side text blocks, top to bottom: 「創造の源、すべてを壊し、すべてを生む。」, 「正しさよりも、心が動く瞬間を信じる。」, 「美しいものに飢えている。」, 「静けさの中で、世界をかき混ぜる。」. Right side text blocks, top to bottom: 「感情を深く、人の痛みも、希望も、まるごと抱きしめる。」, 「枠を壊し、誰も見たことのない景色を描きたい。」, 「怖い、危ない、それでも止められない。」, plus a short atmospheric handwritten-style accent near the mid-right edge. At the lower center, add a large Japanese question line: {argument name="bottom question" default="これは、力？それとも、呪い？"}. At the very bottom, add a smaller Japanese line: {argument name="tagline text" default="私の中のバケモノは、私だけの物語を待っている。"}. Make the whole image feel obsessive, beautiful, unsettling, and emotionally intense, like a high-end dark art poster about inner monsters and creative power.

content: A dramatic vertical fantasy anime illustration of a kneeling female knight in side profile, centered slightly right, holding a massive upright greatsword with both armored hands as if in prayer or solemn resolve. She has very long flowing hair in {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"}, smooth and luminous, cascading down her back almost to the ground. Her face is mostly hidden by the side angle and lowered head, giving a quiet, introspective mood. She wears sleek reflective metallic armor in {argument name="armor color" default="deep cobalt blue"}, highly polished with glossy highlights, including sculpted shoulder plates, long armored gauntlets, a fitted breastplate with exposed side torso cutouts, a segmented waist guard, and thigh-high armored boots. The lower outfit is a short pleated armored skirt in matching blue metal. Her physique is slim and elegant, with a stylized anime beauty aesthetic. The sword is tall, dark steel with a broad blade and ornate crossguard, extending vertically from the ground near the left side of the image to above the frame. The pose is one-knee kneeling, torso upright, head slightly bowed toward the sword, conveying reverence, mourning, or determination. Set in a ruined stone corridor or ancient city passage with towering blurred walls on both sides, soft fog, floating dust motes, and a cold blue-white backlight pouring from above and behind, creating rim light around her hair and armor. Add subtle debris near the ground, cinematic depth of field, high contrast reflections, ethereal atmosphere, ultra-detailed surfaces, polished metal shading, and a premium heroic dark-fantasy mood in the style of {argument name="illustration style" default="high-detail cinematic anime key art"}.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the couple base, place the same man and woman into a warm, luxurious modern high-rise apartment interior and generate an 8-cut collage storyboard focused on both the people and the interior design. Keep their relationship, approximate age, build, hairstyle, and all-white loungewear feeling consistent, but restage them naturally across the apartment at golden hour into evening. Use a cinematic lifestyle/architectural photography look with soft amber lighting, large floor-to-ceiling windows, expansive city skyline views, beige and wood-toned furnishings, and a calm upscale mood. Arrange the collage as 8 equal panels in a clean grid with thin white dividers. Include exactly these 8 scenes: 1) the couple cooking together at the kitchen island, 2) the couple seen from behind sitting on the sofa watching TV at night, 3) the couple sitting together on the sofa in daylight, 4) the couple standing together from behind looking out the window at sunset, 5) an empty wide shot of the living room and dining area with skyline view, 6) the woman sitting alone on the sofa near the kitchen, 7) the couple talking near the kitchen island, 8) an empty sunset wide shot of the living room with sofa, dining counter, TV wall, and skyline. Prioritize interior styling and spatial continuity, with magazine-like composition and realistic photo textures.

content: A black-and-white manga comic panel in a clean seinen/anime style, showing 4 girls from a rock band sitting side by side in a cramped music studio right after an electrical accident, with a chaotic body-swap theme. Large hand-lettered title text at the top reads {argument name="headline text" default="BODY SWAP PANIC!"}. The scene is framed as a single wide panel with dramatic speed lines and comic energy. From left to right: girl 1 is a short-haired shy girl in a black band T-shirt and dark pants, staring at her hand and speaking in shock, with a speech bubble that says {argument name="left speech" default="EH?! MY VOICE!?"}; girl 2 is a calm, expressionless blonde girl with long straight hair, wearing a black band T-shirt, scarf, and plaid pants, sitting with one hand on her hip and saying in a smaller speech bubble, "Hmm. This is... loud."; girl 3 is a flustered cheerful girl with medium-length hair in a black band T-shirt and long skirt, blushing, sweating, clutching her hands near her mouth, with a large speech bubble that says {argument name="center speech" default="H-H-HEEEEH?! I'M KITA-CHAN?!"}; girl 4 is a long-haired girl in a zip hoodie and skirt, sitting rigidly with arms crossed and eyes squeezed shut, complaining in a tall speech bubble that says {argument name="right speech" default="BOCCHI-CHAN'S BODY IS SO... CRAMPED!"}. All 4 girls have small circular inset head icons above or near them showing whose mind is inside whose body, for a body-swap explanation device. The band shirts have a simple Japanese logo on the chest. Background shows exactly 3 visible studio elements: a drum kit in the back, an amplifier or speaker cabinet, and cables or equipment edges around the floor and sides. Use monochrome screentone shading, halftone textures, blush marks, sweat drops, bold ink outlines, and expressive manga lettering. The mood is comedic panic, awkward confusion, and post-shock chaos in a rehearsal room. Composition should feel crowded, readable, and like a fan comic inspired by {argument name="series" default="Bocchi the Rock!"}.
title: Manga Body Swap Band Panic
description: This prompt generates a black-and-white anime-style comedy manga panel of four band girls reacting to a chaotic body swap in a music studio, ideal for fan comics and humorous character-swap scenes.

content: A black-and-white manga comic panel in a dramatic shonen gag style, showing {argument name="band name on shirts" default="結束バンド"} girls from a high school rock band getting shocked by an overloaded guitar amp during practice. The composition is a single wide panel with 4 girls arranged around a large amplifier in the foreground center, crackling with electricity, smoke, sparks, glowing energy, and jagged lightning bolts wrapping around the scene. Use screentone shading, halftone textures, bold inked outlines, speed-line energy, exaggerated shocked expressions, and chaotic comedy timing. On the far left, 1 partially obscured girl is seated, her face mostly hidden behind a tall rectangular narration box; she wears a dark band T-shirt and dark pants, with one arm bent upward in surprise. Near left-center, 1 girl with long light hair and straight bangs, wearing a dark band T-shirt and a large bow at the collar, stares with spiral eyes and a panicked open mouth, holding one finger up near her lips as if frozen in confusion. Near right-center, 1 shorter girl with messy medium-length dark hair and spiral eyes recoils with both hands raised to her mouth, also wearing a dark band T-shirt. On the far right, 1 long-haired girl in a light zip-up track jacket and skirt sits rigidly with knees together, eyes wide and spiraled, mouth agape, sweat on her face, leaning back in alarm. The amplifier dominates the lower middle, seen front-on with a row of exactly 8 control knobs, a cable plugged into the left side, a cable plugged into the right side, and a small power switch area on the right; bright electrical arcs erupt from the top panel. Include exactly 4 speech or narration text areas: a tall narration box on the upper left reading {argument name="left narration" default="until that day at practice, when the amp overloaded"}, a jagged speech balloon near the lower left reading {argument name="lower left exclamation" default="IT'S ELEC-TRIFIED!"}, a large balloon above the left-center girl reading {argument name="center scream" default="GYAAH!"}, and a large balloon on the upper right reading {argument name="right reaction" default="WHAT THE—?!"}. Also add 1 stylized sound effect near the top center-right reading "ZAP!" with bold Japanese-style impact lettering beside it. Background should be mostly abstract manga effects: dense screentone gradients, electric aura, smoke plumes, and impact bursts rather than a detailed room. Tone: comedic body-swap accident setup, intense but playful, classic manga parody panel.
title: Manga Amp Shock Band Comic
description: This generates a monochrome manga-style comic panel of four anime band girls being electrocuted by an overloaded amp, ideal for comedic body-swap or supernatural accident scenes.

content: A two-panel Japanese manga page in a dramatic, semi-realistic black-and-white ink style with warm sepia sunset tones. The setting is a public park at dusk with 1 wooden bench on the far left, 4 glowing lampposts, leafy trees, a dirt walking path, distant city buildings, and a small playground with slides in the background. In the top panel, a small Jack Russell Terrier stands left of center on a leash, just after pooping on the ground; there is 1 small poop pile near its hind legs with comic emphasis marks. The dog has a white coat with dark patches, a collar and leash, eyes squeezed shut, and a mischievous, satisfied expression while one hind leg is lifted and the tail is wagging, suggesting the start of a backward kick. To the right, a young woman with shoulder-length wavy hair crouches while holding an open plastic poop bag in one hand and the leash loop in the other. She wears a cable-knit cardigan, a long floral dress with a ribbon at the collar, and low heels. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur. A large speech balloon in the upper right contains vertical Japanese text: 「よしよし。…さて、ササっと片付けて帰ろっか。」. In the bottom panel, create a sudden close-up action moment: the dog, now on the left side in a low aggressive stance, glares intensely with sharply angled brows, one sweat drop, and puffs of breath from its nose, as if bracing and kicking dirt backward with force. Explosive speed lines radiate across the frame, and a cloud of sand and grit bursts toward the crouching woman on the right. The woman recoils slightly, still holding the bag, with a shocked thought balloon near her head containing vertical Japanese text: 「あ、まずい……」. Next to the dog, place a jagged impact shout balloon with large Japanese text: 「フンッ！」. Emphasize the absurd humor and motion, with detailed fur, textured ground, dynamic debris, expressive manga screentones, bold panel borders, and cinematic action-comedy timing.
title: Manga Dog Kick at Sunset Park
description: A dramatic two-panel manga illustration of a Jack Russell Terrier kicking dirt after pooping in a park, ideal for humorous pet posts or social media comics.

content: A full-body fantasy anime-style illustration of a glamorous young idol-like woman performing on an ornate gilded stage inside a grand baroque palace hall. She stands in a dramatic low-angle pose on a carved gold balcony or platform, one leg forward and slightly crossed, with her left arm thrust toward the viewer in strong foreshortening and her other hand resting lightly at her chest. She has a slim, elegant build, very long flowing dark brown hair streaming in the air, and a decorative floral and ribbon headpiece. Her expression should feel confident, theatrical, and captivating. She wears an elaborate frilled performance dress in {argument name="dress colors" default="royal blue, crimson red, white, and gold"}: a fitted corset bodice with gold trim and red front panel, white lace bust and sleeves, layered short ruffled skirt, and large swirling overskirts and cape-like fabric panels edged with gold embroidery that billow dramatically around her. Add ornate ankle accessories with matching ribbon flowers, white heeled shoes or short boots, and luxurious detailed fabric textures. The setting is a richly decorated interior with 1 large glowing gothic arched window on the left, 1 heavy dark red velvet curtain framing the top and left side, 1 large classical oil painting in an ornate frame on the right wall, 1 tall carved column behind her, 1 abundant arrangement of roses and pale flowers at the lower left, and 1 gilded balustrade across the foreground. Warm golden backlight streams through the stained-glass-like window, creating a luminous halo, soft haze, rim light on her hair and costume, and deep cinematic shadows. A few rose petals drift in the air. Highly detailed, ultra-polished, romantic, majestic, dynamic composition, rich textures, painterly anime illustration with realistic lighting and luxurious fantasy idol aesthetics.
title: Baroque Fantasy Idol Performance
description: This prompt generates a dramatic full-body anime-style heroine in an ornate palace interior, ideal for high-end fantasy illustration, character key art, or elegant AI art showcases.

content: A whimsical anime fairytale illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Rapunzel"} leaning out from a high stone tower window, viewed from outside at a slightly elevated angle. She wears a soft lavender medieval-inspired princess dress with puff sleeves, white lace trim, and a fitted bodice, plus a pink-and-white bunny ear headband. Her extremely long {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair is styled into a single enormous thick braid that spills over the windowsill and drops straight down the full height of the image. A small fluffy white rabbit sits on her right shoulder, adding a cute fantasy touch. The tower is pale beige stone with a rounded balcony-like window ledge, an arched opening, deep purple interior curtains, and green ivy climbing around the walls and window frame. In the background, show a bright sunlit storybook landscape with a vivid blue sky, scattered white clouds, rolling green hills, a winding river, a stone bridge with 3 arches, and a distant European-style town with a castle or cathedral. The mood is triumphant, charming, and magical, like a polished high-end fantasy anime key visual. Detailed painterly rendering, soft natural daylight, clean linework, gentle atmospheric perspective, lush foliage, elegant composition, vertical format.
title: Anime Rapunzel Tower Scene
description: A polished fantasy anime illustration of a Rapunzel-like princess with an extremely long braid leaning from an ivy-covered tower above a scenic river valley, ideal for fairytale-themed character art or storybook visuals.

content: A heartwarming stylized 3D animated forest village scene at golden hour, showing 2 adorable insect characters meeting on a cobblestone path between tiny mushroom-roof cottages. In the left foreground, a cute {argument name="main insect type" default="ladybug"} crouches low with an oversized glossy black head, huge expressive brown eyes, a small smiling mouth, short antennae with rounded tips, and a tiny {argument name="accessory color" default="red"} bow near one antenna. Its shell is bright {argument name="shell color" default="red"} with distinct black spots, and its body is dark charcoal black with soft rounded limbs. In the right midground, a cheerful small {argument name="second insect type" default="bee"} hovers slightly above the ground facing the larger insect, with a similarly oversized head, big sparkling eyes, delicate translucent wings, tiny antennae, and little forelegs lifted as if speaking excitedly. The setting is an enchanted bug-sized woodland hamlet with 3 visible cottages, rounded wooden doors, curved stone walls, moss, vines, flowers, and leafy plants framing the path. Warm cinematic sunlight filters through the trees from the upper right, creating glowing rim light, soft bokeh, and floating firefly-like particles. Use a shallow depth of field, low camera angle at insect eye level, rich autumn-green and golden tones, highly detailed textures, soft global illumination, whimsical family-film mood, Pixar-like stylized realism, and a subtle dreamy double-exposure feel with faint overlapping light or ghosted highlights in parts of the frame.
title: Whimsical Ladybug and Bee Village Scene
description: This prompt generates a cinematic 3D animated-style image of two cute insects meeting in an enchanted woodland village, ideal for storybook art or family-friendly fantasy illustrations.

content: Transform the uploaded image into cinematic 3-frame sequential film stills (horizontal frames stacked vertically), full bleed edge-to-edge. Each frame should show a different moment from the same scene, with clear progression. Vary the composition, camera angle, and distances to create a sense of movement and storytelling. Use a cinematic, {argument name="color tone" default="cooler-toned"}, high-contrast, deep-space blacks film with a natural color grade. Add subtle film grain, slight motion blur, and natural imperfections to emulate analog photography. Keep the composition candid and emotionally grounded, with a sense of movement and quiet storytelling. Overall aesthetic: cinematic, nostalgic, and organic, like raw film stills.
title: Cinematic film stills transformation prompt
description: A prompt for converting an image into a vertical stack of three sequential cinematic film stills.

content: A dramatic Japanese light-novel cover illustration in high-detail anime fantasy style, square composition, showing a heroic ensemble posed for battle in a ruined mountain pass at sunset with cherry blossoms blowing through the air. The scene centers on {argument name="hero title" default="Momotaro"}, a young black-haired male warrior in glossy red samurai armor, crouched in the foreground and gripping a katana diagonally across his body. Beside him in the front-right foreground is a black-haired young woman in matching red armor with a high ponytail, also drawing a katana in a dynamic combat-ready pose. Around them stand 5 additional companions for a total of 7 characters: 1 brown-haired short-haired girl at front-left holding a short blade, 1 silver-haired angelic woman at upper-left with large white wings and a drawn bow, 1 tall red-haired warrior at top-center carrying a large weapon over the shoulder, 1 long straight black-haired shrine-maiden-like girl at upper-center-right in white and red with light armor, and 1 blonde girl at right holding a large ornate war hammer. Add a distant Japanese castle on the right background, jagged rocks and broken ground, glowing embers, drifting petals, and a luminous cloudy sky with strong backlight behind the group. Use cinematic fantasy lighting, epic adventure mood, polished painterly rendering, sharp detailed armor, flowing hair, layered depth, and a bold heroic poster feel. Include large Japanese title text across the top in metallic gold with black outline reading {argument name="top title text" default="《御伽話ファンタジー》シン・桃太郎伝"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it in white with dark outline reading {argument name="top subtitle text" default="～追放・転生した元神は、おとぎ話の世界の美少女たちと世界を救う!!"}. Include large Japanese promotional text across the bottom in bright red with white outline reading {argument name="bottom catch text" default="追放、転生した神・桃太郎。御伽話の美少女たちと試練乗り越えて鬼退治！"}. Make it look like a commercial fantasy web novel or manga cover image, energetic, crowded, and visually striking.
title: Epic Momotaro Fantasy Cover
description: This prompt generates a dramatic ensemble-style anime fantasy cover with seven battle-ready characters, Japanese promotional text, and a polished light-novel or webtoon key visual look.

content: Create a dramatic Japanese light-novel cover illustration for a fantasy mecha isekai story. Vertical poster composition with a huge heroic humanoid robot dominating the center foreground, viewed from a slightly low angle to make it monumental. The robot is sleek and ornate, with white and silver armor, rich gold trim, glowing cyan energy lines, a radiant emerald-green core in the chest, a crown-like crest on the helmet, and a long royal blue cape with gold edging. Behind its back spread multiple crystalline energy wings, about 8 large translucent green shards fanning out symmetrically like luminous blades. In its left hand it holds a long fantasy-tech spear with a blue glowing blade and gold mechanical detailing. At the robot’s feet are 2 human characters: on the left, a red-haired fantasy heroine with very long braided hair, leather-and-fabric adventurer clothing, and a determined expression, looking up at the robot; on the right, a young male protagonist with short dark hair in a fantasy tunic and cloak, reaching one hand up toward the giant machine in awe and urgency, seen mostly from behind. The setting is an epic ruined sci-fi fantasy world with towering gothic spires, broken city structures, drifting smoke, dramatic clouds, and a sky filled with stars, planets, streaks of lightning, and 8 small flying warships scattered in the distance. Highly polished anime key visual style, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, intense contrast, blue-green-gold color palette, heroic atmosphere, intricate mechanical rendering, fantasy worldbuilding, premium game or novel cover finish. Add large Japanese title typography at the top: 《{argument name="tagline text" default="本格異世界SFロボット戦記"}》 above a massive metallic logo reading {argument name="series title" default="ASTRAIA"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle line beneath it. Add a large dramatic Japanese catchphrase at the bottom in glowing white and gold text over 2 lines: {argument name="bottom catchphrase" default="乗って！ユウキ！ その叫びが、世界の運命を決めた！"}. Keep the overall design dense, premium, and readable as a commercial cover, with the central robot as the unmistakable focal point.
title: Epic Fantasy Mecha Light Novel Cover
description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style Japanese sci-fi fantasy cover featuring a towering angelic robot, two protagonists, and bold title typography for novels, games, or promotional key art.

content:
A cinematic anime-style vertical book-cover illustration for a romantic comedy light novel with slight fantasy atmosphere, split by a thin apartment wall down the center. On the left side, a warm, cozy kitchen glows in amber light from a hanging pendant lamp. A {argument name="female character name" default="Nanako Iida"}, age 28, stands in three-quarter view holding a deep plate of freshly cooked food with visible steam rising in elegant curls. She has dark hair tied in a messy bun, soft bangs, a gentle mature expression, and wears a lavender knit sweater under a white apron. The kitchen contains exact visible details: 1 hanging lamp, 1 upper shelf with cookware, 5 hanging utensils, 1 cutting board, 1 knife block, and 6 small bottles or jars lined across the foreground counter. On the right side, a dim, cool-toned bachelor bedroom is lit in blue shadows. A {argument name="male character name" default="Sota Ninomiya"}, age 26, slim but muscular, with tousled dark hair and a fitted charcoal T-shirt, leans one hand against the wall as if sensing the aroma through it. His room contains 1 bed, 1 bookshelf, 1 desk lamp, and 1 wall poster. A ribbon of steam drifts from the dish across the center wall into his side, visually connecting them. The mood is intimate, sensual, and slightly teasing, emphasizing the contrast between warm home cooking and lonely nighttime restraint. Add elegant Japanese vertical catch copy on the wall and upper right, small white serif-style name labels beside both characters with their ages, and a large bold Japanese title block across the lower middle. Include these exact text elements: left name label "Nanako Iida 28歳", right name label "Sota Ninomiya 26歳", vertical wall text "その香りが、ふたりの距離を、そっと溶かしていく。", upper-right vertical text "隣人は、優しい香りと、秘密のレシピ。", large center title "《飯テロ恋愛小説》
夜中に読まないでください〜
〜お隣のストイックくんは、
隣のお姉さんの愛の飯テロに勝てない〜", and bottom tagline "毎晩続く深夜の罪な料理の香り。
壁一枚の距離と心を溶かす". Highly polished promotional cover art, soft bloom lighting, detailed fabric folds, realistic steam, romantic tension, glossy illustrated publishing design.

content: A dramatic dark fantasy light-novel cover illustration in a square format, featuring a fierce female warrior centered in a dynamic lunging pose inside a dim, ruined, cathedral-like or industrial gothic interior with a smoky blurred background and warm floating embers. She has long silver-white hair in a high ponytail whipping violently to the right, pale skin, and a deliberately obscured or featureless face. Her body is enhanced with four black mechanical arms in total, built from intricate clockwork and segmented metal joints, extending spider-like around her. She wears a tattered black dress-like battle outfit with armored corset detailing, belts, straps, a garter on one thigh, and biomechanical leg armor. Count exactly 4 arms visible: 2 upper arms and 2 lower arms; count exactly 4 glowing energy blades, one held in each hand, translucent neon blue with crystalline edges and magical circuitry-like light patterns. Emphasize the contrast between matte black metal, torn fabric, pale skin, and electric cyan weapons. The composition should feel cinematic, high-detail, intense, and heroic, with sharp focus on the character and soft depth-of-field in the background. Add ornate Japanese cover typography in metallic gold with subtle beveling and glow: at the top, small genre text 《バトルアクション》; below it, a large main title {argument name="headline text" default="クアッドアームの静寂"}; beneath that, a smaller subtitle ～四本腕の女傭兵と錆びついた世界の約束～. Near the bottom, add a large centered quote in gold Japanese text {argument name="quote" default="「僕は君の未来を高値で買いに来た」"}; directly below it, a smaller line ——時計仕掛けの運命が、今動き出す. At the very bottom center, place the author name {argument name="author name" default="ざっ"} in large gold text with elegant ornamental divider lines on both sides. Use a luxurious fantasy-book-cover layout, moody sepia-and-charcoal palette with bright cyan highlights, ultra-detailed anime-inspired realism, and a polished GPT-image-2 editorial illustration style.

content: A two-page black-and-white manga spread set in a nighttime high school band rehearsal studio, drawn in polished modern shonen/seinen manga style with detailed screentones, dramatic lighting, expressive speed lines, and glossy instrument rendering. The scene shows 4 visible band members in school uniforms: a surprised teenage boy with messy short hair at guitar and vocal mic, a calm beautiful teenage girl with very long flowing light hair playing electric guitar in the foreground, a petite long-haired teenage girl at a keyboard, and a drummer in the back whose face is intentionally obscured by a soft blur. The studio has large windows revealing a city skyline at night, hanging ceiling lights, amps including a visible Marshall stack, a drum kit with a band logo on the bass drum, cables, and a wall sign reading “Beat Box.” Compose it as a printed manga spread with 7 panels total across 2 pages, including gutters, page borders, and page numbers 13 and 14 at the bottom. Left page: 3 panels — top panel with the shocked boy turning toward the girls and a large Japanese speech bubble saying “え!?”; middle panel is a close-up of the long-haired guitarist girl with a calm expression and a Japanese speech bubble saying “……別にいいよ”; bottom panel is a wider full-band rehearsal shot with all 4 members in the studio. Right page: 4 panels — top panel is an explosive performance shot with the boy singing and playing while the long-haired girl plays guitar, with large sound-effect text “ジャッ”; middle panel is a dynamic close-up of the long-haired guitarist playing intensely, with flowing hair, musical note symbols, radiant speed lines, and the keyboard girl visible in the back; bottom panel is a close-up of the boy’s stunned face with soft bokeh and a vertical Japanese speech bubble saying “……あれ”. Emphasize the emotional contrast: awkward surprise turning into admiration as the girl’s guitar performance changes the mood. Use monochrome only, no color, authentic manga lettering, cinematic framing, layered depth, and highly detailed hair and instrument strings.

content: A black-and-white manga page spread with 5 panels on a clean white background and thin black gutters, drawn in highly detailed modern seinen/shoujo hybrid line art with soft screentones, reflective highlights, and a quiet melancholic mood. The setting is a nighttime music studio classroom with large windows showing a city skyline full of lit buildings against a dark sky. Main subject: a slender high school girl with very long straight light hair and blunt bangs, delicate features, and a serious introspective expression, wearing a Japanese school uniform consisting of a white button-up shirt, loosened striped ribbon tie, and plaid skirt, seated and playing a solid-body electric guitar that resembles a Stratocaster. In the large upper-left panel, show her in three-quarter view holding the guitar across her lap, left hand on the fretboard and right hand near the pickups, surrounded by studio equipment including 1 drum kit in the back left, 2 stacked guitar amplifiers on the right, and a wall sign reading "Beat Box" near the door. In the narrow upper-right panel, show a close-up of the guitar neck and her fretting hand, with the small vertical Japanese sound effect text "トン…". In the tall middle-right panel, show a close side-profile close-up of the girl looking down at the instrument with a pensive, almost disappointed expression, with the night city lights blurred through the window behind her. In the lower-left panel, show 1 teenage boy in a school blazer and loosened tie, seated indoors and turned slightly to the side; his face is obscured by a large soft gray rectangular censor block, and beside him is 1 vertical speech balloon containing the Japanese text "……やっぱり違う". In the lower-right panel, show a closer view of the same boy from the chest up against a soft bokeh screentone background; his face is again obscured by a large gray censor block. Add printed page numbers centered at the bottom margins: "5" under the left page and "6" under the right page. Emphasize a subtle narrative theme of realizing that the sound feels wrong, as if this is a continuation page from a dramatic school-band manga. Keep everything monochrome, polished, cinematic, and emotionally restrained.

content: A black-and-white manga two-page spread with a cinematic, melancholic tone, drawn in highly detailed seinen style with realistic lighting, wet pavement reflections, dense overhead power lines, and a star-filled night sky over a quiet Japanese residential street. The composition is divided into 4 panels total across the spread. On the left page, the top panel is a wide establishing shot of an empty suburban street at night, lined with low houses, walls, utility poles, glowing streetlights, and a slightly reflective road stretching into the distance. The bottom panel on the left page shows 1 teenage boy from behind, walking alone down the same street, wearing a dark school blazer, white shirt, loosened striped necktie, slim trousers, and carrying 1 shoulder bag slung across his back; his posture is tired and conflicted. Include 1 vertical oval Japanese speech balloon in this panel with the text 「やっぱり俺には」. On the right page, the top panel is a close-up of the boy’s hand gripping the front of his blazer or shirt near the chest in a tense gesture, with 1 hand-drawn sound effect in Japanese reading 「ギュッ…」. The bottom panel on the right page is a chest-up frontal portrait of the same boy outdoors at night, messy short light-colored hair, school uniform slightly disheveled, emotional expression, shoulder bag strap visible, background filled with soft glowing night bokeh and stars. Place 1 vertical oval Japanese speech balloon beside him reading 「でも…悔しい」. Obscure the center of his face with a flat square gray censor block. At the bottom of the right page, add 1 rectangular narration box containing the Japanese text 「才能に出会ってしまったー」. Show printed manga page layout with white gutters, page numbers 17 and 18 centered at the bottoms of the left and right pages, and a clean book-spread presentation. Keep everything grayscale, dramatic, introspective, and polished like a published manga volume.

content: A surreal impasto oil painting in the spirit of a late-19th-century post-impressionist masterpiece, showing a stout gentleman in a patterned golden-blue suit and tall top hat balancing awkwardly on a giant bronze gear high above a sunlit canal city. His face is obscured by a centered vertical rectangular censor block in warm brown, creating an intentional anonymous focal interruption. He wears a richly textured jacket with mosaic-like patches of ochre, cobalt, rust, and cream, matching trousers, heavy leather boots, and a waist area that opens into an exposed clockwork mechanism full of gears and ornate brass details. His body leans forward with both hands extended as if trying to keep balance, one boot planted on the gear and the other lifted slightly outward. The background is an airy blue sky with swirling painterly clouds and scattered gold brushstrokes, while below and to the left appears a historic bell tower and arched waterfront architecture, and to the right distant terracotta rooftops beside shimmering water. Use thick visible brushstrokes, luminous warm highlights, bold blue-and-gold contrast, expressive texture, and a whimsical steampunk-meets-Venetian atmosphere. Compose the figure large and central, slightly cropped by the frame, with the giant gear visible beneath him and the city receding below.
title: Surreal Clockwork Gentleman on a Gear
description: This prompt generates a whimsical post-impressionist oil painting of an anonymous steampunk gentleman balancing on a giant gear above a Venetian-style city, useful for surreal fine-art image creation.

content: A whimsical fantasy oil painting of a gigantic flying steamship shaped like a cat, drifting above a bright ocean under a clear blue sky filled with soft pink clouds. The vessel dominates the composition in a low-angle three-quarter view from the front-left, making it feel monumental and airborne. Its hull is rounded and bulbous like a zeppelin-ship hybrid, painted pastel pink and lavender with warm peach highlights, and the bow is sculpted into the face of a fluffy cat with pale pink fur, pointed ears, luminous blue eyes, a small nose, and a huge open mouth lined with sharp dark teeth like a bizarre figurehead-jaw entrance. Ornate gilded brass trim, filigree, railings, pipes, rivets, balconies, portholes, hanging ornaments, and decorative mechanical fittings cover the ship. There are 4 tall smokestacks rising from the top deck, each striped in warm copper, red, and gold, releasing thick cotton-candy pink smoke that curls painterly into the sky. The upper deck is crowded with intricate Victorian steampunk details, domes, spires, lamp-like finials, tiny structures, and a small golden cat statue near the front. A suspended gondola or platform hangs beneath the belly of the ship with tiny visible machinery and a reddish-orange base. In the distance, 3 smaller ships appear near the horizon over choppy teal water, reinforcing the scale. The sea below is painted with lively waves and white foam. Use an imaginative storybook steampunk aesthetic with rich impasto brushstrokes, visible painterly texture, glowing sunlight, romantic pastel colors, and a dreamlike mood reminiscent of a fantastical maritime voyage. Vertical composition, highly detailed, magical, surreal, elegant, and playful.
title: Steampunk Cat Airship Over the Sea
description: A richly textured fantasy illustration of a giant pink cat-shaped steampunk airship floating above the ocean, ideal for whimsical concept art, book covers, or imaginative poster imagery.

content: A painterly steampunk fantasy portrait of a young woman shown from about thigh-up in side profile, facing left, standing in a narrow workshop filled with mechanical parts and clockwork. She has long, voluminous, curly {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair cascading down her back, with a few loose strands glowing against the background. A pair of large brass aviator goggles with iridescent blue-purple lenses rests on top of her head. Her outfit is a romantic steampunk dress: a rich {argument name="dress color" default="deep cobalt blue"} bodice and skirt, a high-necked white blouse with ruffled trim and puffed sleeves, layered frills at the collar and hem, and multiple tan leather straps and buckles cinched around the waist and torso. She carries a medium brown leather backpack with rounded flap and visible buckles over one shoulder. The setting is dense with industrial details on both sides: exposed pipes, valves, hanging instruments, circular gauges, and several visible gears, including 1 large gear in the upper right and multiple ring-like metal components along the walls. Use an expressive oil-painting style with thick impasto brushstrokes, soft edges, and a dreamy handcrafted texture. The palette should contrast cool dusty blues and teals in the background with warm brass, copper, amber, and honey highlights on the machinery and hair. The mood is whimsical, adventurous, and slightly nostalgic, like a storybook steampunk inventor’s atelier. Vertical composition, character centered slightly right of frame, background softly abstracted but packed with mechanical forms, no readable text, no modern elements, and keep the face obscured by a simple centered rectangular blur block in a muted tan-brown tone.
title: Painterly Steampunk Girl Portrait

content:
- Character: Oriental female @image_1, black high ponytail, modified Cheongsam {argument name="dress color" default="dark purple"} gown @image_2, gold vintage large hoop earrings, red lips, cold and noble temperament.
- Vehicle: @image_3 {argument name="car model" default="Huawei Zhijie R7"}, Nebula Purple paint, streamlined sedan silhouette, license plate with Chinese characters 'Zhijie R7'.

Scene: Outside a top-tier night award ceremony or international film festival venue. Marble plaza, flanked by media with long lenses and flashlights. Faraway buildings with giant light installations and a red carpet extension.

Storyboard plan, deep black high-end editorial layout, purple and gold color scheme title: "{argument name="storyboard title" default="IGNITE · Zhijie R7 × Grand Ceremony Entrance Blockbuster Project"}"

Section 1 - Character and Vehicle Reference (professional lookbook layout style): Extracting from reference images - front/side of character, full side of vehicle, close-up of front, macro of earrings and handbag.

Section 2 - Divided into left and right parts:
Left: Real scene reference for environment (night lobby atmosphere photo).
Right: Top-down spatial floor plan. Notated with: spatial outlines (stairs/plaza/aisles), initial character position + dashed path arrows, 5 camera positions (number + abbreviation), camera direction arrows, product/prop anchors, highlighted core composition areas.

5-Frame Storyboard (2.39:1 CinemaScope):
Frame 1: Long shot · Moment door opens. Night plaza in a sea of flashes, door opens, purple interior ambient light lights up first, backlit silhouette, hair and hem blowing in wind.
Frame 2: Entrance walk · Low angle shot. Looking up from ground level as she steps down in stilettos, marble reflecting the hem, Zhijie R7 body in back as a glowing backdrop, flashes bursting in distance.
Frame 3: Turn back · 85mm portrait close-up. She turns sideways, looking directly at the camera, gold earrings glint in the flash, very slight curve of the mouth, expression controlling the scene.
Frame 4: Hero shot of car and person. She stands in front of the car, breeze blowing the dress, Zhijie R7 full side glowing behind, Nebula Purple paint and gown forming a high-end chromatic harmony, background media crowd blurred.
Frame 5: Departure end shot. She enters the car, door closes slowly, taillights light up, vehicle slowly drives away from the red carpet amidst flashes, leaving only light trails.

Lighting and Style:
Strong night side-backlight · Instant flash exposure feel. Deep black background · Purple car body as one of the only light sources. 2.39:1 anamorphic wide screen · Large aperture shallow depth of field. Keywords: Absolute protagonist aura · Event-level narrative · Movie premiere quality.
title: Cinematic Editorial Storyboard
description: A complex, multi-layered prompt for a high-end cinematic storyboard featuring a character and luxury vehicle. It defines character traits, vehicle specs, lighting environments, and a 5-frame narrative sequence.

content: A polished anime-style illustration of a young shrine maiden named {argument name="character name" default="音慰"} standing inside a traditional Japanese shrine amulet office, shown from about thigh-up behind a wooden counter. She has long, straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair with a center part and soft shine, pale skin, and a calm, gentle presence. Her face is centered and front-facing, but the facial area is obscured by a rectangular blur block. She wears a crisp white kimono-style top with wide sleeves and a deep red hakama tied in a large bow at the waist, conveying a classic miko outfit. Both hands are presenting a white embroidered omamori charm toward the viewer, holding it carefully at chest level; the charm has a gold cord knot at the top and the vertical kanji text "御守" on the front. In the foreground on the counter is a wooden display tray containing exactly 10 visible omamori charms in multiple colors: white, pink, red, purple, and gold-patterned variants, each with decorative cords and gold or white embroidery. To the right on the counter are 3 neat stacks of paper shrine talismans or packets, each labeled in Japanese; the rightmost stack is tied with a red-and-gold mizuhiki cord. On the left side of the counter is a small wooden price sign reading "初穂料 800円". The shrine interior is warmly lit with natural sunlight entering from a large wooden-framed window on the left, creating a serene, clean atmosphere. Through the window, a red railing and softly blurred shrine grounds and greenery are visible. In the background are wooden shelves and traditional decor, plus a vertical hanging sign with Japanese text reading "御守 御札" and smaller text "各種祈願承ります". The composition is centered on the miko and the offered charm, with soft depth of field, delicate fabric folds, realistic hands, refined linework, and a high-quality modern anime rendering style that emphasizes the subject more than the environment.
title: Shrine Maiden Offering an Omamori
description: This prompt generates a clean anime-style shrine scene featuring a miko presenting an omamori at a shrine counter, ideal for character art with culturally detailed background props.

content: A clean anime-style illustration of a young shrine maiden working at a traditional Japanese shrine amulet counter inside a warm wooden building. She is a single female subject shown from about waist up behind the counter, with her face obscured by a soft rectangular blur, long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair tied back with a red cord and white paper zigzag shrine ornament, wearing a white kimono top and vivid {argument name="hakama color" default="red"} hakama. She is politely handing a protective charm to a visitor across the counter; only the visitor’s hands, torso, and beige jacket sleeves are visible in the foreground. The scene should feel calm, respectful, and softly lit by daylight coming through a wooden lattice window on the right, where a red torii gate and shrine grounds are visible outside in gentle blur. The interior is richly detailed with dark natural wood beams, shelves, and a small kamidana altar in the upper left decorated with 4 hanging white shide paper streamers and 2 green sakaki plants in white vases. On the right hangs a vertical sign with the Japanese text "御守・御札授与所". On the left shelves are shrine goods and signs: 3 small shelf labels reading "おみくじ", multiple stacks of paper fortunes and talismans, white drawstring bags, and upright placards including "御守", "御札", and "交通安全". The countertop is neatly arranged with 3 shallow wooden display trays of colorful omamori charms, 5 visible tabletop paper labels or stacks reading "厄除", "御守", "御札", "御朱印", and "御礼", plus a black ink pot, 2 writing brushes, a small empty wooden tray, a rectangular abacus, and bundled paper items. The charm being exchanged should be a delicate pastel omamori with floral decoration and a tied cord. Use a polished contemporary anime illustration style with fine linework, soft shading, realistic hand posing, subtle dust motes in the air, and strong emphasis on the subject and counter interaction rather than dramatic stylization.
title: Anime Shrine Maiden Omamori Counter
description: This prompt generates a detailed anime illustration of a miko selling shrine charms at a wooden shrine counter, suitable for character scene art or atmospheric cultural setting visuals.

He wears an elaborate royal-blue and dark leather outfit with silver armor and gold filigree trim: 1 long asymmetrical blue cape draped over both shoulders and flowing down both sides, 1 high-collared blue tunic with fitted black-brown leather torso panels, 2 crossed chest straps with buckles, 1 wide layered belt system around the waist, 1 leather side pouch hanging at the left hip, 1 set of silver pauldrons and arm guards, 2 armored gauntlets, 1 split blue tabard skirt with gold edging over dark trousers, 2 silver knee guards, and 2 tall brown armored boots with metallic toe caps and blue gem-like accents. Add intricate fantasy ornamentation throughout, including gold embroidery on the cape and tunic, engraved silver armor details, multiple buckles and straps, and a sunburst-like brooch clasp at the right shoulder. A decorative sword in a blue scabbard hangs at his right hip, with an ornate gold-and-silver hilt visible. Every section mixes short text blocks with cute manga visuals for easy learning. Include one recurring royal Shiba Inu mascot on the left or right edges guiding the reader and reacting to clues. The whole design should feel like a fun children’s history handout or classroom poster about the mystery of Himiko’s identity."}
title: Japanese Himiko History Infographic Poster
description: A colorful manga-style Japanese educational poster explaining the mystery of Queen Himiko for children, useful for creating history handouts, classroom visuals, or social media educational graphics.

content: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink-wash fantasy painting on warm off-white rice paper, combining monumental calligraphy with a heroic figure scene. On the right side, a lone ancient warrior in ornate dark robes and layered black armor sits astride a large tiger on the edge of a jagged cliff, both shown in three-quarter back view facing left toward the open landscape. The warrior wears a flowing cape and long ribbon streamers whipping in the wind, and raises a straight sword vertically so that it becomes a brilliant pillar of golden-white light piercing upward into dense storm clouds. The tiger is powerfully built, realistic, alert, and richly detailed with bold stripes, white fur accents, and ceremonial cloth and tack with subtle gold ornament. The sky is filled with smoky gray ink clouds, softly blooming washes, and scattered gold flecks around the glowing sword beam. Below and to the left, a misty shanshui landscape opens into distant mountains, river water, tiny tree clusters, and layered atmospheric haze rendered in pale gray ink. On the left half of the composition, include 2 large vertical columns of expressive black brush-calligraphy in Chinese, bold and irregular, occupying most of the height; add 1 narrower vertical line of smaller calligraphy beside them and 4 red seal stamps total, with 2 small seals near the smaller inscription, 1 seal near the upper right edge, and 1 double-stacked red seal at the lower left. Emphasize high contrast between empty paper space and dark ink masses, literati painting aesthetics, sweeping brush energy, epic martial grandeur, and a subtle modern fantasy finish with restrained metallic gold highlights.
title: Ink-Wash Warrior Riding a Tiger
description: This prompt generates a dramatic Chinese calligraphy and ink-painting style fantasy illustration suited for poster art, literary visuals, or heroic mythic scene design.

content: A dynamic anime versus screen styled like a Pokémon battle intro, split diagonally into 2 opposing horizontal panels with a large metallic gold “VS” emblem in the center. The top panel has a hot pink speed-line background with black brushstroke borders and shows {argument name="top character name" default="Rina Tennoji"} on the left, a teenage anime girl in a blue school uniform jacket, white shirt, and red ribbon tie, leaning in from the left with a confident expression, short layered pink hair with outward flips, and vivid yellow eyes. Beside her is 1 floating Porygon2-like creature, glossy red and blue with a rounded body, oval blue limbs, and a single circular yellow-and-black eye. On the right side of the top panel, large bold white text with a black outline reads “Rina Tennoji.” The bottom panel has a vivid purple speed-line background with black brushstroke borders and shows {argument name="bottom character name" default="Hime Anyoji"} on the right, a teenage anime girl in a soft pink hoodie over a school-style outfit, posed with one hand near her chin, pastel pink hair in twin braided buns tied with dark bows. Her face is obscured by a large solid censor block rectangle. Beside her is 1 floating Magnezone-like robot creature, metallic silver and blue-gray with a domed body, 1 central red eye, 1 smaller side eye, a yellow antenna on top, and 2 horseshoe magnets as arms with red and blue tips. On the left side of the bottom panel, large bold white text with a black outline reads “Hime Anyoji.” Use crisp anime line art, glossy cel shading, dramatic motion streaks, high contrast, and a competitive game splash-screen composition on a black outer background. Include 2 characters, 2 creature companions, 2 name labels, 1 central VS emblem, and a small stylized white artist signature in the lower-left corner.
title: Anime Pokémon-Style Versus Screen
description: This prompt generates a bold anime battle-introduction splash image with two rival girls, their monster partners, and a dramatic VS layout for matchup art or social media posts.

content: A dreamy storybook landscape painting of a cozy fairytale cottage in a lush alpine valley, rendered in a soft painterly style with warm sunlight and delicate atmospheric haze. The cottage sits slightly left of center beside a winding stone path, with cream-colored plaster walls, a steep mossy thatched roof, a small chimney, curved dormer windows, a teal-blue front door, and climbing flowers around the walls and fence. A large leafy tree frames the left foreground, casting cool shade over wildflowers, grass, and rough wooden posts. On the right, a clear stream flows through the scene beneath a small old stone bridge. In the middle distance, a tiny hillside village with church-like towers nestles among trees. In the background, tall rugged mountains rise dramatically, their slopes softened by mist and crowned with bright white clouds. Use rich greens, sunlit gold, soft blue-gray mountains, and a tranquil pastoral mood, with highly detailed foliage, textured brushwork, and a whimsical classic fantasy illustration feel.
title: Fairytale Cottage in an Alpine Valley
description: This prompt generates a painterly storybook landscape of a charming cottage, stream, bridge, village, and misty mountains, ideal for fantasy illustration or scenic wall art.

content: A cozy storybook-style countryside illustration at golden-hour sunrise, painted in a soft whimsical digital gouache and watercolor look. Show a small cottage nestled in a lush green valley, with a warm red-orange tiled roof, cream plaster walls, a stone chimney releasing a thin curl of smoke, a tiny front porch, and a small upper balcony. Place the cottage in the lower right area of the composition, surrounded by an abundant cottage garden full of wildflowers and tall grasses. In front of the house, show 1 young girl in a simple {argument name="dress color" default="light blue"} dress and apron, gently sweeping the path with a broom. Near the porch, include 1 black cat sitting upright. Beside the path, include 1 small stone well with a wooden roof. On the right side near the house, show 1 laundry line with 2 white sheets hanging to dry. The foreground should be richly framed with leafy branches and flowering plants, especially 2 large clusters of overhanging leaves in the top left and top right corners, creating a natural vignette. A winding dirt path should begin in the foreground, pass by the cottage, and snake into the distance through rolling meadows and forested hills. Fill the midground and background with layered green hills, pine and deciduous trees, soft morning mist settling in the valleys, and distant mountains fading into atmospheric haze. Use warm sunlight streaming from the left, illuminating the grass and rooftops with soft golden highlights, with pastel peach clouds in a pale blue sky. The mood should feel peaceful, idyllic, nostalgic, and magical, like a children’s book landscape. No text, no border, highly detailed foliage, painterly linework, balanced composition, square format.
title: Whimsical Cottage Valley Sunrise
description: This prompt generates a cozy storybook landscape of a cottage in a misty sunlit valley, ideal for fantasy illustration, children’s-book art, or pastoral wallpaper.

content: A heroic high-fantasy anime illustration of an elf knight woman marching through a stone city gate during a public celebration, full-body low-angle view, centered composition. She has long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair, pointed elf ears, and an elegant athletic build. Her face is mostly obscured by the angle and raised arm. She raises a long ornate silver sword straight upward in her right hand in a triumphant salute, while her left arm hangs naturally by her side. She wears intricate polished silver plate armor over a short {argument name="outfit color" default="forest green"} dress, with engraved breastplate, armored gauntlets, layered fauld and tassets, leather belts and straps at the waist, and decorated knee-high armored boots. A dark green cape billows dramatically behind her. A sheathed secondary sword hangs at her hip. She is walking forward confidently like a beloved champion responding to the cheers of the people. Around her, exactly 2 lines of townspeople and elf citizens stand on both sides of the street, raising hands and celebrating her passage. Behind her is a large medieval stone archway with carved ornament and exactly 3 visible green banners bearing pale emblem designs, plus weathered walls and hints of towers beyond. The sky is a vivid deep blue with large sunlit white clouds. White flower petals drift through the air across the whole scene. Warm daylight, cinematic rim light, detailed fabric and armor reflections, dynamic perspective, painterly anime rendering, highly detailed fantasy background, festive heroic atmosphere.
title: Elf Knight Victory Parade
description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style fantasy scene of a triumphant elf knight saluting a cheering crowd in a medieval city, ideal for heroic character art or cover illustrations.

content: A dynamic fantasy anime illustration of a heroic {argument name="character role" default="elf knight"} girl striding forward through a massive open stone castle gate, seen from a dramatic very low angle looking up at her so she feels triumphant and larger than life. She has long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair, bright teal-green eyes, pointed elf ears, and a joyful open-mouthed smile. She raises a longsword high overhead in her right hand in a victory salute, while her left hand rests near a sheathed sword at her hip. She wears ornate polished silver plate armor with engraved details on the breastplate, pauldrons, gauntlets, and thigh-high greaves, combined with a vivid green short dress or tunic, a brown belt, and a dark green cape billowing wide behind her. Add a delicate silver tiara on her head. The setting is a sunlit medieval stone fortress entrance with 2 tall wooden gates swung open, pale stone walls, and 2 green hanging banners with pale emblem designs, one on each side. Behind her, exactly 7 small cheering townspeople in simple green outfits throw their hands up in celebration, with one waving a small green flag. White flower petals or celebratory confetti drift across the entire scene, with sparkling light particles and soft lens-like glow. Use a bright blue sky, warm sunlight, hopeful heroic mood, and energetic motion in the hair, cape, and skirt. Render in clean detailed manga-inspired fantasy art, fine linework, soft painterly shading, luminous highlights, and a polished gpt-image-2 anime illustration aesthetic.
title: Heroic Elf Knight Victory March
description: This prompt generates a bright low-angle fantasy anime scene of a smiling elf knight raising her sword while walking through castle gates as cheering townspeople celebrate behind her.

content:
image_generation_prompt:
  meta:
    description: "{argument name="scene description" default="Anime movie poster style illustration of a chibi character seen from behind, about to get on a road bike"}"
    reference_usage: "Refer to the attached image for character appearance"
  
  style:
    art_style: "{argument name="art style" default="Anime movie poster"}"
    mood: "Dramatic"

  subject:
    type: "Chibi character"
    pose:
      view: "Back view"
      action: "Stepping forward with the left foot toward the road bike at the top of the screen"
      target_direction: "Direction of the road bike (top of image)"

  composition:
    top:
      element: "Red road bike"
      layout: "Full width of the screen, parallel to the top edge"
    center:
      element: "Chibi character from behind"
      angle: "Overhead"
    bottom:
      text_layer_base:
        content: "{argument name="text" default="KASANE"}"
        style: "bold sans-serif font"
        color: "White"
      text_layer_overlay:
        content: "Kasane"
        style: "Rough characters as if scribbled with a thick brush"
        color: "Red"
        position: "Overlapping the word KASANE"

  objects:
    road_bike:
      color: "Red"
      orientation: "Side view / Horizontal"
      facing_direction: "Facing left"
    road:
      detail: "A straight white line is drawn in the center of the road. The white line is not clearly visible, but faint and blurry. There is a slight, faint, and very small crack on a portion of the left side of the road."

  technical_settings:
    shot_size: "Long shot"
    shot_angle: "Overhead shot"
    zoom_emphasis: "Greatly emphasize the chibi character and the bicycle"
    lens_effects: "Vignetting"
    lighting:

content: Create a dramatic manga-style character poster on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired Stand profile page with heavy ink lines, screentone texture, painterly shading, and exaggerated comic energy. The layout is vertical, with a dense information panel on the left and the main figures dominating the center and right. At the top left, large serif English title text reads "LEVERAGE INFINITY" under smaller Japanese text "スタンド名:". Below it, a left-column profile card contains 6 visible info lines with Japanese labels and values: "スタンド使い名:" with the value "1-sphere", "性別: 不詳", "見た目:" followed by a short Japanese description, "年齢: 不詳", "身長: 96cm", and "職業: 市場の条省・養分". Beneath that, add a framed ability box titled "スタンド能力" containing several lines of Japanese body text and a bold English catchphrase at the bottom reading exactly: "Choose... TO THE MOOOOON!! Or face the MARGIN CAAAAALL!!". At the lower left, add a framed radar chart section titled "スタンドパラメータ" with 5 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "持続力 C", "成長性 A", "スピード C", and "人念力 B"; fill the radar graph with a translucent pink polygon. The main illustration shows 2 stacked figures: a humanoid Stand above and a pig-like user below. The Stand is tall, metallic, and menacing, with a mushroom-cap helmet head in glossy red with white spots, circular gold-and-pink ear-like side discs, a segmented chrome-and-brass body, muscular but sleek mechanical arms, and a pink pig-snout emblem on the chest. Its face area is obscured by a rectangular censor blur. It reaches one articulated hand toward the viewer in an aggressive foreshortened pose. Around the Stand’s upper body, place 3 large stylized sound-effect glyphs reading "ゴゴゴ" in purple and black. On the far right, add a jagged speech or impact shape with 4 stacked lines of bold Japanese text reading "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ!!". Behind both figures, erupting pink-purple aura flames and floating rock fragments create intense supernatural energy. The lower figure is a short, squat, pig-bodied character standing wide-legged, with pink skin, small hoof-like feet, a yellow-green neckerchief, and a huge mushroom cap hat in red with white spots and a thick yellow underside rim; the torso area is obscured by a large rectangular censor blur. The pig points outward with one hand and holds a woven basket in the other hand containing 3 visible items: 1 blue heart-shaped object and 2 small round produce-like objects. Keep the composition theatrical and bizarre, combining grotesque humor, market-speculation parody, and high-impact manga poster aesthetics.
title: Leverage Infinity Stand Poster
description: A JoJo-inspired manga profile poster showing a bizarre mushroom-themed Stand and pig-like user, ideal for parody character sheets and dramatic anime-style meme art.

content: A dramatic fantasy illustration of a single female angelic figure made entirely of fire, floating against a pure black background. The body is semi-transparent and sculpted from glowing orange, amber, and white-hot flame, with brighter highlights at the head, chest, knee, and pointed lower leg. She has 2 large feathered wings formed from flame trails, arcing upward behind her back, and long flowing hair that sweeps forward in a blazing halo around her head. Her pose is dynamic and balletic: torso arched, left arm extended outward, one leg bent, the other stretched downward into a tapering flame point, as if descending or diving through the air. The figure wears the suggestion of a short dress or skirt shape also formed from fire. Surround the body with turbulent smoke-like flame ribbons and motion streaks, especially trailing behind the wings and around the lower half, creating a sense of speed and supernatural energy. High contrast, luminous edges, ethereal anatomy, no ground, no props, no text, centered vertical composition, cinematic fantasy fire spirit aesthetic.
title: Flaming Angel in Black Void
description: This prompt generates a single dramatic fantasy figure of a winged woman formed entirely from glowing fire, ideal for mythic character art or supernatural poster imagery.

content: A dynamic anime-style full-body illustration of a futuristic angelic android girl floating in outer space above Earth, shown in a dramatic diagonal action pose as if gliding or diving forward. She has short tousled {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair with soft layered bangs, a slim feminine build, and a partially obscured face turned to the right. Her body is a mix of human and machine: 2 visible metallic robotic arms and 2 visible robotic legs with articulated black joints and polished silver armor plating. She wears a white ceremonial dress uniform with a fitted bodice, puffed short sleeves, gold trim, a flared skirt, and delicate white lace underskirt details. The chest and both sleeves each feature a luminous blue gem emblem with ornate gold eye-like decoration, for a total of 3 blue jewel insignias. Add a high collar with small gold star accents and a silver waist belt. She has 2 large mechanical feathered wings extending upward and outward from her back, each wing made of layered white feather-like panels attached to metallic segmented frames. Her left arm reaches back with open mechanical fingers while her legs are bent in mid-flight, one knee raised and the other leg extended downward. The background is deep black space filled with fine stars, with the curved horizon of Earth occupying the lower left and bottom edge, glowing with a bright blue atmospheric rim and visible white cloud patterns over the planet surface. Use cinematic rim lighting, glossy reflections on metal parts, crisp clean anime linework, highly detailed fabric folds, elegant sci-fi fantasy design, and a sense of weightless motion.
title: Angelic Android Girl Above Earth

content: A dramatic anime-style portrait of a lone swordsman with an androgynous, elegant presence, shown from mid-thigh up in a three-quarter view, staring intensely at the viewer with narrowed golden eyes. The character has {argument name="hair color" default="deep crimson red"} hair, long and layered with loose messy strands, plus one very long thick braid draped over the front of the body and decorated with turquoise beads and tassels. They wear a dark metallic half-mask covering the lower face, multiple ear piercings with red and silver ornaments, and a confident, dangerous expression. One hand rests behind the neck holding a katana across the shoulders; the sword has a black hilt with red accents and a reflective blade. The outfit is a richly detailed fantasy-meets-feudal-Japanese ensemble: muted brown inner kimono, wide navy and magenta waist wraps, a large golden obi tied loosely, dangling bead ornaments, and a black outer robe lined in red with a fluffy pale fur collar. Add a large red sun emblem on the robe sleeve and teal accessories at the waist. The palette is dominated by red, black, gold, cream, and deep blue. The background is a decorative Japanese-inspired painting with a large glowing red-orange sun disk behind the head, red plum blossoms, smoky cloud-like swirls, parchment-textured beige and charcoal tones, and scattered gold leaf splashes. content:
Create a TV anime key visual using the attached characters.
4:5 size.
Faithfully reproduce the character's hairstyles and the logo.

1. A woman with an ogre mask (legendary blacksmith) in the background with a mysterious large close-up of her face.
2. A man with a troubled expression holding the sword from the 7th image (slightly smaller as a sub-character).
3. A girl in green clothes holding the plushie from the 6th image, looking up at the sky with a startled face from a front position (protagonist).
4. A woman in a kimono looking on from a distance with a worried expression (supporting character).
5. A girl with a ponytail also looking on with a worried expression (supporting character).

Use the logo effectively.
